tech_0158_conventional-led.description: Light-emitting diodes (LED) use solid state technology to produce a directional and monochromatic light at very high efficiency and long lifetimes compared to traditional incandescent or compact fluorescent light bulbs. To create white light, LED can either use phosphor conversion or (red, green and blue) RGB systems.
tech_0158_conventional-led.NZErationale: High efficiency and long lifetime compared to alternative lighting, and already starting to be cost-competitive with traditional lighting.

tech_0159_direct-current-lighting.technology_status_summary_zh: 直流照明是指以直流電運作的發光二極體（LED），可直接連接至直流電網，避免傳統交流電網所需的交直流轉換。
tech_0159_direct-current-lighting.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 可直接連接至光伏系統。
tech_0159_direct-current-lighting.technology_status_summary_en: Direct current lighting refers to light-emitting diodes (LED) run on direct current (DC) and able to be connected directly to a DC grid to avoid the AC/DC conversion required with the traditional AC grid.
tech_0159_direct-current-lighting.market_dynamics_summary_en: Possibility to link them directly to PV systems.
tech_0159_direct-current-lighting.description: Direct current lighting refers to light-emitting diodes (LED) run on direct current (DC) and able to be connected directly to a DC grid to avoid the AC/DC conversion required with the traditional AC grid.
tech_0159_direct-current-lighting.NZErationale: Possibility to link them directly to PV systems.

initiatives.description: CityTec is involved in a direct current lighting system of a business park.
ATX LED offers dc lighting as a commercial product, present all across the US
Cence offer dc lighting as commercial product with several case studies

tech_0160_organic-led.technology_status_summary_zh: 有機發光二極體（OLED）是一種固態技術，可產生高效率的漫射光源，非常適合用於照明與顯示器。也可製作於可撓式基材上，便於整合至家具與建築中。OLED分為小分子型與聚合物型（PLED）兩種，目前多數OLED採用小分子型。
tech_0160_organic-led.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 相較替代照明方式效率高、壽命長。
tech_0160_organic-led.technology_status_summary_en: Organic light-emitting diodes (OLED) are a solid state technology that produce a diffuse light source at high efficiency, making them ideal for use in lighting and displays. They can also be produced on flexible substrates, allowing incorporation into furniture and architecture. There are two types of OLEDs, small-molecular and polymer (PLED). The majority of OLEDs today use the small-molecular subtype.
tech_0160_organic-led.market_dynamics_summary_en: High efficiency and long lifetime compared to alternative lighting.
tech_0160_organic-led.description: Organic light-emitting diodes (OLED) are a solid state technology that produce a diffuse light source at high efficiency, making them ideal for use in lighting and displays. They can also be produced on flexible substrates, allowing incorporation into furniture and architecture. There are two types of OLEDs, small-molecular and polymer (PLED). The majority of OLEDs today use the small-molecular subtype.
tech_0160_organic-led.NZErationale: High efficiency and long lifetime compared to alternative lighting.

initiatives.description: Samsung Display builds $1.8 billion OLED plant in Vietnam

tech_0161_building-design-optimization-t.technology_status_summary_zh: 設計工具可協助建築設計師在新建或翻新建築的設計階段，評估各種技術的綜合影響。此類工具可管理更多方案，找出最佳設計解決方案，並可用於最佳化材料選擇、幾何形狀、建築朝向等，以提升熱效能與採光表現。
tech_0161_building-design-optimization-t.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 結合多項技術以最大化建築性能所必需。
tech_0161_building-design-optimization-t.technology_status_summary_en: Design tools to support building designers in estimating the combined impact of the different technologies during the design phase of a new building or of a building renovation. Such tools allow management of a greater number of alternatives in finding optimal design solutions. Design tools can be used to optimise material choices,  geometry, building orientation for thermal and lighting performance, amongst other things.
tech_0161_building-design-optimization-t.market_dynamics_summary_en: Necessary to combine technologies to maximise the performance of the building.
tech_0161_building-design-optimization-t.description: Design tools to support building designers in estimating the combined impact of the different technologies during the design phase of a new building or of a building renovation. Such tools allow management of a greater number of alternatives in finding optimal design solutions. Design tools can be used to optimise material choices,  geometry, building orientation for thermal and lighting performance, amongst other things.
tech_0161_building-design-optimization-t.NZErationale: Necessary to combine technologies to maximise the performance of the building.

initiatives.description: MIT Sustainable Design Lab have developed a number of building energy modelling packages, with their key piece of software tackling urban building energy modelling to develop an understanding of the retrofit potential of urban areas.
EnergyPlus is a whole building energy simulation program, developed buy the US DoE, that engineers, architects, and researchers use to model both energy consumption and water use in buildings.
The Software EDGE has been used in over 120 countries for more than 122 million square meters of green floor space

tech_0162_construction-site-inspection-t.technology_status_summary_zh: 用於建築的沉浸式技術，可對施工現場的3D虛擬複本進行遠端即時檢查。
tech_0162_construction-site-inspection-t.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 免除建築檢查所需的旅行需求。
tech_0162_construction-site-inspection-t.technology_status_summary_en: Immersive technologies for buildings enabling remote, real-time inspections of 3D virtual replicas of construction sites
tech_0162_construction-site-inspection-t.market_dynamics_summary_en: Eliminates travel needs for buildings inspections
tech_0162_construction-site-inspection-t.description: Immersive technologies for buildings enabling remote, real-time inspections of 3D virtual replicas of construction sites
tech_0162_construction-site-inspection-t.NZErationale: Eliminates travel needs for buildings inspections

initiatives.description: BEAM CUBEs digital twin solution for construction sites

tech_0163_building-information-modeling-.technology_status_summary_zh: 建築資訊模型（BIM）軟體是指建立並管理富含資料的3D模型之數位工具，以支援建築與基礎設施的設計、施工及營運。
tech_0163_building-information-modeling-.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 結合多項技術以最大化建築性能所必需，並可降低施工的氣候衝擊。
tech_0163_building-information-modeling-.technology_status_summary_en: Building Information Modeling (BIM) software refers to digital tools that create and manage 3D models enriched with data to support the design, construction, and operation of buildings and infrastructure.
tech_0163_building-information-modeling-.market_dynamics_summary_en:
Necessary to combine technologies to maximise the performance of the building.
Reduces climate impact of construction.
tech_0163_building-information-modeling-.description: Building Information Modeling (BIM) software refers to digital tools that create and manage 3D models enriched with data to support the design, construction, and operation of buildings and infrastructure.
tech_0163_building-information-modeling-.NZErationale:
Necessary to combine technologies to maximise the performance of the building.
Reduces climate impact of construction.

initiatives.description: As of 2016, the UK government has made it a requirement that all government-procured projects are required to use BIM

tech_0164_composite-construction.technology_status_summary_zh: 複合構造是在主要結構元件中結合兩種或以上材料使用。範例包括：鋼柱搭配鋼筋混凝土梁樓板系統的建築；鋼構架系統搭配混凝土核心；混凝土包覆鋼柱；混凝土填充鋼管；木構架搭配混凝土核心等。
tech_0164_composite-construction.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 複合構造已在高層建築市場占主導地位，且市占率逐年提升。
tech_0164_composite-construction.technology_status_summary_en: Composite construction uses a combination of two or more materials used together in the main structural elements. Examples include buildings which utilise: steel columns with a floor system of reinforced concrete beams; a steel frame system with a concrete core; concrete-encased steel columns; concrete-filled steel tubes; a timber frame with a concrete core, etc.
tech_0164_composite-construction.market_dynamics_summary_en: Composite construction is already dominating the high-rise construction market, and gaining market shares every year.
tech_0164_composite-construction.description: Composite construction uses a combination of two or more materials used together in the main structural elements. Examples include buildings which utilise: steel columns with a floor system of reinforced concrete beams; a steel frame system with a concrete core; concrete-encased steel columns; concrete-filled steel tubes; a timber frame with a concrete core, etc.
tech_0164_composite-construction.NZErationale: Composite construction is already dominating the high-rise construction market, and gaining market shares every year.

initiatives.description: CompoHouse is an experimental building which showcases the use of composite materials.
Lucas Museum of Narrative Art utilizes glass fibre-reinforced plastic as a composite material in the building.
Extensive uses of composite materials for the Mataf extension at the Holy Mosque of Mecca
Composite roof design of Jeddah station

The design brief for the Velodrome asked for a lightweight construction leading to an integrated approach to design. A materially efficient double-curved cable net was chosen for the roof structure, providing the signature aesthetic structure with half the carbon footprint of the equivalent sized Aquatics centre. The cable-net design reduced the embodied carbon by 27% compared to a steel arch option. The seating supports were also integrated into the structural frame to avoid the need for a separate structure. The material strategies not only minimised embodied carbon but also worked in conjunction with other design features to produce the most energy efficient building in the Olympic Park, improving on 2006 energy efficiency building regulations by 31%, demonstrating the potential success of an integrated approach

tech_0165_funicular-floor-system.technology_status_summary_zh: 懸鏈樓板是一種薄型混凝土構件，由拱頂與最佳化加勁翼組成，樓板與翼的厚度不超過20公釐，可讓70%的混凝土由低密度隔熱材料取代，以提升樓板的熱效能。
tech_0165_funicular-floor-system.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 懸鏈樓板系統平均比傳統樓板少用70%的混凝土，且無需鋼筋，環境效能也更佳。
tech_0165_funicular-floor-system.technology_status_summary_en: The funicular floor is a thin concrete element consisting of vaults and optimised stiffening fins. The thickness of the slab and fins is no more than 20 mm, which allows 70% of the concrete to be replaced by low-density insulation materials to improve the thermal performance of the floor.
tech_0165_funicular-floor-system.market_dynamics_summary_en: The funicular floor system uses (on-average) 70% less concrete than a traditional slab and uses no reinforcement. It also has better environmental performance.
tech_0165_funicular-floor-system.description: The funicular floor is a thin concrete element consisting of vaults and optimised stiffening fins. The thickness of the slab and fins is no more than 20 mm, which allows 70% of the concrete to be replaced by low-density insulation materials to improve the thermal performance of the floor.
tech_0165_funicular-floor-system.NZErationale: The funicular floor system uses (on-average) 70% less concrete than a traditional slab and uses no reinforcement. It also has better environmental performance.

initiatives.description: The Rippmann Floor System is a pre-fabricated Funicular floor system that is being deployed in several places

tech_0166_thin-shelled-concrete.technology_status_summary_zh: 薄殼混凝土屋頂是一種夾層結構，整合建築元件（如水力輻射冷暖系統、薄膜光伏系統等），同時作為輕量化屋頂。混凝土厚度介於3至30公分之間，憑藉其特殊形狀承受應力。
tech_0166_thin-shelled-concrete.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 相較合板為更永續的材料。
tech_0166_thin-shelled-concrete.technology_status_summary_en: A thin shelled concrete roof is a sandwich structure integrating buildings elements (e.g. a hydronic radiant heating and cooling system, thin film photovoltaic systems, etc.) while also serving as a lightweighted roof. The thickness of the concrete varies between 3 and 30 cm, and it withstands stress thanks to its specific shape.
tech_0166_thin-shelled-concrete.market_dynamics_summary_en: More sustainable material compared to plywood.
tech_0166_thin-shelled-concrete.description: A thin shelled concrete roof is a sandwich structure integrating buildings elements (e.g. a hydronic radiant heating and cooling system, thin film photovoltaic systems, etc.) while also serving as a lightweighted roof. The thickness of the concrete varies between 3 and 30 cm, and it withstands stress thanks to its specific shape.
tech_0166_thin-shelled-concrete.NZErationale: More sustainable material compared to plywood.

initiatives.description: NEST (Next Evolution in Sustainable Building Technologies) is a district scale project by Empa (Swiss Federal Laboratories for Materials Science and Technology) whose Hilo project (high performance, low-energy) integrates thin shelled roofs

tech_0167_additive-manufacturing-for-bui.technology_status_summary_zh: 在預鑄混凝土產業引入積層製造（即3D列印），對於多次混凝土澆置的高重複性作業似乎是可行的解決方案。3D列印可直接應用於現場施工過程，在探索新穎複雜幾何形狀的同時降低環境衝擊。
tech_0167_additive-manufacturing-for-bui.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 3D列印可望降低原料與人工相關成本，同時作為有效的材料效率策略（可將材料需求削減50%）。
tech_0167_additive-manufacturing-for-bui.technology_status_summary_en: The introduction of additive manufacturing (or 3D printing) in the precast concrete industry appears to be a viable solution for high repeatability over many concrete pours. 3D printing can be applied directly to the on-site construction process, reducing the environmental impact while exploring new and complicated geometries.
tech_0167_additive-manufacturing-for-bui.market_dynamics_summary_en: 3D printing could reduce costs related to raw materials and to labour, while being an effective material efficiency strategy (by cutting material demand by 50%).
tech_0167_additive-manufacturing-for-bui.description: The introduction of additive manufacturing (or 3D printing) in the precast concrete industry appears to be a viable solution for high repeatability over many concrete pours. 3D printing can be applied directly to the on-site construction process, reducing the environmental impact while exploring new and complicated geometries.
tech_0167_additive-manufacturing-for-bui.NZErationale: 3D printing could reduce costs related to raw materials and to labour, while being an effective material efficiency strategy (by cutting material demand by 50%).

initiatives.description: By 2030, 25% of all new buildings in Dubai will be constructed by 3D printing, the government hopes. McKinsey, the consultancy, estimates the technique could have an annual economic impact worth $550 billion by 2025
Europe's biggest 3D printed building
10 examples of 3D printed buildings projects in 2025

tech_0168_extended-building-materials-li.technology_status_summary_zh: 模組化建築構件包括可重新配置的系統，以及可拆卸的整體系統、網絡與設計，讓建築能滿足不同需求（如作為會議室、共同工作空間等），甚至可用於不同功能（如辦公空間、住宅用途等）。
tech_0168_extended-building-materials-li.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 延長使用壽命是2050淨零排放情境中材料節省的主要來源，讓建築具備靈活性是延長其壽命的關鍵。
tech_0168_extended-building-materials-li.technology_status_summary_en: Modular building components include re-configurable systems, and overall systems, networks and designs that allow disassembly so that buildings can meet different needs (e.g. serving as a meeting room, conference room, co-working space, etc) or even be used for different functions (e.g. office space, residential use, etc).
tech_0168_extended-building-materials-li.market_dynamics_summary_en: Lifetime extension is the primary source of material savings in the Net Zero Emissions by 2050 Scenario, and making buildings flexible is key to extending their lifespans.
tech_0168_extended-building-materials-li.description: Modular building components include re-configurable systems, and overall systems, networks and designs that allow disassembly so that buildings can meet different needs (e.g. serving as a meeting room, conference room, co-working space, etc) or even be used for different functions (e.g. office space, residential use, etc).
tech_0168_extended-building-materials-li.NZErationale: Lifetime extension is the primary source of material savings in the Net Zero Emissions by 2050 Scenario, and making buildings flexible is key to extending their lifespans.

initiatives.description: Reconfigurably building wins an EU Prize for Architecture
The largest mass timber building in Finland, using pre-optimized, scalable and adaptable solutions that ensure the building can adapt to future needs

tech_0169_pre-casting-for-building-const.technology_name: Pre-casting for building construction and renovation
tech_0169_pre-casting-for-building-const.technology_name_zh: 建築施工與翻新之預鑄工法
tech_0169_pre-casting-for-building-const.technology_status_summary_zh: 預鑄是在受控且標準化的環境中，使用可重複使用的模具生產結構元件，預鑄件隨後運至施工現場與其他結構件組裝。
tech_0169_pre-casting-for-building-const.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 預鑄混凝土構件在建築業的應用，是以較低成本創造模組化結構的實用方法，可提供多樣化的形狀與設計。此解決方案可提升材料使用效率，減少材料使用，並改善施工與營運效率，材料性質也良好。
tech_0169_pre-casting-for-building-const.technology_status_summary_en: Precasting is the use of a reusable mould to produce a structural element in a controlled and standardised environment. The precast is then transported to the construction site to be assembled with other structural pieces.
tech_0169_pre-casting-for-building-const.market_dynamics_summary_en: The use of precast concrete parts in the building sector is a practical method to create modular structure at a lower cost, allowing for a wide variety of shapes and designs. This solution could provide efficiency in the use of material, allowing for reduced material use, and also improve construction and operation efficiency. Good material properties, such as thermal insulation and weather resistance, and the possibility to recycle it make the precast concrete a key factor in the development of the building sector.
tech_0169_pre-casting-for-building-const.description: Precasting is the use of a reusable mould to produce a structural element in a controlled and standardised environment. The precast is then transported to the construction site to be assembled with other structural pieces.
tech_0169_pre-casting-for-building-const.NZErationale: The use of precast concrete parts in the building sector is a practical method to create modular structure at a lower cost, allowing for a wide variety of shapes and designs. This solution could provide efficiency in the use of material, allowing for reduced material use, and also improve construction and operation efficiency. Good material properties, such as thermal insulation and weather resistance, and the possibility to recycle it make the precast concrete a key factor in the development of the building sector.

initiatives.description: South Dublin County Council launched Innovation Square,  first standalone cost rental housing development in Ireland to be funded directly by a local authority. The scheme consist of 133 new homes, built with a full precast floor/roof structure and envelope was employed including wall insulation, and brick cladding

tech_0170_fabric-formwork-building-envel.technology_status_summary_zh: 織物模板可讓混凝土構件以靈活方式設計，使用可依最佳化配置塑形的軟性模板，可用於牆體、柱體及外露樓板底面（建築構件的水平懸空底側，屬室內或室外建築特徵）。
tech_0170_fabric-formwork-building-envel.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 織物模板平均比傳統剛性木製或鋼製模板節省35%的混凝土，但適用於工地物流條件允許、當地缺乏熟練勞力的場合。
tech_0170_fabric-formwork-building-envel.technology_status_summary_en: Fabric formwork allows the design of concrete elements in a flexible way, using a soft formwork than can be shaped according to an optimised layout. It can be used for walls, columns, and elevated slab soffits (an exterior or interior architectural feature, generally the horizontal, aloft underside of any construction element).
tech_0170_fabric-formwork-building-envel.market_dynamics_summary_en: Fabric formwork saves on average 35% of concrete compared to conventional rigid wood or steel panel formwork, but is applied in locations where site logistics might be prohibitive or experienced labour less locally available.
tech_0170_fabric-formwork-building-envel.description: Fabric formwork allows the design of concrete elements in a flexible way, using a soft formwork than can be shaped according to an optimised layout. It can be used for walls, columns, and elevated slab soffits (an exterior or interior architectural feature, generally the horizontal, aloft underside of any construction element).
tech_0170_fabric-formwork-building-envel.NZErationale: Fabric formwork saves on average 35% of concrete compared to conventional rigid wood or steel panel formwork, but is applied in locations where site logistics might be prohibitive or experienced labour less locally available.

initiatives.description: Torre Rise project, the future tallest tower in Latin America - uses reusable, high-performance formwork panel made entirely from recycled plastic waste

tech_0171_building-prefabrication.technology_status_summary_zh: 預製是指在施工現場以外受控環境中組裝結構性建築構件，組裝完成的結構再運至現場完成最終施工。
tech_0171_building-prefabrication.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 降低材料需求與相關能源支出。
tech_0171_building-prefabrication.technology_status_summary_en: Prefabrication refers to the assembly of structural building components in a controlled environment outside of the construction site. The assembled structure is then transported on site to be finalised.
tech_0171_building-prefabrication.market_dynamics_summary_en: Reduction of material demand and related energy expenses.
tech_0171_building-prefabrication.description: Prefabrication refers to the assembly of structural building components in a controlled environment outside of the construction site. The assembled structure is then transported on site to be finalised.
tech_0171_building-prefabrication.NZErationale: Reduction of material demand and related energy expenses.

initiatives.description: Development and advanced prefabrication of innovative, multifunctional building envelope elements for MOdular REtrofitting and CONNECTions, was an EU project running from 2014 to 2019 with the aim of developing and demonstrating technologies and components for prefabricated modular renovation.
Energysprong is a Dutch company which aims to provide retrofits at scale using prefabricated parts. They have over 6000 retrofits planned in 5 EU countries.
The largest mass timber building in Finland with prefabricated systems
Scalable renovations through digital planning and industrial prefabrication in Erlangen, germany
EnveoVent - prefabricated high-performance facade solutions adapted to local conditions

tech_0172_dynamic-glazing-thermochromic-.technology_status_summary_zh: 因應溫度變化，被動式調整熱傳透率、太陽得熱係數與可見光透射率等特性。
tech_0172_dynamic-glazing-thermochromic-.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 相較電致變色成本較低，但可控性與多樣性較低。
tech_0172_dynamic-glazing-thermochromic-.technology_status_summary_en: Passive modification of properties in terms of thermal transmittance, solar heat gains coefficient and visible transmittance due to a change in temperature.
tech_0172_dynamic-glazing-thermochromic-.market_dynamics_summary_en: Lower cost compared to electrochromic but lower controllability and versatility.
tech_0172_dynamic-glazing-thermochromic-.description: Passive modification of properties in terms of thermal transmittance, solar heat gains coefficient and visible transmittance due to a change in temperature.
tech_0172_dynamic-glazing-thermochromic-.NZErationale: Lower cost compared to electrochromic but lower controllability and versatility.

initiatives.description: Raven Window (the US) has patented thermochromic filters, manufactures them in Colorado. A project portfolio shows some first commercial applications.
Field tests for thermochromic smart window utilizing a new  hydrated ionic polymer

NREL developed a “thermochromic photovoltaic” window automatically changes color on hot, sunny days to block glare and reduce unwanted solar heat gain. During this color change, the material also transforms into an active solar cell, enabling the window to generate its own electrical power - with expected prototypes to be developed within a year

tech_0173_electrochromic-fenestration.technology_status_summary_zh: 可藉由電流驅動改變透射率、太陽得熱係數與可見光透射率的窗戶。
tech_0173_electrochromic-fenestration.technology_status_summary_en: Window able to change transmittance, solar heat gain coefficient and visible transmittance, energised by electrical current.
tech_0173_electrochromic-fenestration.description: Window able to change transmittance, solar heat gain coefficient and visible transmittance, energised by electrical current.

initiatives.description: Halioinc is an American based company which delivers smart glass which is capable of lowering cooling loads in buildings. In late 2021 they secured $100 M to increase production capacity and to service back orders.
SageGlass has over 100 case studies worldwide

tech_0174_highly-insulating-window.technology_status_summary_zh: 透過低輻射鍍膜、多層板、隔熱密封良好的玻璃組件以及低傳導係數窗框，可達成R-5/7的R值。
tech_0174_highly-insulating-window.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 適用範圍廣，節能效益高，且能改善舒適度。
tech_0174_highly-insulating-window.technology_status_summary_en: Window with R-values of R-5/7 achievable thanks to low emissivity coating, multi-panel, well insulated and sealed glazing assemblies, and low conductivity frames.
tech_0174_highly-insulating-window.market_dynamics_summary_en: Broad applicability, high energy savings and improved comfort.
tech_0174_highly-insulating-window.description: Window with R-values of R-5/7 achievable thanks to low emissivity coating, multi-panel, well insulated and sealed glazing assemblies, and low conductivity frames.
tech_0174_highly-insulating-window.NZErationale: Broad applicability, high energy savings and improved comfort.

initiatives.description: AeroShield wins $14.5 million award with its aerogel solution, which will enable them to start manufacturing and expand product capacity.

AlpenGlass insulated glass units said to reach R-5 to R-15 performance receives funding worth $18 million to upscale manufacturing from 100-150 to 1200 units per day. They have a commercialy available R-11 uPVC window reinforced with glass fiber.
AeroShield announces major plant upgrade

tech_0175_insulation-glass-coating.technology_status_summary_zh: 直接塗覆於窗戶內側或外部窗框的低輻射薄膜，可依建築能源需求允許或阻擋熱能增益。
tech_0175_insulation-glass-coating.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 適用範圍廣，成熟後具成本競爭力，並能改善舒適度。
tech_0175_insulation-glass-coating.technology_status_summary_en: Low emissivity film directly applied in the interior side of windows or to the external window frame to allow or prevent heat gains depending on building energy needs.
tech_0175_insulation-glass-coating.market_dynamics_summary_en: Broad applicability, cost competitive when mature, and provides improved comfort.
tech_0175_insulation-glass-coating.description: Low emissivity film directly applied in the interior side of windows or to the external window frame to allow or prevent heat gains depending on building energy needs.
tech_0175_insulation-glass-coating.NZErationale: Broad applicability, cost competitive when mature, and provides improved comfort.

initiatives.description: Company Euroglass has a wide selection of insulation glass coatings
Canadian company NXLite secures $9.2 M to expand operations for windows coatings

tech_0176_building-integrated-solar-ther.technology_name_zh: 建築整合太陽能集熱器（BIST）
tech_0176_building-integrated-solar-ther.sector_zh: 牆面、屋頂與立面太陽能熱技術
sector: Solar thermal technologies for wall, roof & façades
tech_0176_building-integrated-solar-ther.sector_en: Solar thermal technologies for wall, roof & façades
tech_0176_building-integrated-solar-ther.technology_status_summary_zh: 多功能能源立面，接收太陽輻射並轉化為冷暖迴路所需的熱能。
tech_0176_building-integrated-solar-ther.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在2050淨零排放情境中，太陽能熱技術將於2030年前部署於約4億戶住宅。需要套裝解決方案來降低成本、提升效率並改善新建住宅的美觀性。
tech_0176_building-integrated-solar-ther.technology_status_summary_en: Multi-functional energy facade that receives the solar irradiation and converts it into heat energy for the heating/cooling circuits.
tech_0176_building-integrated-solar-ther.market_dynamics_summary_en: Solar thermal technologies deployed in around 400 million dwellings by 2030 in the Net Zero Emissions by 2050 Scenario.  Packaged solutions are needed to bring down costs, enhance efficiency and improve aesthetics for new houses.
tech_0176_building-integrated-solar-ther.description: Multi-functional energy facade that receives the solar irradiation and converts it into heat energy for the heating/cooling circuits.
tech_0176_building-integrated-solar-ther.NZErationale: Solar thermal technologies deployed in around 400 million dwellings by 2030 in the Net Zero Emissions by 2050 Scenario.  Packaged solutions are needed to bring down costs, enhance efficiency and improve aesthetics for new houses.

initiatives.description: ArKol – Development of Architecturally Well-Integrated Facade Collectors With Heat Pipes.
TABSOLAR is developing solar thermal facades using ultra-high performance concrete.

Apartment building
Zürich-Schwamendingen containing vertical solar collectors.

tech_0177_transpiring-wall-mounted-solar.technology_name_zh: 透氣式壁掛太陽能集熱器
tech_0177_transpiring-wall-mounted-solar.sector_zh: 牆面、屋頂與立面太陽能熱技術
sector: Solar thermal technologies for wall, roof & façades
tech_0177_transpiring-wall-mounted-solar.sector_en: Solar thermal technologies for wall, roof & façades
tech_0177_transpiring-wall-mounted-solar.technology_status_summary_zh: 穿孔牆板將經太陽加熱的空氣透過穿孔吸入腔體中，熱量於寒冷天氣中導入建築通風系統，於溫暖天氣中則直接排放至大氣。
tech_0177_transpiring-wall-mounted-solar.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 降低商業建築的供暖需求，尤其是透過最大化熱能增益：可將高達80%的太陽輻射轉化為熱空氣。
tech_0177_transpiring-wall-mounted-solar.technology_status_summary_en: Perforated wall panel that draws the air heated by the sun through perforations into a cavity. Heat calories are then driven into the building's ventilation system during cold days, and ejected directly into the atmosphere during warm days.
tech_0177_transpiring-wall-mounted-solar.market_dynamics_summary_en: Reduction of heating demand in commercial buildings, in particular by maximising heat gains: it converts up to 80% of the sun’s radiation into warm air.
tech_0177_transpiring-wall-mounted-solar.description: Perforated wall panel that draws the air heated by the sun through perforations into a cavity. Heat calories are then driven into the building's ventilation system during cold days, and ejected directly into the atmosphere during warm days.
tech_0177_transpiring-wall-mounted-solar.NZErationale: Reduction of heating demand in commercial buildings, in particular by maximising heat gains: it converts up to 80% of the sun’s radiation into warm air.

initiatives.description: CanmetENERGY's Solar Thermal R&D have resulted in products, in for example the company SolarWall. They have 30% of the solar market in Canada and have installations in 40 countries.

tech_0178_trombe-wall.sector_zh: 牆面、屋頂與立面太陽能熱技術
sector: Solar thermal technologies for wall, roof & façades
tech_0178_trombe-wall.sector_en: Solar thermal technologies for wall, roof & façades
tech_0178_trombe-wall.technology_status_summary_zh: 具高熱質量構件的儲熱與太陽能加熱牆，可產生間接熱能增益，涵蓋多種設計，包括傳統式、複合式、水牆式、太陽能穿透牆式、流化式與光伏式。
tech_0178_trombe-wall.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 結構簡單，節能效益高，成熟後具成本競爭力。
tech_0178_trombe-wall.technology_status_summary_en: Storage and solar heating walls in components with high thermal mass which leads to indirect heat gains. They encompass a range of designs including classic, composite, water, solar trans-wall, fluidised and photovoltaic.
tech_0178_trombe-wall.market_dynamics_summary_en: Simple configuration, high energy savings, cost-competitive when mature.
tech_0178_trombe-wall.description: Storage and solar heating walls in components with high thermal mass which leads to indirect heat gains. They encompass a range of designs including classic, composite, water, solar trans-wall, fluidised and photovoltaic.
tech_0178_trombe-wall.NZErationale: Simple configuration, high energy savings, cost-competitive when mature.

initiatives.description: The Green Village is a renewable innovation project by the TU Delft. They have installed a Trombe wall as part of their project.

tech_0179_aerogel-insulation-from-silica.technology_name: Aerogel insulation from silica or carbon
tech_0179_aerogel-insulation-from-silica.technology_status_summary_zh: 以合成多孔材料製成的隔熱材，凝膠中的液體成分由氣體取代（氣凝膠），也可作為透明隔熱材料使用。
tech_0179_aerogel-insulation-from-silica.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 材料極低的導熱係數帶來節能效益。
tech_0179_aerogel-insulation-from-silica.technology_status_summary_en: Insulation made with synthetic porous material in which the liquid component of the gel is replaced with gas (aerogel). They can also be used as transparent insulation materials.
tech_0179_aerogel-insulation-from-silica.market_dynamics_summary_en: Energy savings associated with the very low thermal conductivity of the material.
tech_0179_aerogel-insulation-from-silica.description: Insulation made with synthetic porous material in which the liquid component of the gel is replaced with gas (aerogel). They can also be used as transparent insulation materials.
tech_0179_aerogel-insulation-from-silica.NZErationale: Energy savings associated with the very low thermal conductivity of the material.

initiatives.description: Innovative Aerogel Production for Low-Cost and High-R Insulation
Swiss start up scaling up mass production of Aerogel insulation material

tech_0180_building-envelope-air-sealing.technology_status_summary_zh: 系統性密封整個建築表面的空氣滲漏（尤其是裂縫、小孔、管線、電線、照明與風管周圍），以減少熱損失並更好地控制濕度，此做法須搭配適當通風。技術：泡棉、密封膠、膠帶或墊圈。
tech_0180_building-envelope-air-sealing.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 具低成本高節能潛力，改善舒適度與室內空氣品質（減少濕氣、灰塵、花粉等），並提升耐久性（避免濕氣與結露）。
tech_0180_building-envelope-air-sealing.technology_status_summary_en:
Systematic sealing of air leakages throughout the building surface (and particularly around cracks, small holes, plumbing, wiring, lighting and ductwork) to reduce heat loss and better control humidity. This needs to be coupled with appropriate ventilation.
Technologies: foam, caulk, tape or gaskets.
tech_0180_building-envelope-air-sealing.market_dynamics_summary_en: High energy savings potential at low cost, improved comfort, improved indoor air quality (reduced humidity, dust, pollen, etc) and increased durability (avoided moisture and condensation).
tech_0180_building-envelope-air-sealing.description:
Systematic sealing of air leakages throughout the building surface (and particularly around cracks, small holes, plumbing, wiring, lighting and ductwork) to reduce heat loss and better control humidity. This needs to be coupled with appropriate ventilation.
Technologies: foam, caulk, tape or gaskets.
tech_0180_building-envelope-air-sealing.NZErationale: High energy savings potential at low cost, improved comfort, improved indoor air quality (reduced humidity, dust, pollen, etc) and increased durability (avoided moisture and condensation).

tech_0181_building-integrated-heat-and-m.technology_name: Building integrated heat and moisture exchange panel
tech_0181_building-integrated-heat-and-m.technology_name_zh: 建築整合熱濕交換面板
tech_0181_building-integrated-heat-and-m.technology_status_summary_zh: 在模組化系統中透過預調節通風空氣，於熱回收通風器中實現熱與濕度傳遞（而現有先進能源回收通風器的濕度交換能力較低）。
tech_0181_building-integrated-heat-and-m.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 結合通風節能與提升隔熱的雙重效益。
tech_0181_building-integrated-heat-and-m.technology_status_summary_en: Achieving a thermal and humidity transfer in heat recovery ventilators by preconditioning the ventilation air in a modular system (while state-of-the art energy recovery ventilators offer low humidity exchange).
tech_0181_building-integrated-heat-and-m.market_dynamics_summary_en: Combines benefits of energy savings from ventilation and increased insulation.
tech_0181_building-integrated-heat-and-m.description: Achieving a thermal and humidity transfer in heat recovery ventilators by preconditioning the ventilation air in a modular system (while state-of-the art energy recovery ventilators offer low humidity exchange).
tech_0181_building-integrated-heat-and-m.NZErationale: Combines benefits of energy savings from ventilation and increased insulation.

initiatives.description: US Department of Energy is funding two thirds of a USD 3.2 million programme to unify ventilation and insulation in one technology through heat and moisture exchange panels. Partners include Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory, dPoint Technologies Inc. (Vancouver), Arup (London), ETH Zurich, Membrane Technology and Research Inc. (Newark).

tech_0182_building-integrated-phase-chan.technology_status_summary_zh: 相變材料提供潛熱儲存（即在恆溫下透過材料相態變化儲熱），並整合於不同建築構件中，可提升建築熱性能，減少熱損失。整合方式：混凝土、玻璃、結構元件之間、隔熱牆板，或結合建築整合光伏（BIPV）。
tech_0182_building-integrated-phase-chan.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 整合相變材料可實現更高的緊湊性、透過封裝降低整體系統成本，並發揮建築構件多元功能的綜效。目前成本仍偏高，限制了更大規模的市場採用。
tech_0182_building-integrated-phase-chan.technology_status_summary_en:
Phase-change materials provide latent heat storage (i.e. at a constant temperature, by changing the material's phase) and are integrated into different building components. They enhance the building's thermal performance as heat losses are reduced.
Integration: in concrete, glazing, between structural elements, using insulation wallboards or even combined with building-integrated photovoltaic (BIPV).
tech_0182_building-integrated-phase-chan.market_dynamics_summary_en: The integration of phase-change materials enables greater compactness, a reduction in total system costs (through packaging) and the exploitation of synergies from the various functionalities of building components. Today, costs are still prohibitive of greater market uptake.
tech_0182_building-integrated-phase-chan.description:
Phase-change materials provide latent heat storage (i.e. at a constant temperature, by changing the material's phase) and are integrated into different building components. They enhance the building's thermal performance as heat losses are reduced.
Integration: in concrete, glazing, between structural elements, using insulation wallboards or even combined with building-integrated photovoltaic (BIPV).
tech_0182_building-integrated-phase-chan.NZErationale: The integration of phase-change materials enables greater compactness, a reduction in total system costs (through packaging) and the exploitation of synergies from the various functionalities of building components. Today, costs are still prohibitive of greater market uptake.

initiatives.description: Cost-Effective Thermally Activated Building Systems to Support a Power Grid System With High Penetrations of As-Available Renewable Energy Resources.”, The University of Alabama (Tuscaloosa, AL)
Small scale demonstrator in Germany with PCM material developed by an Indian company
French company Kaloritech launches small scale trials of PCM panels that can be installed in floor, wall or cielieng

tech_0183_double-skin-facade.technology_status_summary_zh: 由多層空氣與玻璃組成，其中空氣層可自然或機械通風。
tech_0183_double-skin-facade.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 透過提升隔熱、通風、控制太陽得熱與日光，降低能源需求。
tech_0183_double-skin-facade.technology_status_summary_en: Multiple layers of air and glazing where the air cavity is ventilated (naturally or mechanically).
tech_0183_double-skin-facade.market_dynamics_summary_en: Lower energy demand thanks to increased insulation, ventilation, control of solar heat gains and daylight.
tech_0183_double-skin-facade.description: Multiple layers of air and glazing where the air cavity is ventilated (naturally or mechanically).
tech_0183_double-skin-facade.NZErationale: Lower energy demand thanks to increased insulation, ventilation, control of solar heat gains and daylight.

initiatives.description: 10 office buildings with insulated double-skin facades
Mayo Clinic in Rocheste, Minnesota and Schwarzman College of Computing in Cambridge, Massachusetts were equiped with  double-skin facades

tech_0184_dynamic-building-envelope.technology_status_summary_zh: 因應氣候條件與居住者行為變化而改變外殼功能，運用可控式熱質量、通風、遮陽、熱交換、濕度控制等。
tech_0184_dynamic-building-envelope.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 提升建築靈活性與韌性，最大化再生能源利用效益，實現節能。
tech_0184_dynamic-building-envelope.technology_status_summary_en: Changing envelope functionality in response to the variation of climate conditions and occupant behaviour, using controllable thermal mass, ventilation, shading, heat exchanges, humidity control, etc.
tech_0184_dynamic-building-envelope.market_dynamics_summary_en: Increased building flexibility and resilience, maximisation of renewable energy savings exploitation, energy savings.
tech_0184_dynamic-building-envelope.description: Changing envelope functionality in response to the variation of climate conditions and occupant behaviour, using controllable thermal mass, ventilation, shading, heat exchanges, humidity control, etc.
tech_0184_dynamic-building-envelope.NZErationale: Increased building flexibility and resilience, maximisation of renewable energy savings exploitation, energy savings.

initiatives.description: The Adaptable Dynamic Building Envelope (ADBE) is a modular system that can be adapted to various geometry topologies both in residentials and non-residential buildings. Demonstrators in Greece and Hungary

tech_0185_reflective-fa-ade.technology_status_summary_zh: 反射式立面可反射更多入射陽光，因而保持較低溫度，降低建築的冷卻需求。可透過塗覆高反射塗料達成，此類塗料具備與標準產品相同的可見色域，但利用紅外光譜反射更多太陽輻射光譜。其他方法包括使用本身具反射性的建材，例如具額外反射特性的特殊水泥。
tech_0185_reflective-fa-ade.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 降低空間冷卻需求，適用範圍廣。
tech_0185_reflective-fa-ade.technology_status_summary_en:
A reflective façade that reflects a greater part of the incoming sunlight, therefor staying cooler causing the building to require less cooling.
This can be achieved by applying highly reflictive paints that provide the same visible colour range as standard products but exploit the infra-red spectrum to reflect a greater part of the solar irradiation spectrum.
Other methods include using construction materials that themselves are reflective, such as special cement with extra reflective properties.
tech_0185_reflective-fa-ade.market_dynamics_summary_en: Reduced demand for space cooling, broad applicability.
tech_0185_reflective-fa-ade.description:
A reflective façade that reflects a greater part of the incoming sunlight, therefor staying cooler causing the building to require less cooling.
This can be achieved by applying highly reflictive paints that provide the same visible colour range as standard products but exploit the infra-red spectrum to reflect a greater part of the solar irradiation spectrum.
Other methods include using construction materials that themselves are reflective, such as special cement with extra reflective properties.
tech_0185_reflective-fa-ade.NZErationale: Reduced demand for space cooling, broad applicability.

initiatives.description: French company Cool-Roof have developed a high reflectivity paint that can be applied to walls and roofs.
A team of chinese researchers have developed a "supercool" cement that reflects more incoming sunlight than conventional cement.

tech_0186_cool-roof.technology_status_summary_zh: 冷屋頂是指相較傳統屋頂，吸收較少入射太陽能量而保持涼爽的屋頂。可透過光學及/或熱性質達成，例如將屋頂漆成能反射更多陽光的顏色，其他方法還包括設計能更有效將熱能散逸至外部環境的屋頂。
tech_0186_cool-roof.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 降低空間冷卻需求，適用範圍廣。
tech_0186_cool-roof.technology_status_summary_en:
Cool roofs are roofs that stay cool by absorbing less of the incoming energy from the sunlight than conventional roofs.
This can be achieved through optical and/or thermal properties, for example by painting the roof in a colour which reflects more sunlight.
Other methods include for instance designing the roof in such a way that it better disipates heat to the outside environment.
tech_0186_cool-roof.market_dynamics_summary_en: Reduced demand for space cooling, broad applicability.
tech_0186_cool-roof.description:
Cool roofs are roofs that stay cool by absorbing less of the incoming energy from the sunlight than conventional roofs.
This can be achieved through optical and/or thermal properties, for example by painting the roof in a colour which reflects more sunlight.
Other methods include for instance designing the roof in such a way that it better disipates heat to the outside environment.
tech_0186_cool-roof.NZErationale: Reduced demand for space cooling, broad applicability.

initiatives.description: Simpler forms of Cool roofs are being deployed world wide to counter heat waves
French company Cool-Roof have developed a high reflectivity paint that can be applied to walls and roofs.

tech_0187_structural-insulated-panel.technology_status_summary_zh: 結構隔熱板、定向纖維板，或具隔熱核心的側板。
tech_0187_structural-insulated-panel.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 施工快速，減少對框架承包商的依賴，性能優異且無熱橋。
tech_0187_structural-insulated-panel.technology_status_summary_en: Structural insulated panels, oriented-strand board or side of an insulating core.
tech_0187_structural-insulated-panel.market_dynamics_summary_en: Rapid construction, reduced dependence on framing contractors, high performance and no thermal bridges.
tech_0187_structural-insulated-panel.description: Structural insulated panels, oriented-strand board or side of an insulating core.
tech_0187_structural-insulated-panel.NZErationale: Rapid construction, reduced dependence on framing contractors, high performance and no thermal bridges.

tech_0188_vacuum-insulated-panel.technology_status_summary_zh: 由氣密氣體與蒸氣屏障包覆的多孔核心，可降低熱傳導與構件厚度。
tech_0188_vacuum-insulated-panel.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在相同厚度下，真空隔熱板的熱阻是其他隔熱材料的5至10倍。
tech_0188_vacuum-insulated-panel.technology_status_summary_en: Porous core enclosed by an air-sealed air and vapour barrier that reduces heat conductivity and component thickness.
tech_0188_vacuum-insulated-panel.market_dynamics_summary_en: The thermal resistance of vacuum insulated panels is 5 to 10 times greater compared to other insulation materials at the same level of thickness.
tech_0188_vacuum-insulated-panel.description: Porous core enclosed by an air-sealed air and vapour barrier that reduces heat conductivity and component thickness.
tech_0188_vacuum-insulated-panel.NZErationale: The thermal resistance of vacuum insulated panels is 5 to 10 times greater compared to other insulation materials at the same level of thickness.

initiatives.description: Innovative multi-functional Vacuum-Insulation-Panels (VIPs) for use in the building sector
The 172 meter tall Grand Tower Frankfurt uses Vacuum Insulated Panels, which allows for a larger living space in the apartments.
VIPA International, founded in 2014, is a global trade association that represents companies associated with the Vacuum Insulation Panel industry.

tech_0189_dynamic-insulation.technology_status_summary_zh: 動態隔熱透過建築外殼的隔熱層引入涼爽外部空氣，隨著空氣通過透氣隔熱層向內移動，會吸收原本將散失的熱量。
tech_0189_dynamic-insulation.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 依基材導熱係數最佳化的通道孔隙可回收熱能，藉此降低機械通風需求，進而節省能源。
tech_0189_dynamic-insulation.technology_status_summary_en: Dynamic insulation draws in cool outside through the insulation layer in the building envelope. As the air moves inward through the permeable insulation, it picks up heat that would otherwise be lost.
tech_0189_dynamic-insulation.market_dynamics_summary_en: Heat recovery from channel-pores optimised to recover heat according to the thermal conductivity of the base material. This can reduce the need for mechanical ventilation thus saving energy.
tech_0189_dynamic-insulation.description: Dynamic insulation draws in cool outside through the insulation layer in the building envelope. As the air moves inward through the permeable insulation, it picks up heat that would otherwise be lost.
tech_0189_dynamic-insulation.NZErationale: Heat recovery from channel-pores optimised to recover heat according to the thermal conductivity of the base material. This can reduce the need for mechanical ventilation thus saving energy.

tech_0190_green-roof.technology_status_summary_zh: 綠屋頂是部分或完全被植被覆蓋的屋頂，可提供隔熱效果，降低冷暖需求，在都市環境中尤其有益，有助於管理雨水並創造生物多樣性棲地。
tech_0190_green-roof.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 降低冷暖能源需求，提升對極端天氣的韌性。
tech_0190_green-roof.technology_status_summary_en: A Green roof is a roof partially or completelly covered with vegetation. Green roofs provide insulation, reducing demand for heating and cooling. They can be particularily benefitial in urban environments, where they can help manage rain water and create habitatis for biodiversity.
tech_0190_green-roof.market_dynamics_summary_en: Reduces energy demand for heating and cooling. Increases resilience to extreme weather.
tech_0190_green-roof.description: A Green roof is a roof partially or completelly covered with vegetation. Green roofs provide insulation, reducing demand for heating and cooling. They can be particularily benefitial in urban environments, where they can help manage rain water and create habitatis for biodiversity.
tech_0190_green-roof.NZErationale: Reduces energy demand for heating and cooling. Increases resilience to extreme weather.

initiatives.description: In 2009, the city of Toronto became the first city in North America to adopt a mandatory policy that requires green roofs to be used for much of new construction.

tech_0191_carbon-negative-construction-m.technology_status_summary_zh: 負碳建材是指不僅能降低生產與使用相關碳排放，更能實際捕捉並儲存比排放量更多二氧化碳，達成淨負碳足跡的建材。
tech_0191_carbon-negative-construction-m.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 資源效率高的建築方式，可作為碳匯。
tech_0191_carbon-negative-construction-m.technology_status_summary_en: Carbon-negative construction materials refer to building materials that not only reduce carbon emissions associated with their production and use but actually capture and store more carbon dioxide (CO2) than is emitted, resulting in a net negative carbon footprint.
tech_0191_carbon-negative-construction-m.description: Carbon-negative construction materials refer to building materials that not only reduce carbon emissions associated with their production and use but actually capture and store more carbon dioxide (CO2) than is emitted, resulting in a net negative carbon footprint.

initiatives.description: Prometheus materials creates carbon negative construction material by growing algae that is converted to biogenic limestion through biomineralization
Prometheus ProZero carbon negative material was selected for the New York Climate Exchange’s climate campus on Governors Island.

Agrocrete by indian company GreenJams is an innovative building material that stands out as the world's first verified carbon-negative bio-concrete, crafted from agricultural residues and industrial by-products. 6 buildings completed with Agrocrete by 2025.
Prototype of carbon negative building unviellied at the 2025 Architecture Biennale in Venice. The building uses biochar from organic matter to store carbon.

tech_0192_packaged-air-conditioners.technology_status_summary_zh: 利用蒸氣壓縮製冷與冷媒系統，將熱能自空間移除以提供冷卻，所有元件（蒸發器盤管、冷凝器與壓縮機）皆置於同一機箱內，通常置於室外。
tech_0192_packaged-air-conditioners.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 隨冷卻需求上升，部署潛力龐大，可與各類熱能需求（冷暖）發揮綜效，並受惠於技術外溢效應，效率通常低於分離式空調機。
tech_0192_packaged-air-conditioners.technology_status_summary_en: Uses vapour compression refrigeration and a refrigerant system to remove heat from a space and provide cooling. All components (evaporator coil, condenser, and compressor) are located in one cabinet, usually placed outside.
tech_0192_packaged-air-conditioners.market_dynamics_summary_en: Large potential for deployment, driven by rising cooling demand. Possibility to exploit synergies with various thermal needs (heating, cooling), and benefit from technology spillovers. Generally lower efficiencies compared with split air conditioners.
tech_0192_packaged-air-conditioners.description: Uses vapour compression refrigeration and a refrigerant system to remove heat from a space and provide cooling. All components (evaporator coil, condenser, and compressor) are located in one cabinet, usually placed outside.
tech_0192_packaged-air-conditioners.NZErationale: Large potential for deployment, driven by rising cooling demand. Possibility to exploit synergies with various thermal needs (heating, cooling), and benefit from technology spillovers. Generally lower efficiencies compared with split air conditioners.

initiatives.description: The Heat Pump Technology Collaboration Programme aims to accelerate the implementation of heat pumps and related heat pump technologies.
Clean Cooling Collaborative

tech_0193_split-air-conditioners.technology_status_summary_zh: 利用蒸氣壓縮製冷與冷媒系統，將熱能自空間移除以提供冷卻，元件分置於室外機箱（冷凝器與壓縮機）與室內機箱（蒸發器盤管）及送風機，透過風管系統輸送冷空氣。
tech_0193_split-air-conditioners.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 隨冷卻需求上升，部署潛力龐大，可與各類熱能需求（冷暖）發揮綜效，並受惠於技術外溢效應。
tech_0193_split-air-conditioners.technology_status_summary_en: Uses vapour compression refrigeration and a refrigerant system to remove heat from a space and provide cooling. Components are split between an outdoor cabinet (condenser and compressor), and indoor cabinet (evaporator coil) and an air handler, which sends the cool air through the duct system.
tech_0193_split-air-conditioners.market_dynamics_summary_en: Large potential for deployment, driven by rising cooling demand. Possibility to exploit synergies with various thermal needs (heating, cooling), and benefit from technology spillovers.
tech_0193_split-air-conditioners.description: Uses vapour compression refrigeration and a refrigerant system to remove heat from a space and provide cooling. Components are split between an outdoor cabinet (condenser and compressor), and indoor cabinet (evaporator coil) and an air handler, which sends the cool air through the duct system.
tech_0193_split-air-conditioners.NZErationale: Large potential for deployment, driven by rising cooling demand. Possibility to exploit synergies with various thermal needs (heating, cooling), and benefit from technology spillovers.

initiatives.description: The Heat Pump Technology Collaboration Programme aims to accelerate the implementation of heat pumps and related heat pump technologies.

tech_0194_variable-refrigerant-flow-heat.technology_status_summary_zh: 變頻冷媒流量（VRF）熱泵系統是一種先進的空調技術，可調節送至室內機的冷媒流量，此調節功能使系統能滿足建築不同區域精確的冷暖負載需求，提供個別化舒適控制與高能源效率。通常單一室外機可連接多台室內機，實現不同區域同時供冷供暖。
tech_0194_variable-refrigerant-flow-heat.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 隨冷卻需求上升，部署潛力龐大，可與各類熱能需求（冷暖）發揮綜效，並受惠於技術外溢效應，效率通常低於其他熱泵/空調機。
tech_0194_variable-refrigerant-flow-heat.technology_status_summary_en: A Variable Refrigerant Flow heat pump system is an advanced HVAC technology that varies the refrigerant flow rate to indoor units. This modulation allows the system to meet precise cooling or heating load requirements in different zones of a building, providing individualized comfort control and high energy efficiency. Typically, a single outdoor unit can connect to many indoor units, enabling simultaneous heating and cooling in different zones.
tech_0194_variable-refrigerant-flow-heat.market_dynamics_summary_en: Large potential for deployment, driven by rising cooling demand. Possibility to exploit synergies with various thermal needs (heating, cooling), and benefit from technology spillovers. Generally lower efficiency compared to other heat pumps/air conditioners.
tech_0194_variable-refrigerant-flow-heat.description: A Variable Refrigerant Flow heat pump system is an advanced HVAC technology that varies the refrigerant flow rate to indoor units. This modulation allows the system to meet precise cooling or heating load requirements in different zones of a building, providing individualized comfort control and high energy efficiency. Typically, a single outdoor unit can connect to many indoor units, enabling simultaneous heating and cooling in different zones.
tech_0194_variable-refrigerant-flow-heat.NZErationale: Large potential for deployment, driven by rising cooling demand. Possibility to exploit synergies with various thermal needs (heating, cooling), and benefit from technology spillovers. Generally lower efficiency compared to other heat pumps/air conditioners.

initiatives.description: In 2019 the worlds largest VRF project was completed, using 56000 indoor units and 5000 outdoor units. The VRF system is used to cool 12.5 million sqm of floor space in the Ain Al Fayda development in the United Arab Emirates.

tech_0195_exhaust-air-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_zh: 空氣源熱泵運用熱回收，方式有二：1.於製冷模式下，空調排出的空氣可回收用於提供其他能源服務，如熱水加熱。2.於製熱模式下，可透過進氣與排氣間的熱交換器回收餘熱。
tech_0195_exhaust-air-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 高性能係數（COP），可回收35-95%的冷卻廢熱。
tech_0195_exhaust-air-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_en:
Air-source heat pump using heat recovery either:
1. In cooling mode, as the exhaust air from air conditioners can be recycled and used to deliver other energy services, such as water heating.
2. In heating mode, as the exhaust heat can be recovered through a heat exchanger between incoming and exhaust air.
tech_0195_exhaust-air-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_en: High coefficient of performance (COP), heat recovery of 35-95% of waste heat from cooling.
tech_0195_exhaust-air-heat-pump.description:
Air-source heat pump using heat recovery either:
1. In cooling mode, as the exhaust air from air conditioners can be recycled and used to deliver other energy services, such as water heating.
2. In heating mode, as the exhaust heat can be recovered through a heat exchanger between incoming and exhaust air.
tech_0195_exhaust-air-heat-pump.NZErationale: High coefficient of performance (COP), heat recovery of 35-95% of waste heat from cooling.

tech_0196_heat-pump-water-heaters.technology_status_summary_zh: 將戶外空氣的熱能傳遞至家用熱水槽的熱泵。
tech_0196_heat-pump-water-heaters.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 隨能源法規日趨嚴格，部署潛力龐大，可與各類熱能需求（冷暖、熱水）發揮綜效，並受惠於技術外溢效應。
tech_0196_heat-pump-water-heaters.technology_status_summary_en: Heat pump transferring heat from the outside air to a domestic hot water tank.
tech_0196_heat-pump-water-heaters.market_dynamics_summary_en: Large potential for deployment, steered by more stringent energy codes. Possibility to exploit synergies with various thermal needs (heating, cooling, hot water), and benefit from technology spillovers.
tech_0196_heat-pump-water-heaters.description: Heat pump transferring heat from the outside air to a domestic hot water tank.
tech_0196_heat-pump-water-heaters.NZErationale: Large potential for deployment, steered by more stringent energy codes. Possibility to exploit synergies with various thermal needs (heating, cooling, hot water), and benefit from technology spillovers.

initiatives.description: The Heat Pump Technology Collaboration Programme aims to accelerate the implementation of heat pumps and related heat pump technologies.
Electrification of Heat Demonstration Project in the United Kingdom aims to show the feasibility of large scale roll-out of heat pumps.
A pilot project with Central Heat Pump Water Heaters in Seattle
Bonneville Power Administration: Small Scale Multifamily CO2 Heat Pump Water Heater Design & Pilot Study

tech_0197_high-temperature-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_zh: 熱匯溫度介於攝氏90度至160度的熱泵，可用於具特定供熱需求的部分商業建築。
tech_0197_high-temperature-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 適用範圍有限，因熱泵在冷熱能源來源溫差較小時效率較高。
tech_0197_high-temperature-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_en: Heat pump with heat sink temperatures in the range of 90 °C to 160 °C, which can be used in some commercial buildings with specific heating needs.
tech_0197_high-temperature-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_en: Limited applicability given that heat pumps are more efficient with reduced temperature difference between the cold and hot energy sources.
tech_0197_high-temperature-heat-pump.description: Heat pump with heat sink temperatures in the range of 90 °C to 160 °C, which can be used in some commercial buildings with specific heating needs.
tech_0197_high-temperature-heat-pump.NZErationale: Limited applicability given that heat pumps are more efficient with reduced temperature difference between the cold and hot energy sources.

initiatives.description: A High Temperature Heat Pumps (HTHP) Symposium is organised every few years.
The Heat Pump Technology Collaboration Programme aims to accelerate the implementation of heat pumps and related heat pump technologies.
The European Heat Pump Association represents the European heat pump sector.
Electrification of Heat Demonstration Project in the United Kingdom aims to show the feasibility of large scale roll-out of heat pumps.

tech_0198_integrated-heat-pump-with-stor.technology_name: Integrated heat pump with storage for heating and cooling
tech_0198_integrated-heat-pump-with-stor.technology_status_summary_zh: 整合式套裝系統，提供最佳平衡的冷暖與儲熱功能，並搭配特定控制策略。
tech_0198_integrated-heat-pump-with-stor.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 雖然熱泵與儲熱元件已達高效率水準，但這些元件更好的整合與控制，可望大幅提升系統效能。
tech_0198_integrated-heat-pump-with-stor.technology_status_summary_en: Integrated packages providing optimally balanced heating, cooling and storage, combined with a specific control strategy.
tech_0198_integrated-heat-pump-with-stor.market_dynamics_summary_en: While heat pump and storage components have reached high efficiency levels, better integration and control of these components may give a sizeable increase in system performance.
tech_0198_integrated-heat-pump-with-stor.description: Integrated packages providing optimally balanced heating, cooling and storage, combined with a specific control strategy.
tech_0198_integrated-heat-pump-with-stor.NZErationale: While heat pump and storage components have reached high efficiency levels, better integration and control of these components may give a sizeable increase in system performance.

initiatives.description: Annex 55, a project by the Heat Pump Technologies Technology Collaboration Programme, focusses on developing combined heat pump and storage packages.
Several examples are showcased within HPT Annex 52
BEST-storage system combines solar thermal collectors, heat pumps and ice storage.

tech_0199_air-to-air-heat-pumps.technology_status_summary_zh: 將熱能自較冷空間傳遞至較溫暖空間，透過蒸氣壓縮製冷與冷媒系統提供冷暖（以室外空氣或室內空氣作為熱源），通常比電阻式電暖器更有效率，但戶外氣溫低（低於攝氏5度）時效率開始顯著下降。
tech_0199_air-to-air-heat-pumps.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 隨冷卻需求上升，部署潛力龐大，可與各類熱能需求（冷暖）發揮綜效，並受惠於技術外溢效應。
tech_0199_air-to-air-heat-pumps.technology_status_summary_en: Transfer heat energy from a colder space to a warmer one, providing either heating or cooling (using either outdoor air or indoor air as a source of heat) thanks to vapour compression refrigeration and a refrigerant system. Typically more efficient than electrical resistance heaters, although efficiencies begin dropping significantly with low outside air temperature (below 5°C).
tech_0199_air-to-air-heat-pumps.market_dynamics_summary_en: Large potential for deployment, driven by rising cooling demand. Possibility to exploit synergies with various thermal needs (heating, cooling), and benefit from technology spillovers.
tech_0199_air-to-air-heat-pumps.description: Transfer heat energy from a colder space to a warmer one, providing either heating or cooling (using either outdoor air or indoor air as a source of heat) thanks to vapour compression refrigeration and a refrigerant system. Typically more efficient than electrical resistance heaters, although efficiencies begin dropping significantly with low outside air temperature (below 5°C).
tech_0199_air-to-air-heat-pumps.NZErationale: Large potential for deployment, driven by rising cooling demand. Possibility to exploit synergies with various thermal needs (heating, cooling), and benefit from technology spillovers.

initiatives.description: The REPowerEU plan by the European Commission in 2022 includes improving the deployment of heat pumps (for heating) and thereby adding 10 million in the next five years. Furthermore, the aim is to add 30 million by 2030.
The Heat Pump Technology Collaboration Programme aims to accelerate the implementation of heat pumps and related heat pump technologies.
Optimisation initiative: Portuguese researchers applying machine learning for fault detection

tech_0200_air-to-water-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_zh: 將戶外空氣熱能傳遞至水基系統的熱泵，可提供熱水或用於空間供暖。
tech_0200_air-to-water-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 隨冷卻需求上升，部署潛力龐大，可與各類熱能需求（冷暖、熱水）發揮綜效，並受惠於技術外溢效應。
tech_0200_air-to-water-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_en: Heat pump transferring heat from the outside air to a water-based system, to either provide hot water or to be used for space heating.
tech_0200_air-to-water-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_en: Large potential for deployment, driven by rising cooling demand. Possibility to exploit synergies with various thermal needs (heating, cooling, hot water), and benefit from technology spillovers.
tech_0200_air-to-water-heat-pump.description: Heat pump transferring heat from the outside air to a water-based system, to either provide hot water or to be used for space heating.
tech_0200_air-to-water-heat-pump.NZErationale: Large potential for deployment, driven by rising cooling demand. Possibility to exploit synergies with various thermal needs (heating, cooling, hot water), and benefit from technology spillovers.

tech_0201_evaporative-cooling-coupled-wi.technology_name: Evaporative cooling coupled with permeable membrane
tech_0201_evaporative-cooling-coupled-wi.technology_status_summary_zh: 膜與蒸發冷卻作為蒸氣壓縮技術的替代方案，可獨立控制乾球溫度與濕度，薄膜作為屏障將水氣與空氣分離。
tech_0201_evaporative-cooling-coupled-wi.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 獨立溫濕度控制，相較蒸氣壓縮循環效率更高，無需冷媒，機組緊湊。
tech_0201_evaporative-cooling-coupled-wi.technology_status_summary_en: Membrane and evaporative cooling as alternative to vapour compression technologies. Independent control of dry bulb temperature and humidity. The membrane acts as barrier to separate moisture from air.
tech_0201_evaporative-cooling-coupled-wi.market_dynamics_summary_en: Independent temperature and humidity control, higher efficiency compared to vapour compression cycles. No refrigerants. Compact units.
tech_0201_evaporative-cooling-coupled-wi.description: Membrane and evaporative cooling as alternative to vapour compression technologies. Independent control of dry bulb temperature and humidity. The membrane acts as barrier to separate moisture from air.
tech_0201_evaporative-cooling-coupled-wi.NZErationale: Independent temperature and humidity control, higher efficiency compared to vapour compression cycles. No refrigerants. Compact units.

initiatives.description: M2 Thermal Solutions LLC is a start-up based in the USA, and was a finalist in the Global Cooling Prize, that are developing a colling solution that uses a combination of evaporative cooling and membrane technologies to independently cool and remove moisture from room air. This technology requires no compressor or refrigerant.

Evercloak is developing a graphene-based membrane which allows water molecules to pass through while keeping out the other components of air and gas. The idea of this project is to scale up production for large area coatings, and develop an application that can use Evercloak’s water vapour selective coatings to improve HVAC coatings, so that air coming into buildings can be dehumidified while reducing the energy load by AC systems.
A Team of Harvard Researchers Develop a Prototype for a More Efficient and Eco-friendly Air Conditioner

tech_0202_liquid-or-solid-desiccant-evap.technology_name: Liquid or solid desiccant evaporative cooling system
tech_0202_liquid-or-solid-desiccant-evap.technology_name_zh: 液體或固體乾燥劑蒸發冷卻系統
tech_0202_liquid-or-solid-desiccant-evap.technology_status_summary_zh: 結合蒸發冷卻與乾燥劑冷卻，可獨立控制溫度與濕度。液體乾燥劑，或固體乾燥劑情況下的轉輪，因乾燥劑與環境間水蒸氣分壓差而吸收水氣，同時以熱能與電能運作，可搭配薄膜以避免乾燥劑污染風險。
tech_0202_liquid-or-solid-desiccant-evap.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 獨立溫濕度控制，相較最先進高效冷卻技術，預期可降低30-90%耗能（尖峰能耗降低80%），無需冷媒，部署僅限於供暖與熱水需求較低的地區（否則淨零排放住宅將需要可逆機組）。
tech_0202_liquid-or-solid-desiccant-evap.technology_status_summary_en: Combination of evaporative and desiccant cooling. Independent control of temperature and humidity. The liquid desiccant, or the rotary wheel in case of solid desiccant, absorbs water vapour due to the difference between the partial vapour pressure of the desiccant and the ambient. Operated by both thermal and electric energy. They can be coupled with membrane to avoid the risk of desiccant contamination.
tech_0202_liquid-or-solid-desiccant-evap.market_dynamics_summary_en: Independent temperature and humidity control. Expected to reduce consumption by 30-90%  (and 80% peak energy) compared to state-of-art most efficient cooling technologies. No refrigerants. Deployment is limited to places with low heating and hot water demand (otherwise a net-zero emissions household would need a reversible unit).
tech_0202_liquid-or-solid-desiccant-evap.description: Combination of evaporative and desiccant cooling. Independent control of temperature and humidity. The liquid desiccant, or the rotary wheel in case of solid desiccant, absorbs water vapour due to the difference between the partial vapour pressure of the desiccant and the ambient. Operated by both thermal and electric energy. They can be coupled with membrane to avoid the risk of desiccant contamination.
tech_0202_liquid-or-solid-desiccant-evap.NZErationale: Independent temperature and humidity control. Expected to reduce consumption by 30-90%  (and 80% peak energy) compared to state-of-art most efficient cooling technologies. No refrigerants. Deployment is limited to places with low heating and hot water demand (otherwise a net-zero emissions household would need a reversible unit).

initiatives.description: Freescoo is an Italian company which has developed a technology which uses low quality to cool, dehumidify, heat and ventilate buildings. The technology is still in development but trials are ongoing.
Blue Frontier launches high-efficiency cooling system after several successful demonstrators. Operations and production ramping up, raising capital and signing partnerships.
French company Dessica, traditionally focused solely on air dehumidification, also has units for cooling and dehumidification. Their technology is based on a solid desiccant.

tech_0203_evaporative-cooler.technology_status_summary_zh: 將顯熱轉化為水蒸氣焓以降低系統溫度，可為氣媒式或水媒式，並可為直接式或間接式。
tech_0203_evaporative-cooler.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 節能與成本節省，無需冷媒，部署僅限於供暖與熱水需求較低的地區（否則淨零排放住宅將需要可逆機組）。
tech_0203_evaporative-cooler.technology_status_summary_en: Converts sensible heat to enthalpy of vapour for reducing the system temperature. It can be air-mediated or water-mediated and direct or indirect.
tech_0203_evaporative-cooler.market_dynamics_summary_en: Energy and cost savings. No refrigerants. Deployment is limited to places with low heating and hot water demand (otherwise a net-zero emissions household would need a reversible unit).
tech_0203_evaporative-cooler.description: Converts sensible heat to enthalpy of vapour for reducing the system temperature. It can be air-mediated or water-mediated and direct or indirect.
tech_0203_evaporative-cooler.NZErationale: Energy and cost savings. No refrigerants. Deployment is limited to places with low heating and hot water demand (otherwise a net-zero emissions household would need a reversible unit).

initiatives.description: Evaporative market size was valued at 6.75 Billion USD in 2024.

tech_0204_barocaloric-cooling.technology_status_summary_zh: 固態冷卻技術，作為蒸氣壓縮技術的替代方案。在絕熱條件下施加外部場（壓力場）會使量熱材料溫度升高，對應體積變化；反之，絕熱降低外部場時，材料溫度會降至低於初始值。壓卡效應可與同一材料中其他量熱效應（多重量熱效應）結合。
tech_0204_barocaloric-cooling.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 許多替代方案對環境較不友善。壓卡固態冷媒可達到與氣態冷媒相同的熱性能，比其他固態材料高兩個數量級。雖然最佳磁卡材料僅能達到3度的溫度提升，但單獨的壓卡材料可達到40-50度。
tech_0204_barocaloric-cooling.technology_status_summary_en: Solid state cooling alternative to vapour compression technologies.  Applying an external field (pressure field) under adiabatic conditions leads to temperature increase of the caloric material which correspond to a change of volume. On the contrary, when decreasing adiabatically the external fields, the temperature of the material decreases to lower values compared to the initial one. The barocaloric effect is coupled with other calorific effects manifesting in the same material (multicaloric effect).
tech_0204_barocaloric-cooling.market_dynamics_summary_en: Many alternatives are less environmental friendly. Barocaloric solid refrigerants can achieve the same thermal performance as gaseous refrigerants. This is two orders of magnitude higher than any other solids. While best magnetocaloric materials only achieve a 3-degree temperature lift, barocaloric materials alone achieve 40-50 degrees.
tech_0204_barocaloric-cooling.description: Solid state cooling alternative to vapour compression technologies.  Applying an external field (pressure field) under adiabatic conditions leads to temperature increase of the caloric material which correspond to a change of volume. On the contrary, when decreasing adiabatically the external fields, the temperature of the material decreases to lower values compared to the initial one. The barocaloric effect is coupled with other calorific effects manifesting in the same material (multicaloric effect).
tech_0204_barocaloric-cooling.NZErationale: Many alternatives are less environmental friendly. Barocaloric solid refrigerants can achieve the same thermal performance as gaseous refrigerants. This is two orders of magnitude higher than any other solids. While best magnetocaloric materials only achieve a 3-degree temperature lift, barocaloric materials alone achieve 40-50 degrees.

initiatives.description: Barocal’s prototype matched the thermal performance of vapour compression systems (TRL6) in small-scale applications in 2025

In 2025 Barocal has been raising funds and growing the company. In 2026 they will start testing of the third generation of their barocaloric cooling solution, promising even better performance than last years tests.
UK startup Barocal unveiled a prototype in the United Kingdom that matched the thermal performance of vapour compression systems in small-scale applications

tech_0205_elastocaloric-cooling.technology_status_summary_zh: 固態冷卻技術，作為蒸氣壓縮技術的替代方案。在絕熱條件下施加外部場（機械應力）會使量熱材料溫度升高，對應壓力變化；反之，絕熱降低外部場時，材料溫度會降至低於初始值，此技術利用形狀記憶合金的特性從周圍環境吸收或釋放熱量。
tech_0205_elastocaloric-cooling.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 許多替代方案對環境較不友善，成本適中，能量密度高（超過100J/cm3），HVAC應用中預估性能係數（COP）為6。
tech_0205_elastocaloric-cooling.technology_status_summary_en: Solid state cooling alternative to vapour compression technologies. Applying an external field (mechanical stress) under adiabatic conditions leads to temperature increase of the caloric material which correspond to a change of pressure. On the contrary, when decreasing adiabatically the external fields, the temperature of the material decreases to lower values compared to the initial one. It exploits the properties of shape-memory alloys to absorb or release heat from its surroundings.
tech_0205_elastocaloric-cooling.market_dynamics_summary_en: Many alternatives are less environmental friendly, moderate costs and elevated energy density (over 100J/cm3), projected coefficient of performance (COP) of 6 in HVAC applications.
tech_0205_elastocaloric-cooling.description: Solid state cooling alternative to vapour compression technologies. Applying an external field (mechanical stress) under adiabatic conditions leads to temperature increase of the caloric material which correspond to a change of pressure. On the contrary, when decreasing adiabatically the external fields, the temperature of the material decreases to lower values compared to the initial one. It exploits the properties of shape-memory alloys to absorb or release heat from its surroundings.
tech_0205_elastocaloric-cooling.NZErationale: Many alternatives are less environmental friendly, moderate costs and elevated energy density (over 100J/cm3), projected coefficient of performance (COP) of 6 in HVAC applications.

initiatives.description: Exergyn, an Irish based start-up, has developed a solid-state shape memory alloy which can be used within HVAC equipment. They have raised $35M in 2021 to expand their technological presence.
Saarland University and the Center for Mechatronics and Automation Technology have developed a mini-prototype: a fridge cooling with artificial muscles made of nitinol, a nickel-titanium alloy
Study with "record-breaking cooling performance" by the researchers at the Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
Hong Kong University of Science and Technology develops first elastocaloric cooler on the kilowatt scale
Hong Kong University of Science and Technology discovers novel alloy material achieving higher temperature ranges and efficiency

tech_0206_electrocaloric-cooling.technology_status_summary_zh: 固態冷卻技術，作為蒸氣壓縮技術的替代方案。在絕熱條件下施加外部場（電場）會使量熱材料溫度升高，對應極化變化；反之，絕熱降低外部場時，材料溫度會降至低於初始值。
tech_0206_electrocaloric-cooling.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 許多替代方案對環境較不友善。相較磁卡技術，所需電場比磁場更容易提供，功率密度更高且更緊湊。雖然材料效率高且循環具熱力學可逆性，但此循環尚不適合供暖應用。
tech_0206_electrocaloric-cooling.technology_status_summary_en: Solid state cooling alternative to vapour compression technologies. Applying an external field (electric field) under adiabatic conditions leads to temperature increase of the caloric material which corresponds to a change of polarisation. Conversely, when decreasing adiabatically the external fields, the temperature of the material decreases to lower values compared to the initial one.
tech_0206_electrocaloric-cooling.market_dynamics_summary_en: Many alternatives are less environmental friendly. Compared to magnetocaloric technologies, the electric fields required can be supplied more easily compared with magnetic fields, with higher power densities and compactness. While material efficiency is high and the cycle is thermodynamically reversible, the cycle is not yet suitable for heating and cooling applications.
tech_0206_electrocaloric-cooling.description: Solid state cooling alternative to vapour compression technologies. Applying an external field (electric field) under adiabatic conditions leads to temperature increase of the caloric material which corresponds to a change of polarisation. Conversely, when decreasing adiabatically the external fields, the temperature of the material decreases to lower values compared to the initial one.
tech_0206_electrocaloric-cooling.NZErationale: Many alternatives are less environmental friendly. Compared to magnetocaloric technologies, the electric fields required can be supplied more easily compared with magnetic fields, with higher power densities and compactness. While material efficiency is high and the cycle is thermodynamically reversible, the cycle is not yet suitable for heating and cooling applications.

initiatives.description: Researchers from Luxembourg Institute of Science and Technology and Murata Manufacturing Co, Kyoto, Japan have demonstrated anoter prototype of electricaloric device.

In the ElKaWe lighthouse project, six Fraunhofer Institutes are working on the development of electrocaloric heat pumps for heating and cooling. The project started in 2019 and is expected to be completed in 2023. Their aim is to provide experimental proof that electrocaloric materials and systems are an alternative to existing compressor heat pumps.

tech_0207_magnetocaloric-cooling.technology_status_summary_zh: 固態冷卻技術，作為蒸氣壓縮技術的替代方案。在絕熱條件下施加外部場（磁場）會使量熱材料溫度升高，對應磁化變化；反之，絕熱降低外部場時，材料溫度會降至低於初始值，此技術利用鐵磁材料的特性從周圍環境吸收或釋放熱量。
tech_0207_magnetocaloric-cooling.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 估計效率比現有最佳冷卻技術高25%。磁卡是最成熟的固態技術，但永久磁鐵應用仍有其限制。
tech_0207_magnetocaloric-cooling.technology_status_summary_en: Solid state cooling alternative to vapour compression technologies. Applying an external field (magnetic fields) under adiabatic conditions leads to temperature increase of the caloric material which correspond to a change of magnetisation. On the contrary, when decreasing adiabatically the external fields, the temperature of the material decreases to lower values compared to the initial one. It exploits the properties of ferromagnetic materials to absorb or release heat from its surroundings.
