tech_0207_magnetocaloric-cooling.market_dynamics_summary_en: Estimated efficiency 25% higher compared to best available cooling technologies. Magnetocaloric is the most mature solid state technology, however, there are still limitations in permanent magnet applications.
tech_0207_magnetocaloric-cooling.description: Solid state cooling alternative to vapour compression technologies. Applying an external field (magnetic fields) under adiabatic conditions leads to temperature increase of the caloric material which correspond to a change of magnetisation. On the contrary, when decreasing adiabatically the external fields, the temperature of the material decreases to lower values compared to the initial one. It exploits the properties of ferromagnetic materials to absorb or release heat from its surroundings.
tech_0207_magnetocaloric-cooling.NZErationale: Estimated efficiency 25% higher compared to best available cooling technologies. Magnetocaloric is the most mature solid state technology, however, there are still limitations in permanent magnet applications.

initiatives.description: Magnoric developed its first prototype in 2021 and is also introducing wasted heat conversion with magnetic transition.

Camfridge was founded in 2005 as a spin-out from the University of Cambridge and is working with many companies in the packaged cooling-appliance market to integrate magnetic cooling into domestic products. They have demonstrated a 40% reduction in energy for small appliances.
Magnotherm launches first commercially available refrigerators that use magnetocaloric cooling
Magnotherm together with start-up company The Colony succesfully runs a feasibility project using magnetocaloric cooling for space cooling.

tech_0208_thermoelectric-peltier-effect-.technology_status_summary_zh: 熱電（帕爾帖效應）冷卻是一種利用電力傳遞熱量的固態方法，在不同導體間施加直流電會使一面吸熱（冷卻）、另一面放熱（加熱）。模組通常由夾在導電板之間的半導體顆粒陣列構成，熱面連接散熱器。效率明顯低於蒸氣壓縮系統。
tech_0208_thermoelectric-peltier-effect-.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 熱電冷卻廣泛應用於電子產品冷卻，但對建築冷卻的相關性較低。
tech_0208_thermoelectric-peltier-effect-.technology_status_summary_en: Thermoelectric (Peltier effect) cooling is a solid-state method for transferring heat using electricity, wherein applying a direct current across dissimilar conductors results in heat being absorbed on one face (cooling) and released on the other (heating). The module is usually constructed from arrays of semiconductor pellets sandwiched between conductive plates, and is oriented so that the hot side is attached to a heat sink. Efficiency is notably lower than vapor-compression systems and the technology is generally unsuitable for whole-building air conditioning.​
tech_0208_thermoelectric-peltier-effect-.market_dynamics_summary_en: Thermoelectric cooling is widely applied in cooling of electronics, but is less relevant for cooling of buildings.
tech_0208_thermoelectric-peltier-effect-.description: Thermoelectric (Peltier effect) cooling is a solid-state method for transferring heat using electricity, wherein applying a direct current across dissimilar conductors results in heat being absorbed on one face (cooling) and released on the other (heating). The module is usually constructed from arrays of semiconductor pellets sandwiched between conductive plates, and is oriented so that the hot side is attached to a heat sink. Efficiency is notably lower than vapor-compression systems and the technology is generally unsuitable for whole-building air conditioning.​
tech_0208_thermoelectric-peltier-effect-.NZErationale: Thermoelectric cooling is widely applied in cooling of electronics, but is less relevant for cooling of buildings.

initiatives.description: French HVAC company Halton together with Phononic, a company specializing in solid state cooling released their collaborative product “TTAP” (Terminal Treatment of Air with Pelter).

tech_0209_water-source-heat-pump-using-w.technology_name: Water-source heat pump using waste water
tech_0209_water-source-heat-pump-using-w.technology_status_summary_zh: 利用廢水（常稱為污水熱回收）的水源熱泵，是永續建築冷暖系統的技術，透過專用熱交換器從市政或建築廢水中萃取低品位熱能，再以熱泵將此能量提升至可用溫度。
tech_0209_water-source-heat-pump-using-w.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 高性能係數（COP），並具資源效率地利用廢熱。
tech_0209_water-source-heat-pump-using-w.technology_status_summary_en: Water-source heat pumps using waste water—often called sewage heat recovery—are a technology for sustainable building heating and cooling systems. They extract low-grade thermal energy from municipal or building wastewater using specialized heat exchangers and elevate this energy to usable temperatures with heat pumps.
tech_0209_water-source-heat-pump-using-w.market_dynamics_summary_en: High coefficient of performance (COP) combined with resource efficient use of waste heat.
tech_0209_water-source-heat-pump-using-w.description: Water-source heat pumps using waste water—often called sewage heat recovery—are a technology for sustainable building heating and cooling systems. They extract low-grade thermal energy from municipal or building wastewater using specialized heat exchangers and elevate this energy to usable temperatures with heat pumps.
tech_0209_water-source-heat-pump-using-w.NZErationale: High coefficient of performance (COP) combined with resource efficient use of waste heat.

initiatives.description: 60MW of sewage-source  heat pumps is being installed in Hamburg, operations begin in 2026

tech_0210_water-to-water-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_zh: 水對水熱泵是一種高效冷暖系統，以水同時作為熱源與熱匯，非常適合建築及區域級應用中的水力配送系統。
tech_0210_water-to-water-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 相對空氣對空氣熱泵性能極高，尤其在冬季尖峰供暖需求可能構成問題的極寒氣候地區。
tech_0210_water-to-water-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_en: A water-to-water heat pump is a highly efficient heating and cooling system that uses water as both the heat source and heat sink, making it ideal for hydronic distribution systems in buildings and district-level applications.
tech_0210_water-to-water-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_en: Very high performance relative to air-to-air heat pumps, especially in very cold climates where peak heating demand during the winter season can be an issue.
tech_0210_water-to-water-heat-pump.description: A water-to-water heat pump is a highly efficient heating and cooling system that uses water as both the heat source and heat sink, making it ideal for hydronic distribution systems in buildings and district-level applications.
tech_0210_water-to-water-heat-pump.NZErationale: Very high performance relative to air-to-air heat pumps, especially in very cold climates where peak heating demand during the winter season can be an issue.

initiatives.description: A 165 MW Water-to-water heat pump is under construction in Mannheim, Germany. The heat pump uses the river water from the Rhine as its heat source and supplies heat to the district heating network.

tech_0211_booster-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_zh: 為連接區域供熱系統的建築提供熱水的熱泵，可讓區域供熱網絡以較低溫度運作，區域供熱水作為增壓熱泵的熱源。
tech_0211_booster-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 增壓熱泵讓區域供熱網絡得以在較低溫度下運作，相較僅依賴中央熱泵的網絡可減少熱損失，並提升中央熱泵的性能係數。
tech_0211_booster-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_en: Heat pumps to supply hot water in buildings connected to district heating systems, allowing for lower temperatures in the district heating network. District heat water is used as heat source for the heat pump boosters.
tech_0211_booster-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_en: Booster heat pumps enable district heating networks to operate at lower temperatures and reduce heat losses compared to networks based on central heat pumps only, improving the coefficient of performance of the central heat pumps.
tech_0211_booster-heat-pump.description: Heat pumps to supply hot water in buildings connected to district heating systems, allowing for lower temperatures in the district heating network. District heat water is used as heat source for the heat pump boosters.
tech_0211_booster-heat-pump.NZErationale: Booster heat pumps enable district heating networks to operate at lower temperatures and reduce heat losses compared to networks based on central heat pumps only, improving the coefficient of performance of the central heat pumps.

initiatives.description: FLEXYNETS was an EU funded Horizon 2020 project which aimed to develop, demonstrate, and deploy a new generation of intelligent district heating and cooling networks that reduce energy transportation losses by working at 'neutral' temperature levels (15-20 degrees C).
A study by the University of Ljubljana on HP booster substituting vapor compression technologies. A simulation of the system done by a small-scale experimental DH simulator with upscaling potential.

tech_0212_inclined-or-deep-horizontal-we.technology_name: Inclined or deep horizontal wells heat pump
tech_0212_inclined-or-deep-horizontal-we.technology_status_summary_zh: 封閉星形地熱能傾斜交換器（垂直、斜向或深水平），通常深達數百公尺，可大幅減少地熱供暖的空間占用面積。
tech_0212_inclined-or-deep-horizontal-we.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 性能與標準地源熱泵相似（極高），但可完全規模化並適用於多種建築類型，包括都市環境中的改造應用，也適用於輕工業。
tech_0212_inclined-or-deep-horizontal-we.technology_status_summary_en: Closed star-shaped geo-energy inclined exchangers (vertical, deviated or deep horizontal), typically going several hundred metres deep and allowing a drastic reduction of the space footprint of geothermal heating.
tech_0212_inclined-or-deep-horizontal-we.market_dynamics_summary_en:
Similar (very high) performance to a standard ground-source heat pump, but fully scalable and applicable to many building types, including for retrofit applications in urban environments.

Applicable for light industry.
tech_0212_inclined-or-deep-horizontal-we.description: Closed star-shaped geo-energy inclined exchangers (vertical, deviated or deep horizontal), typically going several hundred metres deep and allowing a drastic reduction of the space footprint of geothermal heating.
tech_0212_inclined-or-deep-horizontal-we.NZErationale:
Similar (very high) performance to a standard ground-source heat pump, but fully scalable and applicable to many building types, including for retrofit applications in urban environments.

Applicable for light industry.

initiatives.description: Celsius Energy have a technology which is a closed, pyramid-shaped geothermal energy exchanger equipped with U-shaped probes, typically 200 meters deep or less, in which a heat transfer fluid circulates. This innovative structure drastically reduces the surface footprint while optimizing the thermal exploitation of the subsurface. The solution is therefore suitable for both new buildings and renovations, even in dense urban areas.
Celsius Energy Deploys Its Geoenergy Solution to Heat and Cool Giffard’s New Production Site in France

After a successful demonstration of Eavor-Loop technology in 2018, Eavor Erdwärme Geretsried GmbH, a sister company of Canadian Eavor Technologies, signed a contract to supply 81 200 MWh/yr of geothermal heat to a district heating network currently under construction. Power generation from the first heat exchanger is set for 2025 and the entire project is scheduled to be fully operational by 2027. In a recent update, the company reported that drilling has reached a depth of 7 000 metres, which enables it to access higher temperatures and improves the efficiency of the geothermal system.

tech_0213_shallow-ground-source-heat-pum.technology_status_summary_zh: 藉由埋設於地下的地熱交換器，將熱能傳遞至或取自地下以提供冷暖，相較空氣源熱泵更節能，尤其在冬季，因為地下溫度不像空氣或水等其他熱源那樣大幅下降。
tech_0213_shallow-ground-source-heat-pum.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 相對空氣對空氣熱泵性能極高，尤其在冬季尖峰供暖需求可能構成問題的極寒氣候地區。
tech_0213_shallow-ground-source-heat-pum.technology_status_summary_en: Heat pump transferring heat to or from the ground to provide cooling or heating, thanks to a ground heat exchanger buried in the ground. More energy-efficient than air-source heat pumps, especially in winter, as the underground temperature does not drop as much as other heat sources like the air or water.
tech_0213_shallow-ground-source-heat-pum.market_dynamics_summary_en: Very high performance relative to air-to-air heat pumps, especially in very cold climates where peak heating demand during the winter season can be an issue.
tech_0213_shallow-ground-source-heat-pum.description: Heat pump transferring heat to or from the ground to provide cooling or heating, thanks to a ground heat exchanger buried in the ground. More energy-efficient than air-source heat pumps, especially in winter, as the underground temperature does not drop as much as other heat sources like the air or water.
tech_0213_shallow-ground-source-heat-pum.NZErationale: Very high performance relative to air-to-air heat pumps, especially in very cold climates where peak heating demand during the winter season can be an issue.

initiatives.description: Large scale field trials in the UK, Germany, Switzerland, Netherlands and Sweden that have helped optimise design and operation
Swiss company Enerdrape has developed a solution that makes it possible to use underground spaces (such as parking garages) as a heat source for geothermal heat pumps.

tech_0214_natural-hydrocarbon-refrigeran.technology_status_summary_zh: 使用天然冷媒（如二氧化碳、丙烷氣體或氨）的熱泵，其全球暖化潛勢可能比R134a或R410a等傳統冷媒低1000倍以上。對於二氧化碳熱泵熱水器，冷媒以跨臨界循環運作（即行為類似氣體但密度如液體），可提升能源性能。
tech_0214_natural-hydrocarbon-refrigeran.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 許多熱泵使用氟化氣體作為冷媒，若洩漏會有高全球暖化潛勢及其他環境衝擊，以丙烷取代氟化氣體可大幅降低對氣候與環境的影響。
tech_0214_natural-hydrocarbon-refrigeran.technology_status_summary_en:
Heat pump  using a natural refrigerant, such as CO2, propane gas or ammonia (whose global warming potential can be more than 1000 times lower than conventional refrigerants such as R134a or R410a). 
For heat pump CO2 water heaters, the refrigerant operates in a transcritical cycle (i.e. behaving like a gas but with the density of a liquid), which enhances energy performance.
tech_0214_natural-hydrocarbon-refrigeran.market_dynamics_summary_en: Many heat pumps use F-gases as refrigerants, which high GWP and other environmental impact if leaked. Replacing F-gases with propane reduces impact on climante and environment considerably
tech_0214_natural-hydrocarbon-refrigeran.description:
Heat pump  using a natural refrigerant, such as CO2, propane gas or ammonia (whose global warming potential can be more than 1000 times lower than conventional refrigerants such as R134a or R410a). 
For heat pump CO2 water heaters, the refrigerant operates in a transcritical cycle (i.e. behaving like a gas but with the density of a liquid), which enhances energy performance.
tech_0214_natural-hydrocarbon-refrigeran.NZErationale: Many heat pumps use F-gases as refrigerants, which high GWP and other environmental impact if leaked. Replacing F-gases with propane reduces impact on climante and environment considerably

initiatives.description: Achieved an efficiency record in the Fraunhofer ISE prototypes for brine heat pumps: a heating output of 12.8kW was achieved with just 124 grams of propane.

“LC R290” project: findings of the previous L!%) project expanded with storage and source concepts suitable for multi-apartment homes, thus providing a solution for floor heating systems as well as to transfer refrigerant reduction to larger capacities.
Several companies now offer heat pumps that use R290 (Propane) as refrigerant
In 2024, a sewage water treatment plant using R290 heat pumps was rebuilt in Australian ski resort
Danish district heating provider Solrød Fjernvarme installed the CO2 heat pump with a 1.2MW capacity
United States Department of Energy supports a project on a Commercial CO2 Electric Heat Pump Water Heater involving Oak Ridge National Laboratory
Japan EcoCute
United States Department of Energy supports a project on a Residential CO2 Heat Pump Water Heater involving Oak Ridge National Laboratory
https://heatpumpingtechnologies.org/annex46/refrigerants-for-heat-pump-water-heaters/

tech_0215_membrane-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_zh: 提供冷卻與除濕（或加濕與加熱），薄膜熱泵具有多層透膜與一台真空幫浦的特徵，可分別控制顯熱與潛熱。
tech_0215_membrane-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 已驗證能源效率比達到蒸氣壓縮系統市場平均值的兩倍，屬低壓系統，以水作為工作流體。
tech_0215_membrane-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_en: Providing cooling and dehumidification (or humidification and heating), membrane heat pumps are characterised by several permeable membranes and a vacuum pump. Separate control of sensible and latent heat.
tech_0215_membrane-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_en: Demonstrated energy efficiency ratio twice market average for vapour compression systems, low pressure system, water as working fluid.
tech_0215_membrane-heat-pump.description: Providing cooling and dehumidification (or humidification and heating), membrane heat pumps are characterised by several permeable membranes and a vacuum pump. Separate control of sensible and latent heat.
tech_0215_membrane-heat-pump.NZErationale: Demonstrated energy efficiency ratio twice market average for vapour compression systems, low pressure system, water as working fluid.

tech_0216_metal-hydride-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_zh: 非機械式熱泵，基於金屬氫化物與氫氣作為工作流體的吸附與脫附機制。
tech_0216_metal-hydride-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 儘管在2050淨零排放情境中部署比例相對較低，氫能可作為連接100%氫能網絡的建築之解決方案。
tech_0216_metal-hydride-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_en: Non-mechanical heat pump, based on adsorption and desorption mechanisms using metal hydrides and hydrogen as a working fluid.
tech_0216_metal-hydride-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_en: Despite a relatively low deployment in the Net Zero Emissions by 2050 Scenario, hydrogen can be a solution for buildings connected to a 100% hydrogen network.
tech_0216_metal-hydride-heat-pump.description: Non-mechanical heat pump, based on adsorption and desorption mechanisms using metal hydrides and hydrogen as a working fluid.
tech_0216_metal-hydride-heat-pump.NZErationale: Despite a relatively low deployment in the Net Zero Emissions by 2050 Scenario, hydrogen can be a solution for buildings connected to a 100% hydrogen network.

initiatives.description: A project supported by the U.S. Department of Energy is advancing a hydrogen metal hybrid heat pump. The project involves Xergy Inc., University of Delaware, Haier Group, NREL and ORNL.
Dutch company Cooll demonstrates world’s first hydrogen-powered heat pump for home heating

tech_0217_hybrid-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_zh: 電熱泵結合電阻式電暖器或燃氣冷凝鍋爐作為備援系統。
tech_0217_hybrid-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在極端天氣條件下使用其他燃料，可降低尖峰電力需求，混合式解決方案可作為邁向供暖全面電氣化的重要墊腳石。
tech_0217_hybrid-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_en: Combined electric heat pump with an electrical resistance heater or a gas condensing boiler as back-up systems.
tech_0217_hybrid-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_en:
The use of another fuel under extreme weather conditions allows for a reduction of peak electricity demand.
A hybrid solution can act as an important stepping stone towards full electrification of heating.
tech_0217_hybrid-heat-pump.description: Combined electric heat pump with an electrical resistance heater or a gas condensing boiler as back-up systems.
tech_0217_hybrid-heat-pump.NZErationale:
The use of another fuel under extreme weather conditions allows for a reduction of peak electricity demand.
A hybrid solution can act as an important stepping stone towards full electrification of heating.

tech_0218_thermo-acoustic-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_zh: 熱聲熱泵利用聲壓波散發冷暖效果，通常具備堆疊器、共振器與熱交換器。近期範例包括Equium熱泵（核心採用專利聲音發生器取代壓縮機）與BlueHeart Energy（採用兩個活塞在充滿50巴氦氣的密閉壓力容器中以100赫茲頻率振盪）。熱聲熱泵據稱可達到更高或更低的溫度範圍。
tech_0218_thermo-acoustic-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 熱聲熱泵是體積明顯較小的機組，具備優異的調節能力與溫度靈活性，且無需冷媒。
tech_0218_thermo-acoustic-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_en: Thermoacoustic heat pumps work by using an acoustic pressure wave to disburse heating or cooling effects, and generally feature a stack, resonator and heat exchangers. Two recent examples are the Equium heat pump, which rather than a compressor uses a patented sound generator at its core, and BlueHeart Energy, which works with two pistons that oscillate at a frequency of 100 Hz in a closed pressure vessel filled with 50 bar helium. Thermoacoustic heat pumps can reportedly reach higher or lower temperatures than conventional heat pumps, and do not require refrigerants.
tech_0218_thermo-acoustic-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_en: The thermoacoustic heat pump is a significantly smaller unit with excellent modulating capability and temperature flexibility, and does not require refrigerants.
tech_0218_thermo-acoustic-heat-pump.description: Thermoacoustic heat pumps work by using an acoustic pressure wave to disburse heating or cooling effects, and generally feature a stack, resonator and heat exchangers. Two recent examples are the Equium heat pump, which rather than a compressor uses a patented sound generator at its core, and BlueHeart Energy, which works with two pistons that oscillate at a frequency of 100 Hz in a closed pressure vessel filled with 50 bar helium. Thermoacoustic heat pumps can reportedly reach higher or lower temperatures than conventional heat pumps, and do not require refrigerants.
tech_0218_thermo-acoustic-heat-pump.NZErationale: The thermoacoustic heat pump is a significantly smaller unit with excellent modulating capability and temperature flexibility, and does not require refrigerants.

initiatives.description: Equium have developed the core of a thermoacoustic heat pump which can produce 3 to 4 kW of heat for every kW of power drawn into the system. They are partnered with ARKTEOS and potentially a larger company to help with scaling, and to go to market in 2024.
BlueHeart Energy has its first market model prototype operational and fully tested
Copeland, the European Innovation Council Fund and Blue Heart Founders invest in Blue Heart Energy

tech_0219_pellet-burning-stove-and-boile.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 生質能是一種低碳資源，可有效用於生質能爐具與鍋爐的供暖，在有永續供應（並考量與其他工業、發電及建築應用的競爭）時使用。
tech_0219_pellet-burning-stove-and-boile.technology_status_summary_en: Central or individual heating system providing heat and hot water for multiple or individual rooms, automatically (i.e. independently from the loading) and generally using wood pellets, wood chips, chopped logs, cereal plants, or a combination thereof.

tech_0224_fuel-cell-micro-chp-for-buildi.technology_status_summary_zh: 將氫能轉化為熱與電的電化學裝置。較成熟的高分子電解質膜燃料電池運作溫度可達攝氏80度，較不成熟的固態氧化物燃料電池則可達攝氏600至850度，尖峰熱需求時可能需要備援選項。

May require back-up options for peak heat demand.

tech_0228_absorption-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 效率低於電熱泵，但高於傳統燃氣鍋爐；可以沼氣為燃料，並可整合太陽能、地熱或其他熱源。

Based on absorption (with a liquid absorption medium) and evaporation of a refrigerant.

tech_0230_vuilleumier-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 估計供暖性能係數（COP）為1.6，具潛力使用氫氣運作，以氦氣作為工作流體。
tech_0230_vuilleumier-heat-pump.technology_status_summary_en: Thermally driven machine that cyclically compresses and expands a gas between different volumes. It includes both a heat engine and a heat pump.
tech_0230_vuilleumier-heat-pump.market_dynamics_summary_en: Coefficient of performance (COP) estimated for heating as 1.6, can potentially work with hydrogen. Helium is used as working fluid.

initiatives.description: Thermolift is an American based company which is providing a commercially available thermally driven heat pump capable of delivering capacity in cold climates.

tech_0231_rail-to-grid-battery-energy-st.technology_name_zh: 軌道對電網電池儲能系統
tech_0231_rail-to-grid-battery-energy-st.technology_status_summary_zh: 由歐盟資助的E-LOBSTER專案（透過整合儲能與電力電子技術平衡電力損耗，強化鐵路與配電網絡間的協同效益）開發的創新軌道對電網（R+G）管理系統，旨在提供鐵路、電網、儲能系統與電動車及充電站間即時能源流管理的平台。
tech_0231_rail-to-grid-battery-energy-st.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 開發電動車、鐵路與電網等不同應用間的互聯系統，對達成淨零排放至關重要，E-Lobster所研究的技術層面（如效率提升、列車再生煞車、能源回收與向電網及輔助設備配送）具高度相關性。
tech_0231_rail-to-grid-battery-energy-st.technology_status_summary_en: Development of an innovative Railway to Grid (R+G) management system by project E-LOBSTER (Electric Losses Balancing through integrated Storage and power Electronics towards increased synergy between Railways and electricity distribution networks) funded by the EU. Aims to provide a platform for real-time energy flow management between rail, grid and energy storage system as well as electric vehicles (EVs) and charging stations. The R+G management system operates by taking into account the mutual benefit of transport and distribution networks to reduce distribution losses and energy recovery through train regenerative braking. In addition to R+G, two other technologies are supporting E_LOBSTER: Smart Soft Open Point (sSOP) and Battery Energy Storage System (BESS). sSOP are power electronics placed at open points on energy distribution networks to provide power control. Distribution losses and regenerative breaking energy will then be transferred to the local station's PV roof power generation system, and can from there be delivered to the grid, providing services such as local EV management or other ancillary services (e.g. voltage regulation, or storage capacity required, or power for train traction).
tech_0231_rail-to-grid-battery-energy-st.market_dynamics_summary_en: The development of an interconnected system between different applications such as electric vehicles, rail and grid is important for reaching net zero. As such, the technological aspects being studied by E-Lobster, such as efficiency improvement, train regenerative braking, energy recovery and distribution to grid and auxiliaries are highly relevant. If these innovations are scaled up, the impacts for reaching net zero could be significant.
tech_0231_rail-to-grid-battery-energy-st.description: Development of an innovative Railway to Grid (R+G) management system by project E-LOBSTER (Electric Losses Balancing through integrated Storage and power Electronics towards increased synergy between Railways and electricity distribution networks) funded by the EU. Aims to provide a platform for real-time energy flow management between rail, grid and energy storage system as well as electric vehicles (EVs) and charging stations. The R+G management system operates by taking into account the mutual benefit of transport and distribution networks to reduce distribution losses and energy recovery through train regenerative braking. In addition to R+G, two other technologies are supporting E_LOBSTER: Smart Soft Open Point (sSOP) and Battery Energy Storage System (BESS). sSOP are power electronics placed at open points on energy distribution networks to provide power control. Distribution losses and regenerative breaking energy will then be transferred to the local station's PV roof power generation system, and can from there be delivered to the grid, providing services such as local EV management or other ancillary services (e.g. voltage regulation, or storage capacity required, or power for train traction).
tech_0231_rail-to-grid-battery-energy-st.NZErationale: The development of an interconnected system between different applications such as electric vehicles, rail and grid is important for reaching net zero. As such, the technological aspects being studied by E-Lobster, such as efficiency improvement, train regenerative braking, energy recovery and distribution to grid and auxiliaries are highly relevant. If these innovations are scaled up, the impacts for reaching net zero could be significant.

initiatives.description: A testing tool was implemented on line 9 in Madrid, Spain. It has been validated as it successfully identified the losses and energy consumption in power distribution and railway electrification network.

The technological innovations in the E-Lobster project have been demonstrated and validated at the Smart Energy Laboratory, University of Newcastle. As the building provides a connection to the physical low voltage grid, the battery storage system ans sSOP have been tested using emulated rail network behaviours from real-time data collected in Madrid.

tech_0232_battery-electric-train.technology_status_summary_zh: 在未電氣化的軌道上，「純」電池電動列車（車上無內燃機）將是實現零污染排放與低二氧化碳運行的解決方案（二氧化碳排放取決於發電的碳強度）。因其續航里程有限，此技術可能主要用於市郊與城際（即短途）應用。
tech_0232_battery-electric-train.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 為未配備低碳燃料基礎設施的非電氣化軌道短途路線提供解決方案。
tech_0232_battery-electric-train.technology_status_summary_en:
On non-electrified tracks, ''pure'' battery electric trains (no ICE on-board) will be a solution for zero pollutant emission and low CO2 operations (with CO2 emissions depending on the carbon intensity of electricity generation). 
Due to their limited range, this technology will likely be dedicated to suburban and intercity (i.e. short route) applications.
tech_0232_battery-electric-train.market_dynamics_summary_en: Offers a solution for short-route lines on non-electrified tracks that are not equipped with low-CO2-fuel infrastructure.
tech_0232_battery-electric-train.description:
On non-electrified tracks, ''pure'' battery electric trains (no ICE on-board) will be a solution for zero pollutant emission and low CO2 operations (with CO2 emissions depending on the carbon intensity of electricity generation). 
Due to their limited range, this technology will likely be dedicated to suburban and intercity (i.e. short route) applications.
tech_0232_battery-electric-train.NZErationale: Offers a solution for short-route lines on non-electrified tracks that are not equipped with low-CO2-fuel infrastructure.

initiatives.description: In 2021, Alstom held a demonstration journey of its battery-power train. This train will begin operations in Baden-Württemberg and Bavaria in December 2021.

Stadler partnered with Utah State University and ASPIRE Engineering Research Center to develop and test a fully battery electric train in the USA. The train will be the FLIRT Akku which has been sold 100+ times to date. This train type replaced diesel fleets in some places in Germany ( Schleswig-Holstein....). The aim is to redesign this train to meet the specific needs of the US market (testing of new systems, components, software).

World Premiere: Bombardier Transportation Presents a New Battery-Operated Train (September 2018). First generation train offers a range of 40 km. Next generation already being prepared with a 100 km range capability

Denmark has launched its first battery-electric train from Siemens Mobility, marking a major step toward greener transportation in regional rail services across the country. Siemens designed Mireo Plus B to carry 282 passengers, including 127 seated, while reaching a top speed of 140 km/h. Its battery range of 120 km makes it ideal for non-electrified routes.

SNCF Voyageurs and Alstom present the first of five battery-powered trains ordered by the French regions. A total of five dual-mode trainsets are to be modified by replacing their diesel engines with batteries, in order to become 100% electric. This large-scale project is a first of its kind in Europe.

Croatia has introduced its first battery-powered passenger train, built by KONČAR Electric Vehicles. The train entered service monday on the Virovitica–Bjelovar route. The EUR 17.1 million project is co-financed by the EU Recovery and Resilience Plan. The new battery multiple unit (BMU) is designed for 100–200 km per charge, with tests showing more than 200 km of continuous operation. It runs at up to 120 km/h and accommodates 113 seated and 114 standing passengers.

tech_0233_gas-hybrid-train-internal-comb.technology_name: Gas hybrid train (internal combustion engine and battery)
tech_0233_gas-hybrid-train-internal-comb.technology_name_zh: 燃氣混合動力列車（內燃機與電池）
tech_0233_gas-hybrid-train-internal-comb.technology_status_summary_zh: 當有架空電纜可用時，可從中取電並儲存於大容量電池中；其他情況下，動力可由電池或燃氣引擎提供。電池也能在列車煞車時儲存回收能量，降低整體能耗。若要使此技術實現淨排放減少，燃氣須來自再生能源。
tech_0233_gas-hybrid-train-internal-comb.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 若未來能以低成本、豐富的方式生產合成甲烷（由低碳電力電解並搭配碳源），此技術將成為鐵路運輸的解決方案。此技術的市場僅限於部分電氣化或非電氣化軌道上運行的列車，且市占率將隨時間下降。
tech_0233_gas-hybrid-train-internal-comb.technology_status_summary_en: When catenary lines are available, energy is drawn from them and then stored in high capacity batteries. In other cases, the power can be provided either by the batteries or by gas engine(s). Batteries also store recovered energy when the train is braking, thus reducing overall energy consumption. For this technology to deliver net emissions reductions, the gas needs to be produced from renewable sources.
tech_0233_gas-hybrid-train-internal-comb.market_dynamics_summary_en:
This technology would be a solution for rail transport in the case of cost-effective, abundant production of synthetic methane (from electrolysis from low-carbon electricity with a carbon-source) in the future.
This technology has a market limited to trains running on partially electrified or non-electrified tracks, with a decreasing share over time. Today non-electrified rail lines make up, for example, almost all interregional lines in North and South America, 67% of conventional rail lines in Africa, 15% of conventional rail lines in India, and 38% of Europe's conventional rail lines.
tech_0233_gas-hybrid-train-internal-comb.description: When catenary lines are available, energy is drawn from them and then stored in high capacity batteries. In other cases, the power can be provided either by the batteries or by gas engine(s). Batteries also store recovered energy when the train is braking, thus reducing overall energy consumption. For this technology to deliver net emissions reductions, the gas needs to be produced from renewable sources.

initiatives.description: In September 2022, Landesnahverkehrsgesellschaft Niedersachsen (LNVG) deployed 14 fully hydrogen trains on a 100km stretch of track in Germany for passenger operations. The trains were constructed by Alstom and are certified to being able to operate a whole day on one fuel tank. 27 more trains will be delivered to the Frankfurt metropolitan area. This comes after two years of trial runs in Austria, Netherlands, Poland and Sweden.

Hitachi rail and Trenitalia developed new trains called 'Blues Train' which will be the first set in a new hybrid fleet in Europe. The trains will be up and running in later 2023. These hybrid trains are the first to be equipped with a tri-mode: Battery, Electric and diesel.

Fuel Cell Hybrid Power Pack for Rail Applications (FCH2RAIL) project has started dynamic track testing. It is a bi-mode demonstrator train based on a hybridisation of energy from hydrogen fuel cells and batteries.

First hybrid battery train makes its way to Europe . “Tri-mode” means the train can switch between battery, electric or diesel and can function on electrified and non-electrified lines so that it can still operate in areas that may not have the right infrastructure yet for electric trains.
Arriva Group invests in new battery hybrid train fleet

tech_0234_hydrogen-fuel-cell-electric-ve.technology_status_summary_zh: 氫燃料電池系統產生電力以驅動電動馬達，提供牽引能量。此技術是在非電氣化軌道上運行的列車替代柴油的方案。
tech_0234_hydrogen-fuel-cell-electric-ve.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 若未來能以低成本、豐富的方式生產低碳氫氣（由低碳電力電解），此技術將成為鐵路運輸的解決方案。此技術的市場僅限於部分或非電氣化軌道上運行的列車，且市占率將隨時間下降。
tech_0234_hydrogen-fuel-cell-electric-ve.technology_status_summary_en: A hydrogen fuel cell system generates electric power to run an electric motor, providing tractive energy. This technology represents an alternative to diesel for trains running on non-electrified tracks.
tech_0234_hydrogen-fuel-cell-electric-ve.market_dynamics_summary_en:
This technology would be a solution for rail transport in the case of cost-effective, abundant production of low-carbon hydrogen (from electrolysis from low-carbon electricity) in the future.
This technology has a market limited to trains running on partially or not-electrified tracks, with a decreasing share over time. Today non-electrified rail lines make up, for example, almost all interregional lines in North and South America, 67% of conventional rail lines in Africa, 15% of conventional rail lines in India, and 38% of Europe's conventional rail lines.
tech_0234_hydrogen-fuel-cell-electric-ve.description: A hydrogen fuel cell system generates electric power to run an electric motor, providing tractive energy. This technology represents an alternative to diesel for trains running on non-electrified tracks.

This technology has a market limited to trains running on partially or not-electrified tracks, with a decreasing share over time. Today non-electrified rail lines make up, for example, almost all interregional lines in North and South America, 67% of conventional rail lines in Africa, 15% of conventional rail lines in India, and 38% of Europe's conventional rail lines.

initiatives.description: Alstom is running two hydrogen fuel cell trains on a short route in Germany and is now testing one hydrogen fuel cell train in the Netherlands.
China-developed hydrogen fuel-cell hybrid locomotive rolls off assembly line
Spain Builds World’s First High-Speed Hydrail Train

Siemens Mobility has begun producing hydrogen-powered trains set to be used on the Südostabyernbahn network in Germany. From 2026, three 2-car Mireo Plus H trains will serve eight stations on the Mühldorf (Upper Bavaria) – Tüßling – Burghausen non-electrified route spanning 32.2km. The hydrogen trains, ordered by the State of Bavaria, are expected to replace diesel trains.
Coradia iLint: Alstom presents the world's first hydrogen passenger train in Poland

tech_0235_hyperloop.technology_status_summary_zh: 超迴路概念由特斯拉共同創辦人伊隆·馬斯克於一篇開源論文中提出，被形容為完全不同於飛機、船舶、公路或鐵路的替代運輸模式，基於三項關鍵構件：以磁力或空氣懸浮的車廂；線性馬達推進（最初提議採用壓縮空氣推進）；以及真空封閉艙以大幅降低空氣摩擦。此後多家公司已根據此概念開發出替代技術設計。
tech_0235_hyperloop.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 作為高速鐵路與短程航空的替代方案具有前景，但此技術的根本障礙與早期的技術成熟度，意味著相較淨零情境中其他減排選項，此技術的優先順序較低。
tech_0235_hyperloop.technology_status_summary_en: The hyperloop concept was advanced in an open source paper by Elon Musk, Tesla co-founder. It has been described as a completely alternative transport mode to aircraft, ships, road or rail, and is based on three key components: carriages levitating magnetically or by air; linear motor propulsion, initially proposed as compressed air propulsion; and a vacuum-based enclosure to dramatically reduce air friction. A number of companies since then have developed alternative technology designs based on the fundamental principles of the hyperloop, for instance using electromagnetic propulsion. Hyperloop variants remain to be tested at any significant scale.
tech_0235_hyperloop.market_dynamics_summary_en: As an alternative to high-speed rail and short-haul aviation it holds promise, but the fundamental hurdles of the technology and the early TRL mean this technology is of a low priority relative to other abatement options in the NZE.
tech_0235_hyperloop.description: The hyperloop concept was advanced in an open source paper by Elon Musk, Tesla co-founder. It has been described as a completely alternative transport mode to aircraft, ships, road or rail, and is based on three key components: carriages levitating magnetically or by air; linear motor propulsion, initially proposed as compressed air propulsion; and a vacuum-based enclosure to dramatically reduce air friction. A number of companies since then have developed alternative technology designs based on the fundamental principles of the hyperloop, for instance using electromagnetic propulsion. Hyperloop variants remain to be tested at any significant scale.
tech_0235_hyperloop.NZErationale: As an alternative to high-speed rail and short-haul aviation it holds promise, but the fundamental hurdles of the technology and the early TRL mean this technology is of a low priority relative to other abatement options in the NZE.

initiatives.description: Hyperloop pioneering companies Hardt, Hyperloop One, Hyperloop Transportation Technologies, Nevomo, TransPod, Swisspod Technologies, Zeleros launched together the "The Hyperloop Association" on December 2022. It aims to stimulate the development and growth of this emerging technology. It will collaborate with government and regulatory agencies and work closely with the EU commission and parliament

The European Hyperloop Center (EHC) announces the completion of its hyperloop test infrastructure and opens up for the first tests. This facility, featuring a 420-meter hyperloop test tube, can demonstrate all essential hyperloop technologies including a full lane switch.

The European Hyperloop Centre, in Veendam, northeast of the Netherlands, houses a 420 metre test tube, which is the longest hyperloop test track in Europe. Last year, the speed was 30km per hour. This year, engineers successfully increased it to 85 km per hour, reaching the maximum speed possible in the test tube.

tech_0236_magnetic-levitation.technology_status_summary_zh: 磁懸浮列車是藉由電磁吸引或排斥力支撐的懸浮車輛，最初於1900年代初期提出概念，自1984年起已有某種形式的商業運用。磁懸浮列車消除了車輪與軌道間的摩擦，可實現更高速度，並因移動部件與滾動摩擦減少而降低營運成本，因此主要阻礙前進的因素變為空氣阻力。
tech_0236_magnetic-levitation.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 雖然磁懸浮將繼續有其利基應用，但大規模實施仍有多項具競爭力的替代方案。
tech_0236_magnetic-levitation.technology_status_summary_en:
Magnetic levitation trains or maglevs are floating vehicles that are supported either by electromagnetic attraction or repulsion. They were initially conceptualised in the early 1900s, and have been in commercial use in some form since 1984. Maglev trains remove friction between the wheels and the rails, allowing for much higher speeds, reducing operating costs from fewer moving parts and rolling friction. In turn this means the main driver impeding forward movement becomes air resistance, driving technology development. They can also improve safety and prevent derailment. Further, they allow for wider trains to be built, increasing convenience; and they reduce the need for civil engineering projects as they can operate on higher inclines (of up to 10%) than traditional trains. 
Two key technology areas are currently deployed: (i) electromagnetic suspension (EMS), which harnesses the attractive forces between magnets on the train's side and underside and on the guideway; and (ii) electromagnetic suspension systems, where magnets, generally placed in the undercarriage of the train, repel the train from the guideway, which allows for higher levitation. These are generally based on superconducting and supercooled technology systems. The need to build dedicated infrastructure from scratch, bypassing conventional infrastructure, and high capital expenditures remain obstacles to further deployment.
tech_0236_magnetic-levitation.market_dynamics_summary_en: While it will continue to have niche applications, there are a number of competitive alternatives for large-scale implementation.
tech_0236_magnetic-levitation.description:

They were initially conceptualised in the early 1900s, and have been in commercial use in some form since 1984. In turn this means the main driver impeding forward movement becomes air resistance, driving technology development. They can also improve safety and prevent derailment. Further, they allow for wider trains to be built, increasing convenience; and they reduce the need for civil engineering projects as they can operate on higher inclines (of up to 10%) than traditional trains.

These are generally based on superconducting and supercooled technology systems. The need to build dedicated infrastructure from scratch, bypassing conventional infrastructure, and high capital expenditures remain obstacles to further deployment.

initiatives.description: The Korean Rotem Maglev runs in the city of Taejeon

China's first domestic maglev tourism line (Guangdong-Quingyuan Maglev line) started debugging and testing on March 2023. The line will be 38 km long with a first phase of 8km to officially open in late 2023. This will allow fast access between the Changlong Theme Park and Yin Zhan Station.
CRRC unveils 600km/h superconducting maglev prototype

tech_0237_battery-electric-aircraft-taxi.technology_name_zh: 電池電動飛機：計程與通勤機型
tech_0237_battery-electric-aircraft-taxi.technology_status_summary_zh: 電池電動飛機以機載電池作為唯一動力來源，因此無直接排放。電池電動飛機的推進效率最高可達噴射引擎飛機的兩倍。然而相較地面車輛，飛機承載額外重量須付出更高的燃料代價，電池能量密度明顯低於航空燃油，說明了為何小型短程電動飛機是最接近商用化的機型。
tech_0237_battery-electric-aircraft-taxi.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 電池電動飛機可消除所有直接排放及其他非二氧化碳暖化影響，對短程航班而言可望成為可行的減排路徑，其部署時程取決於電池技術的重大進展。
tech_0237_battery-electric-aircraft-taxi.technology_status_summary_en: Battery-electric aircraft operate with an on-board battery as the sole motive power source, and therefore with no direct emissions. The propulsion efficiency of battery-electric aircraft can be as much as twice as high as that of jet engine aircraft. However, compared to vehicles on the ground, aircraft face much greater fuel penalties for carrying extra weight. The significantly lower energy density of batteries compared to jet fuel explains why small, short range electric aircraft are closest to market entry.
tech_0237_battery-electric-aircraft-taxi.market_dynamics_summary_en: Battery-electric planes eliminate all direct emissions and other non-CO2 warming impacts. For short flights this could become a viable pathway to reduce emissions. The deployment timeline hinges on significant progress in battery development.
tech_0237_battery-electric-aircraft-taxi.description: Battery-electric aircraft operate with an on-board battery as the sole motive power source, and therefore with no direct emissions. The propulsion efficiency of battery-electric aircraft can be as much as twice as high as that of jet engine aircraft. However, compared to vehicles on the ground, aircraft face much greater fuel penalties for carrying extra weight. The significantly lower energy density of batteries compared to jet fuel explains why small, short range electric aircraft are closest to market entry.
tech_0237_battery-electric-aircraft-taxi.NZErationale: Battery-electric planes eliminate all direct emissions and other non-CO2 warming impacts. For short flights this could become a viable pathway to reduce emissions. The deployment timeline hinges on significant progress in battery development.

initiatives.description: Harbour Air and magniX announce first flight of commercial electric airplane (6 passengers)
Pipistrel Taurus: First electric trainer aircraft in serial production (2 seats)
First test flight of Rolls Royce's all electric plane
CATL successfully test-flew a 4-tonne civil electric aircraft and expects to release a 8-tonne civil electric aircraft in 2027-2028, supporting a range of about 2 000 to 3 000km.
First flight of electric 9-seat cummuter aircraft Eviation Alice
First flight of retrofitted Cessna Caravan
First certification of Passenger-carrying eVTOL

tech_0238_hybrid-electric-aircraft-regio.technology_name_zh: 油電混合飛機：區域型（20席以上）
tech_0238_hybrid-electric-aircraft-regio.technology_status_summary_zh: 油電混合飛機結合燃油引擎與電動馬達及電池（串聯、並聯或兩者組合），在多數概念中，電能主要於起飛階段使用，此時所需推力最大，而傳統噴射引擎效率最低，相較傳統飛機可在短程航線大幅降低燃油使用，同時緩解全電動設計的續航限制，混合動力飛機的優勢在長程航線上會減弱。
tech_0238_hybrid-electric-aircraft-regio.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 油電混合飛機可大幅降低能耗與排放，尤其在較短程航班上，也可望作為邁向全電動飛機的墊腳石，緩解續航限制問題。
tech_0238_hybrid-electric-aircraft-regio.technology_status_summary_en: Hybrid electric aircraft combine fuel-based engines with electric motors and batteries (in series, parallel or a combination of both). In most concepts, electrical energy is used during take-off, when the required thrust is highest and the efficiency of traditional jet engines is lowest. This can reduce fuel use compared to conventional aircraft significantly on short routes, while mitigating the range limitations of fully electric designs. The advantages of hybrid-electric aircraft diminish on longer missions where most energy is spent in cruise and the fuel penalty due to the battery weight increases.
tech_0238_hybrid-electric-aircraft-regio.market_dynamics_summary_en: Hybrid-electric aircraft can significantly reduce energy consumption and emissions, especially on shorter flights. They could also be a stepping stone towards fully-electric aircraft by alleviating range limitations.
tech_0238_hybrid-electric-aircraft-regio.description: Hybrid electric aircraft combine fuel-based engines with electric motors and batteries (in series, parallel or a combination of both). In most concepts, electrical energy is used during take-off, when the required thrust is highest and the efficiency of traditional jet engines is lowest. This can reduce fuel use compared to conventional aircraft significantly on short routes, while mitigating the range limitations of fully electric designs. The advantages of hybrid-electric aircraft diminish on longer missions where most energy is spent in cruise and the fuel penalty due to the battery weight increases.
tech_0238_hybrid-electric-aircraft-regio.NZErationale: Hybrid-electric aircraft can significantly reduce energy consumption and emissions, especially on shorter flights. They could also be a stepping stone towards fully-electric aircraft by alleviating range limitations.

initiatives.description: Heart Aerospace presents full-scale deomstrator of 30-seat regional hybrid-electric aircraft.
Heart Aerospace announces first test flight.
First flight of Ampaire Eco Caravan, a 11 seater retrofit Cessna.
ATR presents hybrid-electric regional aircraft concept.
MAEVE announces development of MAEVE Jet concept regional aircraft for up to 90 passengers
Aura Aero have started to build first prototype of hybrid-electric 19 seater with the aim to fly it in 2026.
Airbus and Rolls Royce developed a demonstrator where one of four jet engines was replaced by an electric motor. The project was cancelled in 2020.

tech_0239_hydrogen-powered-aircraft-regi.technology_name_zh: 氫能飛機：區域型（20席以上）
tech_0239_hydrogen-powered-aircraft-regi.technology_status_summary_zh: 氫氣可直接於噴射引擎中燃燒，或用於燃料電池發電以驅動電動馬達。雖然氫氣的重量能量密度極高——為煤油的三倍，但體積能量密度明顯較低，為限制燃料箱尺寸，氫氣須液化（攝氏零下253度），容納此類燃料箱可能需要全新機身設計，燃料電池與電動馬達的功率密度仍面臨挑戰。
tech_0239_hydrogen-powered-aircraft-regi.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 氫能飛機飛行時可不排放二氧化碳或氮氧化物，並大幅降低航空業非二氧化碳影響。由於能量密度高於電池，氫能飛機有望成為大型飛機與長程航班的選項，但在此類飛機取證前仍有許多工程挑戰待解決。
tech_0239_hydrogen-powered-aircraft-regi.technology_status_summary_en: Hydrogen can either be burnt in jet engines directly or used in a fuel cell to produce electricity to power an electric motor. While hydrogen has high gravimetric energy density—three times higher than kerosene—the volumetric density is significantly lower. To limit the size of fuel tanks, hydrogen needs to be liquefied (-253°C). Accomodating such tanks likely needs new airframe concepts. Further challenges arise around the power density of fuel cells and electric motors which need to be scaled up to satisfy power and weight requirements of larger aircraft. Finally, infrastructure for handling cryogenic hydrogen would need to be established at airports.
tech_0239_hydrogen-powered-aircraft-regi.market_dynamics_summary_en: Hydrogen aircraft could fly without CO2 or NOx emissions and significantly reduce non CO2 aviation impacts. Due to the higher energy density compared to batteries, hydrogen aircraft could become an option for larger aircraft and longer flights. However, many engineering challenges remain to be solved before certification of such aircraft comes into reach and hydrogen infrastructure at airports needs to be developed alongside.
tech_0239_hydrogen-powered-aircraft-regi.description: Hydrogen can either be burnt in jet engines directly or used in a fuel cell to produce electricity to power an electric motor. While hydrogen has high gravimetric energy density—three times higher than kerosene—the volumetric density is significantly lower. To limit the size of fuel tanks, hydrogen needs to be liquefied (-253°C). Accomodating such tanks likely needs new airframe concepts. Further challenges arise around the power density of fuel cells and electric motors which need to be scaled up to satisfy power and weight requirements of larger aircraft. Finally, infrastructure for handling cryogenic hydrogen would need to be established at airports.
tech_0239_hydrogen-powered-aircraft-regi.NZErationale: Hydrogen aircraft could fly without CO2 or NOx emissions and significantly reduce non CO2 aviation impacts. Due to the higher energy density compared to batteries, hydrogen aircraft could become an option for larger aircraft and longer flights. However, many engineering challenges remain to be solved before certification of such aircraft comes into reach and hydrogen infrastructure at airports needs to be developed alongside.

initiatives.description: ZeroAvia completes world first hydrogen-electric passenger plane flight
ZeroAvia and KLM plan demonstration flight of large regional turboprop with hydrogen-electric propulsion.
ZeroAvia flies 19-seat airplane with one hydrogen-electric engine
Universal Hydrogen flies 40-seat plane with one hydrogen-electric engine
First-ever flight powered by liquid hydrogen
Joby aviation flies hydrogen-electric air taxi over 840 km

In April 2025, the world’s first hydrogen-powered helicopter- a retrofitted Robinson R44 equipped with a PEM fuel cell and battery- completed a 3-minute test flight in Canada; Unither plans to retrofit the faster R66 model with the same system by 2028.
ZeroAvia advanced UK certification of its 600 kW ZA600 engine, tested on a retrofitted Dornier 228, and agreed to supply RVL’s Cessna Grand Caravan fleet for cargo operations in the United Kingdom.

tech_0240_battery-electric-aircraft-regi.technology_name_zh: 電池電動飛機：區域型（20席以上）
tech_0240_battery-electric-aircraft-regi.technology_status_summary_zh: 電池電動飛機以機載電池作為唯一動力來源，因此無直接排放。電池電動飛機的推進效率最高可達噴射引擎飛機的兩倍。然而相較地面車輛，飛機承載額外重量須付出更高的燃料代價，目前商用鋰離子電池的能量密度在電芯層級達到250 Wh/kg，幾乎比航空燃油的能量密度低50倍。
tech_0240_battery-electric-aircraft-regi.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 電池電動飛機可消除所有直接排放及其他非二氧化碳暖化影響，然而在2050年前，其角色可能主要限於短程航班，部署時程取決於電池技術的重大進展。
tech_0240_battery-electric-aircraft-regi.technology_status_summary_en: Battery-electric aircraft operate with an on-board battery as the sole motive power source, and therefore with no direct emissions. The propulsion efficiency of battery-electric aricraft can be as much as twice as high as that of jet engine aircraft. However, compared to vehicles on the ground, aircraft face much greater fuel penalties for carrying extra weight. The energy density of today’s commercial Li-ion batteries reaches 250 Wh/kg at cell level, which is almost 50 times less than the energy density of jet fuel.
tech_0240_battery-electric-aircraft-regi.market_dynamics_summary_en: Battery-electric planes eliminate all direct emissions and other non-CO2 warming impacts. However, their role before 2050 will likely be mainlt in short flights. The deployment timeline hinges on a significant progress in battery development.
tech_0240_battery-electric-aircraft-regi.description: Battery-electric aircraft operate with an on-board battery as the sole motive power source, and therefore with no direct emissions. The propulsion efficiency of battery-electric aricraft can be as much as twice as high as that of jet engine aircraft. However, compared to vehicles on the ground, aircraft face much greater fuel penalties for carrying extra weight. The energy density of today’s commercial Li-ion batteries reaches 250 Wh/kg at cell level, which is almost 50 times less than the energy density of jet fuel.
