initiatives.description: In 2020, the Swiss company Energy Vault built and connected to the grid its first demonstration plant in Arbedo-Castione using six cranes on a 100-meter-high tower to move 35-ton concrete blocks with a capacity of 90 MWh.

Energy Vault's 25 MW/100 MWh EVx gravity energy storage system in Rudong, China, achieved grid interconnection in December 2023, enabling commissioning and operation in 2024, and is expected to reach a round-trip efficiency above 80%.

ARES (Advanced Rail Energy Storage, United States) is developing a 50 MW gravity-based energy storage system, moving rails uphill/downhill at a gravel mine in Nevada. The system will use 210 trains, with a combined weight of 75 kt.

US company Gravity Power's technology stores large amounts of water underground and uses it to move a piston up and down. When charged, the water is pumped up, lifting the piston, and when electricity is needed, the piston drops, pushing the water out and spinning a turbine.

Green Gravity is completing engineering studies and regulatory approvals to deploy its gravitational energy storage technology at the Russell Vale #4 mine shaft in Wollongong (former coal mine), with 150 kW non-grid-connected technical trials to validate multi-weight gravitational systems ahead of commercial-scale deployments of up to 10 MW for 8–20 hours.

tech_0544_liquid-air-energy-storage.technology_status_summary_zh: 在液態空氣儲能系統（又稱低溫儲能）中，電力用於將空氣壓縮並冷卻至低溫（攝氏零下196度），為儲能系統充電，液態空氣隨後以低壓儲存於隔熱儲槽中，需要電力時，液態空氣自儲槽抽出，加壓、再加熱（藉由暴露於環境空氣，或利用工業製程或前一壓縮階段的廢熱）並膨脹，此膨脹過程可驅動渦輪機發電。
tech_0544_liquid-air-energy-storage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 相較抽蓄水力儲能（PSH）與壓縮空氣儲能，LAES不受地形或地質條件限制，此技術也非常適合長期儲存。
tech_0544_liquid-air-energy-storage.technology_status_summary_en: In liquid air energy storage systems, also known as cryogenic energy storage, electricity is used to compress and cool air to cryogenic temperatures (-196°C), recharging the storage system. The liquid air is then stored in an insulated tank at low pressure. When power is required, liquid air is drawn from the tank, pumped to high pressure, reheated (by exposure to ambient air, or with waste heat from industrial processes or from the previous compression stage) and expanded. This expansion can be used to drive a piston engine or a turbine to generate electricity. Co-locating next to a source of unused cold (to reduce the power consumption in the liquefaction process) or unused heat (for the evaporation process) increases the overall efficiency of the storage system.
tech_0544_liquid-air-energy-storage.market_dynamics_summary_en: In contrast to pumped storage hydropower (PSH) and CAES, LAES is not limited by topographic or geological conditions. The technology is also well suited for long-term storage.
tech_0544_liquid-air-energy-storage.description: In liquid air energy storage systems, also known as cryogenic energy storage, electricity is used to compress and cool air to cryogenic temperatures (-196°C), recharging the storage system. The liquid air is then stored in an insulated tank at low pressure. When power is required, liquid air is drawn from the tank, pumped to high pressure, reheated (by exposure to ambient air, or with waste heat from industrial processes or from the previous compression stage) and expanded. This expansion can be used to drive a piston engine or a turbine to generate electricity. Co-locating next to a source of unused cold (to reduce the power consumption in the liquefaction process) or unused heat (for the evaporation process) increases the overall efficiency of the storage system.
tech_0544_liquid-air-energy-storage.NZErationale: In contrast to pumped storage hydropower (PSH) and CAES, LAES is not limited by topographic or geological conditions. The technology is also well suited for long-term storage.

initiatives.description: In 2018, Highview Power started the operation of a 5 MW/15 MWh liquid air energy storage demonstration plant, connected to the grid, at Pilsworth Landfill in Manchester.

In May 2022, Innovatium’s first demonstration plant (50 kWh) went into operation at Aggregate Industries’ Cauldon Cement Works in Staffordshire. It received a grant from the UK Department for Business, Energy and Industrial Strategy (BEIS) of GBP 350 thousand. They system has a target installed cost of GBP 400/kWh.

Highview secured GBP 130 million to begin the first stage of its 300 MW/3.2 GWh hybrid long-duration energy storage project in Hunterston, Scotland, including a 2.5 GWh liquid-air energy storage facility, bringing total commercialisation funding to over GBP 500 million.

Highview Power is building the Carrington GEN01X liquid-air energy storage facility near Manchester, with grid-stability island due in 2026, and a second phase providing 50 MW/300 MWh of liquid-air energy storage.
A 1 MWh liquid air energy storage has been connected to the grid in Shijiazhuang (Hebei), China.
Korean researchers developed a liquid air energy storage system with higher efficiency thanks to the use of oxy-fuel combustion, whose CO2 emission is almost entirely captured.

tech_0545_liquid-co2-energy-storage.technology_status_summary_zh: 二氧化碳以氣態形式儲存於穹頂結構中，充電時電力用於將二氧化碳壓縮為液態，儲存於加壓容器中，放電時液態被加熱轉回氣態，隨著二氧化碳從液態膨脹為氣態，帶動渦輪機發電，此技術與壓縮空氣儲能相似，但後者僅使用空氣，然而由於二氧化碳可在攝氏31度的壓力下液化，不同於多數其他氣體，可容納更大量的能量密度。
tech_0545_liquid-co2-energy-storage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 相較抽蓄水力與壓縮空氣儲能，不受地形或地質條件限制。
tech_0545_liquid-co2-energy-storage.technology_status_summary_en: CO2 is stored in gas form in a dome. When charging, electricity is used to compress the CO2 into liquid form, which is stored in a pressurised vessel. When discharging, the liquid is heated up to turn it back into a gas and, as the CO2 expands from liquid to gas, it spins a turbine to generate electricity. It is similar to compressed air energy storage, which uses air instead of just CO2. However, because CO2 can be liquefied under pressure at 31°C, unlike most other gases, it allows larger amounts of energy to be stored in a relatively small pressure vessel and does not require specific geological reservoirs.
tech_0545_liquid-co2-energy-storage.market_dynamics_summary_en: In contrast to PSH and CAES, it is not limited by topographic or geological conditions.
tech_0545_liquid-co2-energy-storage.description: CO2 is stored in gas form in a dome. When charging, electricity is used to compress the CO2 into liquid form, which is stored in a pressurised vessel. When discharging, the liquid is heated up to turn it back into a gas and, as the CO2 expands from liquid to gas, it spins a turbine to generate electricity. It is similar to compressed air energy storage, which uses air instead of just CO2. However, because CO2 can be liquefied under pressure at 31°C, unlike most other gases, it allows larger amounts of energy to be stored in a relatively small pressure vessel and does not require specific geological reservoirs.
tech_0545_liquid-co2-energy-storage.NZErationale: In contrast to PSH and CAES, it is not limited by topographic or geological conditions.

initiatives.description: Energy Dome started the operations of the first demonstration project of its CO2-based energy storage system in Sardinia (Italy). The facility has a capacity of 2.5 MW/4 MWh and is located in Sardinia (Italy).

Energy Dome signed a global commercial partnership with Google, which also invested in the company, to deploy its liquid CO2  energy storage technology (8–24 hours) across key regions worldwide, in support of Google’s 24/7 carbon-free energy goal by 2030.
NTPC selected Triveni Turbine and Energy Dome to deliver a 160 MWh liquid CO2 energy storage facility on a turnkey basis at its Kudgi plant.
Energy Dome and Engie signs an offtake agreement for the 20MW/200MWh Energy Dome liquid CO2 plant under construction.

tech_0546_pumped-storage.technology_status_summary_zh: 抽蓄水力儲能電廠利用兩座水庫（一高一低）儲存能量，電力用於將水從低位水庫抽至高位水庫，將電能轉化為重力位能，儲存的能量可透過讓水從高位水庫流下驅動渦輪機，轉回電力，抽蓄水力早在1890年代已在義大利與瑞士使用，如今是一項成熟技術。
tech_0546_pumped-storage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 抽蓄水力儲能（PSH）電廠持續是電力系統靈活性的基石。在可行的情況下，此技術須持續尋求擴展方案，包括更靈活的技術以及海水式、小規模或地下系統。
tech_0546_pumped-storage.technology_status_summary_en: Pumped hydro storage plants store energy using two water reservoirs, one at a higher altitude than the other. Water is pumped up from the lower reservoir to the higher reservoir using electricity, converting the electrical energy into gravitational potential energy. The stored energy can be converted back into electricity by letting the water fall from the higher reservoir to drive a turbine. Pumped hydro was used in Italy and Switzerland as early as the 1890s and is now a mature technology that is widely used on a commercial scale globally, although limited by the need for the right geographical conditions. A number of improvements are enhancing some of its basic characteristics, including reuse and retrofitting for increased flexibility to accommodate variable renewables, extending the reach of pumped hydro to seawater or underground, and smaller modular projects.
tech_0546_pumped-storage.market_dynamics_summary_en: Pumped storage hydropower (PSH) plants continue to be a cornerstone of power system flexibility. Where feasible, the technology needs to continue to find solutions to expand, including more flexible technologies and seawater, small-scale or underground systems.
tech_0546_pumped-storage.description: Pumped hydro storage plants store energy using two water reservoirs, one at a higher altitude than the other. Water is pumped up from the lower reservoir to the higher reservoir using electricity, converting the electrical energy into gravitational potential energy. The stored energy can be converted back into electricity by letting the water fall from the higher reservoir to drive a turbine. Pumped hydro was used in Italy and Switzerland as early as the 1890s and is now a mature technology that is widely used on a commercial scale globally, although limited by the need for the right geographical conditions. A number of improvements are enhancing some of its basic characteristics, including reuse and retrofitting for increased flexibility to accommodate variable renewables, extending the reach of pumped hydro to seawater or underground, and smaller modular projects.
tech_0546_pumped-storage.NZErationale: Pumped storage hydropower (PSH) plants continue to be a cornerstone of power system flexibility. Where feasible, the technology needs to continue to find solutions to expand, including more flexible technologies and seawater, small-scale or underground systems.

initiatives.description: China: in 2022, the world’s largest pumped hydro storage plant was commissioned in Hebei, the Fengning Pumped Storage Power Station. The 3.6 GW/40 GWh facility had a construction cost of USD 1.87 billion.

Australia: the Pionee-Burdeking Pumped Hydro project in Queensland, which would be the world's largest pumped hydro storage facility, is progressing with a capacity of 5 GW/24 hours. The projects is proposed to be delivered in tewo stages by 2035.

Austria: In 2023, Hitachi Energy supplied static frequency converters to the Malta-Oberstufe plant, making it the world's first pumped storage plant to operate at variable speed and provide grid balancing services.
Japan: The world’s first pumped hydro storage facility using seawater was commissioned in 1999 with a capacity of 30 MW in Okinawa, but the plant was dismantled in 2016 due to a lack of demand.

Sweden: Mine Storage’s technology is based on pumped hydro storage systems in underground abandoned mines. The company has entered into agreements to investigate the feasibility of a pumped hydro storage system at the Gränsberg Mine (15 MW pilot).

The Fengning Pumped Storage Power Station in Hebei Province was completed in August 2024, becoming the world’s largest pumped hydro plant with 3.6 GW of capacity across twelve 300 MW reversible pump-turbine units and incorporating variable-speed generator technology from ANDRITZ Hydro.

RheEnergise is building its first High-Density Hydro® demonstrator on a hillside at Sibelco's kaolin mine at Cronwood, near Plymouth, a 500 kW storage system that can operate at low hills rather than mountains as it uses a high-density fluid to provide 2.5-times the energy of conventional hydro.
The world’s largest pumped hydro storage plant, the Fengning Pumped Storage Power Station with a total of 3.6 GW, was completed.
Tata Power announced a Rs 11,000 crore investments in pumped hydro storage projects in Shirawta, Pune, Maharashtra. Together, upon completion these projects will have a combined capacity og 2.8 GW.
GE Vernova commissions India’s first variable speed pumped storage unit at theTHDC India Limited’s Tehri Pumped Storage Hydropower Plant.

tech_0547_zinc-manganese-oxide-storage-b.technology_status_summary_zh: 鋅錳氧化物電池（Zn-MnO2）使用水系（通常為鹼性）電解質，正被開發為電網應用具成本效益的電化學儲能技術，此電池主要針對電網級儲能，因其理論能量密度高（約400 Wh/L，可與鋰離子系統匹敵）、水系電解質相對安全、供應鏈成熟，且規模化後預估成本低於每千瓦時100美元，以水作為電解質可提升安全性。
tech_0547_zinc-manganese-oxide-storage-b.technology_status_summary_en:
Zinc-Manganese Oxide Batteries (Zn-MnO2) use acqueous (often alkaline) electrolyte which is being developed as a cost-effective electrochemical storage technology for grid applications. This battery is mainly targeted for grid-scale energy storage because of its high theoretical energy density rivalling lithium-ion systems (~400 Wh/L), relatively safe aqueous electrolyte, established supply chain, and projected costs below USD 100/kWh at scale. 
The use of water as an electrolyte in Zinc-Manganese batteries makes them significantly safer than other forms of electrochemical cells. These batteries do not catch fire like lithium-ion batteries and offer improved intrinsic safety over lithium-ion batteries. Zinc is cheaper than cobalt and lithium so manufacturing and using this battery can also reduce the cost of energy storage.
tech_0547_zinc-manganese-oxide-storage-b.description:
Zinc-Manganese Oxide Batteries (Zn-MnO2) use acqueous (often alkaline) electrolyte which is being developed as a cost-effective electrochemical storage technology for grid applications. This battery is mainly targeted for grid-scale energy storage because of its high theoretical energy density rivalling lithium-ion systems (~400 Wh/L), relatively safe aqueous electrolyte, established supply chain, and projected costs below USD 100/kWh at scale. 
The use of water as an electrolyte in Zinc-Manganese batteries makes them significantly safer than other forms of electrochemical cells. These batteries do not catch fire like lithium-ion batteries and offer improved intrinsic safety over lithium-ion batteries. Zinc is cheaper than cobalt and lithium so manufacturing and using this battery can also reduce the cost of energy storage.

initiatives.description: In 2020, researchers identified an electrolyte designing optimizing performance of ZnMnO2 batteries.
A small scale ZnMnO2 battery storage system has been tested in 2021, demonstrating promising results.

tech_0548_lithium-ion-storage-battery.technology_status_summary_zh: 鋰離子電池因其高性能與快速下降的成本，已廣泛用於多種固定式電力應用，2023與2024年需求急遽攀升，在電力部門，其模組化特性讓它們能提供從頻率調節、輔助服務到輸配電投資延緩等一系列服務，電池儲能系統（BESS）適用於從毫秒到數小時（日內）的各種應用，但其相對較高的成本仍是限制因素之一。
tech_0548_lithium-ion-storage-battery.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 間歇性再生能源整合程度提升，將增加對靈活性與儲能的需求，鋰離子電池憑藉高製造產能、生產經驗、多樣性與部署速度，使其成為未來幾年短期固定式儲能新增裝置最可能的選擇。
tech_0548_lithium-ion-storage-battery.technology_status_summary_en: Lithium-ion batteries, due to their high performance and rapidly dropping costs, are already used for many power stationary applications, with demand rocketing in 2023 and 2024. In the power sector, their modularity allows them to provide a range of services from frequency regulation and ancillary services, to transmission and distribution investment deferral. Battery energy storage systems (BESS) are suited for applications ranging from milli-seconds to several hours (intra-day), but their relatively high cost currently make them not fit for longer duration storage, such as across days, weeks, or seasonal storage. Spillover effects from the transport sector are driving technology development towards higher densities, while power sector applications are benefiting from idling capacity or access to less performing designs. BESS prioritise cost and cycle life. As a result, the global BESS market is dominated by lithium iron phosphate (LFP) batteries, which are less expensive and offer longer lifetimes than their lithium nickel cobalt manganese (NCM) counterparts.
tech_0548_lithium-ion-storage-battery.market_dynamics_summary_en: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will increase the need for flexibility and energy storage. The high manufacturing capacity, production experience, versatility, and speed of deployment of lithium-ion batteries make them the most likely choice for short-term stationary storage addition in the coming years.
tech_0548_lithium-ion-storage-battery.description: Lithium-ion batteries, due to their high performance and rapidly dropping costs, are already used for many power stationary applications, with demand rocketing in 2023 and 2024. In the power sector, their modularity allows them to provide a range of services from frequency regulation and ancillary services, to transmission and distribution investment deferral. Battery energy storage systems (BESS) are suited for applications ranging from milli-seconds to several hours (intra-day), but their relatively high cost currently make them not fit for longer duration storage, such as across days, weeks, or seasonal storage. Spillover effects from the transport sector are driving technology development towards higher densities, while power sector applications are benefiting from idling capacity or access to less performing designs. BESS prioritise cost and cycle life. As a result, the global BESS market is dominated by lithium iron phosphate (LFP) batteries, which are less expensive and offer longer lifetimes than their lithium nickel cobalt manganese (NCM) counterparts.
tech_0548_lithium-ion-storage-battery.NZErationale: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will increase the need for flexibility and energy storage. The high manufacturing capacity, production experience, versatility, and speed of deployment of lithium-ion batteries make them the most likely choice for short-term stationary storage addition in the coming years.

initiatives.description: The Moss Landing Energy Storage Facility in California will have a total storage capacity of 750 MW/3000 MWh when completed as planned in summer 2023, making it the largest battery storage facility in the world. The previous phase of the project was the first in the world to receive resource adequacy capacity contracts.
In 2024, BYD announced a modular 6.4 MWh stationary storage battery using BYD lon-blade LFP batteries.
In 2024, Fluence started producing battery energy storage systems in the United States.

In 2024, CATL unveiled TENER, a dedicated stationary storage battery with a capacity of 6.25 MWh with long cycle life and almost no degradation in the first 5 years of operation thanks to the use of additives to increase the battery lifetime.
Tesla presents its Megpack 3, offering about 5 MWh of energy against 3.9 MWh of Megpack 2.
BYD to supply over 4 GWh of battery energy storage for a project in Chile, which when completed might become the largest in the World.

Engie and Sungrow have commissioned the first 400 MWh phase of mainland Europe’s largest battery energy storage system, which upon completion should reach 200 MW/800 MWh BESS at the Vilvoorde site, in Belgium.
Announced battery energy storage projects broke record after record in 2024, with the largest single projects announced to reach 19 GWh.

Leag Clean Power and Fluence Energy will construct Europe’s largest battery energy storage system, a 1 GW four-hour facility offering 4 GWh storage capacity at German lignite power plant, in Jaenschwalde in eastern Germany.

Hithium has started mass production of the world’s first 1,000Ah+ lithium-ion battery cell - - over three times the industrial average - targetting grid storage applications. These cells were thee world largest globally when announced and are part of a race for increasing the battery energy storage systems (BESS) energy density. These cells were also announced to be supplied to BESS projects in Saudi Arabia.
PowerChina begins construction of ‘world’s largest battery storage projects, with 6 GWh of energy storage and 1 GW of power capabilities.

BYD launches a 14.5 MWh battery energy storage systems (BESS) using LFP battery cells of over 2700 Ah, over double the size of the second largest competitor and over 8 times the industrial standard. The increase in battery cell size for BESS applications is part of a race to increase the energy density of containerized BESS systems, but concerns about wheter cells of these size can offer the same longevity of smaller cells remain.
The Emirati state-owned renewables developer Masdar has begun construction of a giant solar plus storagee project,  which would combine over 5GW of solar PV and 19 GWh of batteries.

tech_0549_metal-air-storage-battery.technology_status_summary_zh: 金屬空氣電池由置於適當電解質中的金屬負極與空氣正極組成，意即該電極的作用是在充放電時氧化或還原空氣中的氧，最知名且最先進的金屬空氣電池為鋅空氣、鐵空氣與鋰空氣電池，但也可使用鈉、鉀、鎂、鈣或鋁等其他金屬，金屬空氣電池因較低的動力學速率而具較長的儲存與放電時間。
tech_0549_metal-air-storage-battery.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 間歇性再生能源整合程度提升，將增加對靈活性與儲能的需求。鋰離子電池已廣泛部署，適用於短期（低於10小時）儲存，但也將需要更長期的儲存，金屬空氣電池，尤其是鐵空氣電池，非常適合數小時或多日儲存。
tech_0549_metal-air-storage-battery.technology_status_summary_en: Metal-air batteries consist of a metal anode in a suitable electrolyte and an air cathode, which means having an electrode whose role is oxidizing or reducing the oxygen in the air during charge or discharge. The most well-known and advanced metal-air batteries are zinc-air, iron-air, and lithium-air batteries, but other metals such as sodium, potassium, magnesium, calcium, or aluminium could be used. Metal-air batteries tend to have longer storage and discharge times because of the lower kinetics (reaction speed) to reduce or oxidize the oxygen. This feature makes those batteries less suited for applications requiring large powers, such as the acceleration need of an electric vehicle, but well adapted for mid- to long-term energy storage, when a relatively constant amount of energy needs to be dispatched over relatively long period of time, such as several hours or days.
tech_0549_metal-air-storage-battery.market_dynamics_summary_en: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will increase the need for flexibility and energy storage. While lithium-ion batteries have been largely deployed and are suited for short-term (<10 h) storage, longer-term storage will also be required. Metal-air, and in particular iron-air, are well suited for several hours or multi-day storage, representing a good complement to lithium-ion or sodium-ion batteries and enabling a larger share of intermittent renewables in the power grid.
tech_0549_metal-air-storage-battery.description: Metal-air batteries consist of a metal anode in a suitable electrolyte and an air cathode, which means having an electrode whose role is oxidizing or reducing the oxygen in the air during charge or discharge. The most well-known and advanced metal-air batteries are zinc-air, iron-air, and lithium-air batteries, but other metals such as sodium, potassium, magnesium, calcium, or aluminium could be used. Metal-air batteries tend to have longer storage and discharge times because of the lower kinetics (reaction speed) to reduce or oxidize the oxygen. This feature makes those batteries less suited for applications requiring large powers, such as the acceleration need of an electric vehicle, but well adapted for mid- to long-term energy storage, when a relatively constant amount of energy needs to be dispatched over relatively long period of time, such as several hours or days.
tech_0549_metal-air-storage-battery.NZErationale: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will increase the need for flexibility and energy storage. While lithium-ion batteries have been largely deployed and are suited for short-term (<10 h) storage, longer-term storage will also be required. Metal-air, and in particular iron-air, are well suited for several hours or multi-day storage, representing a good complement to lithium-ion or sodium-ion batteries and enabling a larger share of intermittent renewables in the power grid.

initiatives.description: Form energy's first iron-air battery manufacturing facility, with 500MW of maximum manufacturing capacity when operating at full capacity, and several iron-air battery energy storage projects are expected to become operational between 2025 and 2026 in the United States, with over 50 MW multi-day storage capacity, equating to over 5 GWh of installed battery capacity.

Zinc8 Energy Solution is planning to commission in 2023 a 100 kW/1 MWh zinc-air battery storage project at community apartments in New York (United States). Zinc8 Energy Solutions also got USD 9 million tax credit to establish a manufacturing facility in New York.

In 2022, the company e-Zinc (Canada) entered into collaboration with Toyota Tsusho Canada to further test and validate their zinc-air battery technology, with a capacity to store around 24 hours of energy.

Form Energy is developing iron-air batteries and in 2023 started the construction of its first manufacturing facility in West Virginia, investing up to USD 760 million. The facility is expected to start operations in 2024.

Form Energy entered into an agreement with utility company Xcel to put 10 MW/1 GWh (100 hours) iron-air battery systems at retiring coal power plant sites in Minnesota and Colorado by 2025. Form Energy also reached an agreement with Georgia Power to deploy a 15 MW/1.5 GWh iron-air battery by 2026, subject to regulatory approvals.
Ore Energy, a Dutch start-up, connected a pilot iron-air battery to the grid, aiming to evaluate its performance over repeated multi-day charges.
Form Energy iron-air battery successfully completed the UL9540A safety testing.
Berkshire Hathaway Energy-owned utility PacifiCorp is planning to install 3,073MW of iron-air battery storage by 2045.
Iron-air battery developer Form Energy raises $405M, announces collaboration with GE Vernova
Form Energy, a US start-up, started construction of a 150 MWh (minimum 100-hour discharge time) iron air battery and is planning one at 500 MWh.
ESS, a US technology developer, partnered with LEAG, a German energy provider, to start building a 500 MWh (minimum 10-hour discharge time) iron-air battery.
Google reached a final agreement to deploy the world's largest iron-air battery (300 MW/30 GWh) so far.

tech_0550_redox-flow-storage-battery.technology_name_zh: 氧化還原液流儲能電池
tech_0550_redox-flow-storage-battery.technology_status_summary_zh: 氧化還原液流電池使用液態溶液儲存能量，而非如鋰離子電池般儲存於固態材料中，液流電池由兩種電解液組成，分別置於由離子選擇性膜分隔的儲槽中，該膜僅允許特定離子在充放電過程中通過，正負電解液含有可透過電化學反應釋放或儲存電子的溶解原子或分子，放電時電子被釋放。
tech_0550_redox-flow-storage-battery.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 間歇性再生能源整合程度提升，將增加對靈活性與儲能的需求。鋰離子電池已廣泛部署，適用於短期（低於10小時）儲存，但也將需要更長期的儲存，氧化還原液流電池非常適合數小時或多日儲存，是良好的互補技術。
tech_0550_redox-flow-storage-battery.technology_status_summary_en: Redox flow batteries use a liquid solution to store energy, rather than storing it in a solid material like lithium-ion batteries. Flow batteries consist of two electrolytes contained in tanks separated by an ion-selective membrane that allows only certain ions to pass through during the charging or discharging process. Negative and positive electrolytes contain dissolved atoms or molecules that can react electrochemically to release or store electrons. During discharge, an electron is released from the anode (negative electrolyte) via an oxidation reaction, travels through an external circuit and is accepted at the cathode (positive electrolyte) via a reduction reaction. During charging, the opposite flows and reactions take place as the battery stores energy. The separation of the energy (the electrolyte tanks) and power (the membrane) components allows a tailored design: larger storage tanks increase energy storage capacity, while accelerated fluid flows or electrode and membrane surface increase the battery power. Flow batteries are less sensitive to deep discharge and can store energy for longer than lithium-ion battery, as chemicals as physically separated in two distinct tanks (containing the positive and negative electrolyte, respectively). However, they also have a lower volumetric energy density, limiting applications in electro mobility. Several chemistries can be used, but the most mature is the vanadium redox battery (VRB), which uses vanadium ions as the charge carrier. However, alternatives are being investigated, such as organic redox-flow batteries.
tech_0550_redox-flow-storage-battery.market_dynamics_summary_en: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will increase the need for flexibility and energy storage. While lithium-ion batteries have been largely deployed and are suited for short-term (<10 h) storage, longer-term storage will also be required. Redox-flow batteries are suited for several hours or multi-day storage, representing a good complement to lithium-ion or sodium-ion batteries and enabling a larger share of intermittent renewables in the power grid. In addition, redox-flow batteries are modular and can separately control power (which depends on how fast the liquid in the tank is pumped into the electrodes, among other factors) and energy (how large the tanks are), which can be an important advantage to better fit the power grid requirements.
tech_0550_redox-flow-storage-battery.description: Redox flow batteries use a liquid solution to store energy, rather than storing it in a solid material like lithium-ion batteries. Flow batteries consist of two electrolytes contained in tanks separated by an ion-selective membrane that allows only certain ions to pass through during the charging or discharging process. Negative and positive electrolytes contain dissolved atoms or molecules that can react electrochemically to release or store electrons. During discharge, an electron is released from the anode (negative electrolyte) via an oxidation reaction, travels through an external circuit and is accepted at the cathode (positive electrolyte) via a reduction reaction. During charging, the opposite flows and reactions take place as the battery stores energy. The separation of the energy (the electrolyte tanks) and power (the membrane) components allows a tailored design: larger storage tanks increase energy storage capacity, while accelerated fluid flows or electrode and membrane surface increase the battery power. Flow batteries are less sensitive to deep discharge and can store energy for longer than lithium-ion battery, as chemicals as physically separated in two distinct tanks (containing the positive and negative electrolyte, respectively). However, they also have a lower volumetric energy density, limiting applications in electro mobility. Several chemistries can be used, but the most mature is the vanadium redox battery (VRB), which uses vanadium ions as the charge carrier. However, alternatives are being investigated, such as organic redox-flow batteries.
tech_0550_redox-flow-storage-battery.NZErationale: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will increase the need for flexibility and energy storage. While lithium-ion batteries have been largely deployed and are suited for short-term (<10 h) storage, longer-term storage will also be required. Redox-flow batteries are suited for several hours or multi-day storage, representing a good complement to lithium-ion or sodium-ion batteries and enabling a larger share of intermittent renewables in the power grid. In addition, redox-flow batteries are modular and can separately control power (which depends on how fast the liquid in the tank is pumped into the electrodes, among other factors) and energy (how large the tanks are), which can be an important advantage to better fit the power grid requirements.

initiatives.description: In 2022, the world’s largest VRB, 100 MW/400 MWh, was connected to the grid and in a second phase, it will have a capacity of 200 MW/800 MWh. The project was constructed and operated by Dalian Constant Current Energy Storage Power Station.
Bushveld Minerals, one of the primary vanadium producers in the world, is constructing a flow battery electrolyte plant in South Africa, expected to be ready by 2024.
In 2023, Australian Vanadium, secured a site for a flow battery electrolyte plant in Perth, which will have a capacity of 33 MWh/year.
Redflow (Australia) would supply a 20 MWh zinc-bromine flow battery storage system to a solar PV microgrid project in California (United States), expected to be operational by 2025.
WeView announced it had raised USD 57 million in several rounds of financing to commercialise their zinc-iron flow battery energy storage system.

Invinity Energy Systems from the United Kingdom launched a modular 300 kWh vanadium redox flow battery in 2024 (fourth generation), designed to be deployed in 10 MWh to 1 GWh facilities, which has twice the energy density of the previous version. It has charge/discharge durations between 4 and 18 hours with no cycle limits, and sub-second response times. Long-duration storage can help grid operators to bridge prolonged periods of low power generation, thereby reducing the need for standby peaker plants and avoiding electricity price spikes. However, cost-effective technologies are not yet widely proven as power markets currently do not provide attractive business models for storage lengths longer than four hours.
Redox-flow batteries were first developed by NASA.
Development of zinc-bromide redox flow batteries.
Development of vanadium redox flow batteries.
Development of organic redox flow batteries.

The AIRFUSE project, focused on providing a secure, scalable and low-carbon solution for energy security, was awarded funding in 2024 from the InnovativeUkraine competition, supported by UK International Development. The project aims to implement an innovative 12.5 kW, 75 kWh long-duration energy storage system using all-iron redox flow battery technology at the Kness Power Plant in Ukraine, addressing critical energy security challenges while reducing emissions by 27 t CO2 per year.
China Huaneng Group, a state-owned electricity company, commissioned the world’s largest vanadium flow battery with 1 000 MWh capacity designed for 5-hour storage cycles in Xinjiang province.

Costruction of what would become the largest redox-flow battery in the world (total capacity of more than 1.6 GWh and a power output of over 800 MW) started in Switzerland. The system is to be built in a new technology center in Laufenburg (TZL) in the Swiss canton of Aargau close to the German border. The technology center is set to begin operations in summer 2028.

tech_0551_sodium-ion-storage-battery.technology_status_summary_zh: 鈉離子電池是一種正極由鈉基材料構成、負極（不一定為鈉基材料）及由含少量添加劑的鈉鹽構成的液態電解質所組成的電池，充電時鈉離子從正極移向負極，電子則透過外部電路流動，放電時發生相反過程，鈉離子電池結構與鋰離子電池相似，但以鈉取代鋰。
tech_0551_sodium-ion-storage-battery.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 間歇性再生能源整合程度提升，將增加對靈活性與儲能的需求，鈉離子電池可補充鋰離子電池以供日內儲存使用。
tech_0551_sodium-ion-storage-battery.technology_status_summary_en: Sodium-ion batteries are a type of battery with a cathode consisting of a sodium-based material, an anode (not necessary a sodium-based material) and a liquid electrolyte consisting of sodium salts with small amounts of additives. During charging, sodium ions move from the cathode to the anode while electrons move through the external circuit. The reverse process occurs during discharge. Sodium-ion batteries are similar in structure to lithium-ion batteries, but the lithium is replaced by sodium compounds. The main advantage of sodium-ion batteries is the natural abundance of sodium, but challenges include low energy density and shorter cycle life, albeit exact characteristics depend on the exact sodium-ion battery chemistry employed. For applications where energy density is not critical, such as stationary battery energy storage or short-range mobility, sodium-ion batteries could be an attractive alternative, especially during times of high lithium prices.
tech_0551_sodium-ion-storage-battery.market_dynamics_summary_en: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will increase the need for flexibility and energy storage, and sodium-ion batteries can complement lithium-ion batteries for intra-day storage.
tech_0551_sodium-ion-storage-battery.description: Sodium-ion batteries are a type of battery with a cathode consisting of a sodium-based material, an anode (not necessary a sodium-based material) and a liquid electrolyte consisting of sodium salts with small amounts of additives. During charging, sodium ions move from the cathode to the anode while electrons move through the external circuit. The reverse process occurs during discharge. Sodium-ion batteries are similar in structure to lithium-ion batteries, but the lithium is replaced by sodium compounds. The main advantage of sodium-ion batteries is the natural abundance of sodium, but challenges include low energy density and shorter cycle life, albeit exact characteristics depend on the exact sodium-ion battery chemistry employed. For applications where energy density is not critical, such as stationary battery energy storage or short-range mobility, sodium-ion batteries could be an attractive alternative, especially during times of high lithium prices.
tech_0551_sodium-ion-storage-battery.NZErationale: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will increase the need for flexibility and energy storage, and sodium-ion batteries can complement lithium-ion batteries for intra-day storage.

initiatives.description: In 2021 a 1 MWh sodium-ion battery system for solar energy storage was put into operation in Taiyuan by HiNa Battery.
Natro Energy has announced a 600 MWh/year sodium-ion battery facility in Michigan by 2023.

The first phase of Datang Group’s 200 MWh (2-hour minimum discharge time) sodium-ion energy storage project in Qianjiang, Hubei Province, was connected to the grid in 2024. The project represents the first phase of the Datang Hubei Sodium Ion New Energy Storage Power Station, which consists of 42 battery energy storage containers and 21 sets of boost converters. It uses 185 ampere-hour large-capacity sodium-ion batteries supplied by China’s HiNa Battery Technology and is equipped with a 110 kV transformer station. Previously, the largest operational sodium-ion system was the China Southern Power Grid’s Fulin 10 MWh BESS project, located in Nanning, southwestern China. The power station, which represents the first phase of a 100 MWh project, also features HiNa battery’s cells.
CATL announced that its first-generation sodium-ion cells cost about 77 USD per kWh, and the second generation with volume production can drop to 40 USD per kWh.
In May 2022, Natron stated to kick off mass-production of long-life sodium-ion batteries in 2023.
In December 2022, HiNa Battery, a JAC-Volkswagen joint venture, becomes 1st battery maker to put sodium-ion batteries in Evs in China
In 2024, BYD began building its first sodium-ion battery plant in China.
In 2025, CATL released its second generation sodium-ion battery and announced its Naxtra sodium-ion battery brand. Naxtra passenger car battery will be mass-produced from December 2025.
In 2025, Hina released its second generation sodium-ion battery.
In 2021, CATL presented its first generation sodium-ion battery.
First intercalation materials for sodium-ion batteries are studied.
NASICON material, used as solid-electrolyte for solid sodium-ion batteries, is identified.
Experimental demonstration of the use of hard carbon as anode material for sodium-ion batteries, which is the relevant anode material still today.
The US-based Peak Energy signed a contract with Jupiter Power to provide a 4.75 GWh sodium-ion battery energy storage system, which would make it the largest globally.
In 2024, BYD launched its first sodium-ion battery for grid storage.
Hina installes the first sodium-ion battery energy storage system (100 kWh).
In December 2025, CATL confirmed plans for commercial-scale deployment across multiple sectors from 2026, including battery swap systems, passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles and energy storage.

sector: Thermal storage for buildings and district heating
tech_0552_active-latent-heat-storage.technology_status_summary_zh: 一種將熱交換元件整合至儲存體積中的熱儲存系統，藉此讓設備能量容量（即可儲存的總能量）與功率（即單位時間可放出的能量）之間具備更大獨立性。
tech_0552_active-latent-heat-storage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 由於容量與功率可獨立選擇，主動儲存系統可能適用於多種應用，並可比傳統熱儲存系統設計得更為最佳化。
tech_0552_active-latent-heat-storage.technology_status_summary_en: Thermal storage system integrating heat transfer components into the storage volume, thus allowing more independence between the equipment energy capacity (i.e. total amount of energy that can be stored) and power (i.e. the amount of energy that could be discharged in a given unit of time).
tech_0552_active-latent-heat-storage.market_dynamics_summary_en: As capacity and power can be chosen independently, active storage systems could be suitable in various applications and designed more optimally than traditional thermal storage systems.
tech_0552_active-latent-heat-storage.description: Thermal storage system integrating heat transfer components into the storage volume, thus allowing more independence between the equipment energy capacity (i.e. total amount of energy that can be stored) and power (i.e. the amount of energy that could be discharged in a given unit of time).
tech_0552_active-latent-heat-storage.NZErationale: As capacity and power can be chosen independently, active storage systems could be suitable in various applications and designed more optimally than traditional thermal storage systems.

initiatives.description: Fraunhofer ISE developed an innovative active latent heat storage concept using a screw heat exchanger to transport a phase change material between two water tanks (cold and hot). As the energy capacity is driven by the tank volume and the discharging power by the size of the screw heat exchanger, capacity and power are indeed independent.

sector: Thermal storage for buildings and district heating
tech_0553_liquid-gaseous-thermal-storage.technology_status_summary_zh: 熱能透過材料由液態轉為氣態的相變，在恆溫下儲存與釋放。
tech_0553_liquid-gaseous-thermal-storage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 因液態與氣態間的體積變化顯著（或需高壓），被認為過於複雜。
tech_0553_liquid-gaseous-thermal-storage.technology_status_summary_en: Heat is stored and released at constant temperature thanks to a change in the phase of a material from the liquid state to the gaseous state.
tech_0553_liquid-gaseous-thermal-storage.market_dynamics_summary_en: Considered too complex because of the important change of volume between liquid and gas (or high pressure).
tech_0553_liquid-gaseous-thermal-storage.description: Heat is stored and released at constant temperature thanks to a change in the phase of a material from the liquid state to the gaseous state.
tech_0553_liquid-gaseous-thermal-storage.NZErationale: Considered too complex because of the important change of volume between liquid and gas (or high pressure).

sector: Thermal storage for buildings and district heating
tech_0554_shape-stabilised-phase-change-.technology_status_summary_zh: 相變材料能透過材料由固態變為液態的物理狀態變化來儲存能量，並透過凝固釋放能量，因此可作為被動式熱電池。
tech_0554_shape-stabilised-phase-change-.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 這種新材料是形狀穩定相變材料，相較市售相變材料可儲存高達五倍的熱能。
tech_0554_shape-stabilised-phase-change-.technology_status_summary_en: Phase change materials are able to store energy through changing the physical state of a material from solid to liquid, and releasing it through solidification. They are therefore able to act as a passive thermal battery.
tech_0554_shape-stabilised-phase-change-.market_dynamics_summary_en: The new material is a shape-stabilised phase change material that can store up to five times more thermal energy than commercially available phase change materials.
tech_0554_shape-stabilised-phase-change-.description: Phase change materials are able to store energy through changing the physical state of a material from solid to liquid, and releasing it through solidification. They are therefore able to act as a passive thermal battery.
tech_0554_shape-stabilised-phase-change-.NZErationale: The new material is a shape-stabilised phase change material that can store up to five times more thermal energy than commercially available phase change materials.

initiatives.description: In 2022, scientists at Martin Luther University Halle-Wittenberg (MLU) and the University of Leipzig in Germany have developed a new heat-storage material to passively cool PV systems and residential batteries. The ss-PCM is said to absorb large amounts of heat by changing its physical state from solid to liquid, and then releasing it when the material hardens. Currently the material is still only being produced in small quantities in the laboratory.
A team of Iranian and Irish researchers developed a ss-PCM from waste paper

sector: Thermal storage for buildings and district heating
tech_0555_ice-thermal-storage-in-buildin.technology_status_summary_zh: 利用冰與水儲存冷能，於離峰時段製冰，並在尖峰冷卻需求時用於冷卻建築。
tech_0555_ice-thermal-storage-in-buildin.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 此解決方案可利用再生能源，降低冷卻或工業製程的尖峰用電需求，熱能以冰的形式儲存，之後用於維持建築或工業製程內的溫度，製冷過程通常廢棄的廢熱可用於空間供暖與熱水，相較電池成本更低。
tech_0555_ice-thermal-storage-in-buildin.technology_status_summary_en:
Uses ice and water to store cold.
Ice is created during off-peak hours which is used to cool the building during peak cooling demand.
tech_0555_ice-thermal-storage-in-buildin.market_dynamics_summary_en: This solution can exploit renewables, reducing peak power needs for cooling or industrial processes.  Thermal energy is stored as ice and used later to maintain temperatures within a building or industrial process. The waste heat generally discarded by the refrigeration process can be used for space heating and hot water. Cheaper compared to batteries.
tech_0555_ice-thermal-storage-in-buildin.description:
Uses ice and water to store cold.
Ice is created during off-peak hours which is used to cool the building during peak cooling demand.
tech_0555_ice-thermal-storage-in-buildin.NZErationale: This solution can exploit renewables, reducing peak power needs for cooling or industrial processes.  Thermal energy is stored as ice and used later to maintain temperatures within a building or industrial process. The waste heat generally discarded by the refrigeration process can be used for space heating and hot water. Cheaper compared to batteries.

initiatives.description: ICE ON is a Polich company which has developed a thermal storage system which can increase the efficiency of a cooling system by 30%.
Baltimore Air Coil Company is a US based company which have developed a ice thermal storage cooling solution which is claimed to be a cost-effective and reliable option for cooling.

sector: Thermal storage for buildings and district heating
tech_0556_solid-solid-thermal-storage.technology_status_summary_zh: 熱能透過固態材料結晶結構的變化，在恆溫下儲存與釋放。
tech_0556_solid-solid-thermal-storage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 相較液固態速度較慢，多種材料可適用於此方法，溫度範圍從攝氏零下100度到1000度不等。
tech_0556_solid-solid-thermal-storage.technology_status_summary_en: Heat is stored and released at constant temperature thanks to a change in the crystalline structure of a solid material.
tech_0556_solid-solid-thermal-storage.market_dynamics_summary_en: Quite slow compared to liquid-solid. A large range of materials make this method available for temperature ranging from -100 °C to 1 000 °C.
tech_0556_solid-solid-thermal-storage.description: Heat is stored and released at constant temperature thanks to a change in the crystalline structure of a solid material.
tech_0556_solid-solid-thermal-storage.NZErationale: Quite slow compared to liquid-solid. A large range of materials make this method available for temperature ranging from -100 °C to 1 000 °C.

initiatives.description: Lehigh Startup Energy Storage Technologies (EST) Signs Express License to Commercialize Thermal Battery Technology

tech_0557_pcm-heat-batteries-for-domesti.technology_name: PCM heat batteries for domestic hot water/space heating
tech_0557_pcm-heat-batteries-for-domesti.technology_name_zh: 家用熱水/空間供暖用相變材料熱電池
sector: Thermal storage for buildings and district heating
tech_0557_pcm-heat-batteries-for-domesti.technology_status_summary_zh: 相變材料（PCM）用於儲存來自熱泵、鍋爐或光伏系統的熱能，並依需求釋放供家用熱水或低溫供暖使用，材料通常為某類石蠟或水合鹽。
tech_0557_pcm-heat-batteries-for-domesti.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 儲能對抵消尖峰需求至關重要，此需求通常由建築的熱能需求（無論冬季或夏季）驅動。
tech_0557_pcm-heat-batteries-for-domesti.technology_status_summary_en:
Phase-Change Materials (PCM) used to store heat from heat pumps, boilers, or PV and release it on demand for domestic hot water or low-temp heating.
The material is typically some type of paraffin or salt hydrate.
tech_0557_pcm-heat-batteries-for-domesti.market_dynamics_summary_en: Energy storage is key to offset peak demand, which is generally driven by a building's thermal needs (either during the winter or summer).
tech_0557_pcm-heat-batteries-for-domesti.description:
Phase-Change Materials (PCM) used to store heat from heat pumps, boilers, or PV and release it on demand for domestic hot water or low-temp heating.
The material is typically some type of paraffin or salt hydrate.
tech_0557_pcm-heat-batteries-for-domesti.NZErationale: Energy storage is key to offset peak demand, which is generally driven by a building's thermal needs (either during the winter or summer).

sector: Thermal storage for buildings and district heating
tech_0558_ice-slurry-thermal-storage.technology_status_summary_zh: 冰漿熱儲存是一種先進的冷能儲存方法，使用懸浮於水或水基溶液中的細冰晶混合物，其特色是高儲能密度、快速冷卻速率與靈活的輸送能力，應用於建築內部及區域供冷系統。
tech_0558_ice-slurry-thermal-storage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 儲能對抵消尖峰需求至關重要，此需求通常由建築的熱能需求（無論冬季或夏季）驅動。
tech_0558_ice-slurry-thermal-storage.technology_status_summary_en: Ice slurry thermal storage is an advanced method for storing cooling energy using a mixture of fine ice crystals suspended in water or a water-based solution. It is notable for its high energy storage density, rapid cooling rates, and flexible delivery capabilities. It is used within buildings as well as district cooling.
tech_0558_ice-slurry-thermal-storage.market_dynamics_summary_en: Energy storage is key to offset peak demand, which is generally driven by a building's thermal needs (either during the winter or summer).
tech_0558_ice-slurry-thermal-storage.description: Ice slurry thermal storage is an advanced method for storing cooling energy using a mixture of fine ice crystals suspended in water or a water-based solution. It is notable for its high energy storage density, rapid cooling rates, and flexible delivery capabilities. It is used within buildings as well as district cooling.
tech_0558_ice-slurry-thermal-storage.NZErationale: Energy storage is key to offset peak demand, which is generally driven by a building's thermal needs (either during the winter or summer).

initiatives.description: Several companies offer solution for energy storage with ice slurry

tech_0559_macroencapsulated-pcm-modules-.technology_name: Macroencapsulated PCM modules in heat exchangers / air-handling units
tech_0559_macroencapsulated-pcm-modules-.technology_name_zh: 熱交換器/空氣處理機組用巨型封裝相變材料模組
sector: Thermal storage for buildings and district heating
tech_0559_macroencapsulated-pcm-modules-.technology_status_summary_zh: 巨型封裝相變材料模組整合於熱交換器與空氣處理機組中，供熱能儲存並提升效率，這些模組通常由填充相變材料的密封容器組成，經常堆疊以最大化熱交換表面積，典型材料為以高分子或鋁封裝的水合鹽或石蠟。
tech_0559_macroencapsulated-pcm-modules-.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 儲能對抵消尖峰需求至關重要，此需求通常由建築的熱能需求（無論冬季或夏季）驅動。
tech_0559_macroencapsulated-pcm-modules-.technology_status_summary_en: Macroencapsulated phase change material modules that are integrated into heat exchangers and air-handling units for thermal energy storage and improved efficiency. These modules typically consist of sealed containers filled with PCM, often stacked to maximize the heat exchange surface area. Typical materials are either salt hydrates or paraffins encapsulated in polymer or aluminium.
tech_0559_macroencapsulated-pcm-modules-.market_dynamics_summary_en: Energy storage is key to offset peak demand, which is generally driven by a building's thermal needs (either during the winter or summer).
tech_0559_macroencapsulated-pcm-modules-.description: Macroencapsulated phase change material modules that are integrated into heat exchangers and air-handling units for thermal energy storage and improved efficiency. These modules typically consist of sealed containers filled with PCM, often stacked to maximize the heat exchange surface area. Typical materials are either salt hydrates or paraffins encapsulated in polymer or aluminium.
tech_0559_macroencapsulated-pcm-modules-.NZErationale: Energy storage is key to offset peak demand, which is generally driven by a building's thermal needs (either during the winter or summer).

initiatives.description: Researched by team from Technische Universiteit Eindhoven  develop new materials and systems for heat storage for domestic and industrial applications.

tech_0560_combined-latent-and-sensible-s.technology_name: Combined latent and sensible storage system
tech_0560_combined-latent-and-sensible-s.technology_name_zh: 潛熱與顯熱複合儲存系統
sector: Thermal storage for buildings and district heating
tech_0560_combined-latent-and-sensible-s.technology_status_summary_zh: 將相變材料封裝於高熱容量介質（如混凝土）中的熱儲存系統，如今結合多種儲存介質可望將儲存密度提升二至三倍。
tech_0560_combined-latent-and-sensible-s.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 潛熱與顯熱複合儲存系統相較純潛熱或顯熱儲存單元，可能以更低成本滿足熱能與電力電網的靈活性需求。
tech_0560_combined-latent-and-sensible-s.technology_status_summary_en: Thermal storage system combining a phase-change material encapsulated into a high thermal capacity medium (e.g. concrete). Today, the coupling of multiple storage media could enhance storage density by a factor of two to three.
tech_0560_combined-latent-and-sensible-s.market_dynamics_summary_en: Combined latent and sensible storage systems could meet the flexibility needs of thermal and electrical grids at a lower cost than latent or sensible storage units.
tech_0560_combined-latent-and-sensible-s.description: Thermal storage system combining a phase-change material encapsulated into a high thermal capacity medium (e.g. concrete). Today, the coupling of multiple storage media could enhance storage density by a factor of two to three.
tech_0560_combined-latent-and-sensible-s.NZErationale: Combined latent and sensible storage systems could meet the flexibility needs of thermal and electrical grids at a lower cost than latent or sensible storage units.

initiatives.description: German company Kraftblock has developed a solution used in some demonstrators

tech_0561_electrical-storage-for-buildin.technology_name: Electrical storage for building systems integration
tech_0561_electrical-storage-for-buildin.technology_name_zh: 建築系統整合用電力儲存
sector: Thermal storage for buildings and district heating
tech_0561_electrical-storage-for-buildin.technology_status_summary_zh: 電池（固態電池、鋰離子電池、氧化還原液流電池）是可儲存或釋放電能的電化學裝置。
tech_0561_electrical-storage-for-buildin.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 鑑於轉換損耗，在建築部門的適用性較低，其他類型儲存方式通常成本更低，也更符合建築能源需求的前景，然而電池儲存可應用於使用電動車以車輛對電網模式運作的建築中。
tech_0561_electrical-storage-for-buildin.technology_status_summary_en: Batteries (solid state battery, lithium-ion battery, redox flow battery) are electrochemical devices that can store or discharge electrical energy.
tech_0561_electrical-storage-for-buildin.market_dynamics_summary_en: Low applicability in the buildings sector given conversion losses. Other types of storage are generally cheaper and more promising given building energy needs. However, battery storage can be applied in buildings using battery electric vehicles in vehicle-to-grid mode.
tech_0561_electrical-storage-for-buildin.description: Batteries (solid state battery, lithium-ion battery, redox flow battery) are electrochemical devices that can store or discharge electrical energy.
tech_0561_electrical-storage-for-buildin.NZErationale: Low applicability in the buildings sector given conversion losses. Other types of storage are generally cheaper and more promising given building energy needs. However, battery storage can be applied in buildings using battery electric vehicles in vehicle-to-grid mode.

initiatives.description: Deployment of BESS in buildings in Europe reached 61 GWh in 2024 and is forecasted to grow rapidly over the coming years
Deployment of BESS in buildings in Australia hits 825 MWh two months into Australias home battery scheme

sector: Thermal storage for buildings and district heating
tech_0562_thermo-chemical-storage.technology_status_summary_zh: 基於可逆化學反應以吸收熱能的儲存裝置，熱能用於將化合物（「AB」）分解為兩種反應產物（「A」與「B」），反應物隨後重新結合時發生放熱逆反應，先前儲存的反應熱得以釋放，逆反應會釋放熱能，理論上可實現熱能的無損儲存。
tech_0562_thermo-chemical-storage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 對住宅建築而言是有前景的儲熱方式，具備高質量傳遞、快速反應時間與低成本。
tech_0562_thermo-chemical-storage.technology_status_summary_en: Storage device based on reversible chemical reaction which allows heat adsorptions. Thermal energy is used to dissociate compounds (“AB”) into two reaction products (“A” and “B”). Upon subsequent recombination of the reactants, an exothermic reverse reaction occurs and the previously-stored heat of reaction is released. A reverse reaction results in heat release. This allows for the theoretically loss-less storage of thermal energy.
tech_0562_thermo-chemical-storage.market_dynamics_summary_en: Promising way to store heat for residential buildings, with high mass transfer, fast reaction time and low cost.
tech_0562_thermo-chemical-storage.description: Storage device based on reversible chemical reaction which allows heat adsorptions. Thermal energy is used to dissociate compounds (“AB”) into two reaction products (“A” and “B”). Upon subsequent recombination of the reactants, an exothermic reverse reaction occurs and the previously-stored heat of reaction is released. A reverse reaction results in heat release. This allows for the theoretically loss-less storage of thermal energy.
tech_0562_thermo-chemical-storage.NZErationale: Promising way to store heat for residential buildings, with high mass transfer, fast reaction time and low cost.

initiatives.description: A UK research project is investigating the inclusion of thermochemical energy storage alongside rooftop PV to store heat for the winter months. It received £150K from the government for the project in 2022.
A research group at TU Wien are developing chemical storage systems of capacities up to 30 kW.

sector: Thermal storage for buildings and district heating
tech_0563_chilled-water-storage.technology_status_summary_zh: 冰水儲存系統在電網無壅塞時，透過氣/水/地源對水空調機組將冷水充能，此系統在尖峰時段將冷能恢復至配送系統，藉此降低尖峰負載。
tech_0563_chilled-water-storage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 與電網具綜效，可降低用戶電費支出，初始投資成本低。
tech_0563_chilled-water-storage.technology_status_summary_en: A chilled water storage system charges cold water thanks to an air/water/ground-to-water conditioning unit when there is no congestion in the electricity grid. The system restores the cooling to the distribution system during peak period, thus reducing the peak load.
tech_0563_chilled-water-storage.market_dynamics_summary_en: Synergies with electric grid, reduction in electricity spending for users, low initial investment cost.
tech_0563_chilled-water-storage.description: A chilled water storage system charges cold water thanks to an air/water/ground-to-water conditioning unit when there is no congestion in the electricity grid. The system restores the cooling to the distribution system during peak period, thus reducing the peak load.
tech_0563_chilled-water-storage.NZErationale: Synergies with electric grid, reduction in electricity spending for users, low initial investment cost.

sector: Thermal storage for buildings and district heating
tech_0564_hot-water-tank.technology_status_summary_zh: 熱水儲槽儲存衛生熱水，以滿足家戶日常需求。
tech_0564_hot-water-tank.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 便宜、可靠、使用壽命長、材料無毒，但能量密度較低且存在自放電現象。
tech_0564_hot-water-tank.technology_status_summary_en: A hot water tank stores sanitary hot water to meet household daily needs.
tech_0564_hot-water-tank.market_dynamics_summary_en: Cheap, reliable, long lifetime, non-toxic materials but with low energy density and self discharge.
tech_0564_hot-water-tank.description: A hot water tank stores sanitary hot water to meet household daily needs.
tech_0564_hot-water-tank.NZErationale: Cheap, reliable, long lifetime, non-toxic materials but with low energy density and self discharge.

sector: Thermal storage for buildings and district heating
tech_0565_vacuum-insulated-high-temperat.technology_status_summary_zh: 熱能由電阻產生，固態儲存介質採真空隔熱，與攝氏90度配送系統間的熱交換內建於產品中，此系統可能為直徑約1公尺、高2公尺的圓柱體，可承受高達20千瓦的電力輸入。
tech_0565_vacuum-insulated-high-temperat.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 安全、可回收、壽命20年、熱傳導率高、儲熱損失低於5%，成本有望降低，但較重（家用應用約1.5噸），效率不及熱泵（因使用電阻）。
tech_0565_vacuum-insulated-high-temperat.technology_status_summary_en: Heat is produced through an electric resistance, the solid state storage media is vacuum-insulated, and the heat exchange to the 90 °C distribution system is embedded in the product. The system could be a cylinder of around 1m-large and 2m-high that can draw up to 20 kW of electrical power.
tech_0565_vacuum-insulated-high-temperat.market_dynamics_summary_en: Safe, recyclable, 20-year lifetime, high thermal conductivity, heat storage losses <5%, potential to be less costly, but heavy (1.5 tonnes for domestic applications) and less efficient than heat pumps (as they use an electric resistance).
tech_0565_vacuum-insulated-high-temperat.description: Heat is produced through an electric resistance, the solid state storage media is vacuum-insulated, and the heat exchange to the 90 °C distribution system is embedded in the product. The system could be a cylinder of around 1m-large and 2m-high that can draw up to 20 kW of electrical power.
tech_0565_vacuum-insulated-high-temperat.NZErationale: Safe, recyclable, 20-year lifetime, high thermal conductivity, heat storage losses <5%, potential to be less costly, but heavy (1.5 tonnes for domestic applications) and less efficient than heat pumps (as they use an electric resistance).

initiatives.description: The vacuum super insulation (VSI) by German manufacturer Hummelsberger is capable of reducing heat loss by 80% compared to conventional water heaters.

tech_0566_high-temperature-latent-heat-s.technology_status_summary_zh: 潛熱儲存（LHS）利用材料相變過程中在恆溫下吸收或釋放的能量，多數情況下利用固/液相變，熔化用於儲熱，凝固用於釋熱，電力部門的應用包括太陽能熱電廠，讓電廠得以在日落後供電。水合鹽與石蠟系統已部分商業化，適用於攝氏100度以下（TRL 6-8），高溫潛熱儲存則需要不同材料。
tech_0566_high-temperature-latent-heat-s.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 間歇性再生能源整合程度提升，將需要電力與供熱系統的靈活整合，熱能儲存提供了讓供暖需求（包括較高溫供暖需求）也能去碳化的方法。
tech_0566_high-temperature-latent-heat-s.technology_status_summary_en: Latent heat storage (LHS) takes advantage of the energy absorbed or released at constant temperature during a phase change of the material. In most cases, solid/liquid phase change is utilised, with melting used to store heat and solidification used to release heat. Applications in the power sector are solar thermal power plants, allowing the plant to provide electricity after sunset. Salt hydrate and paraffin wax systems are partly commercialised for temperatures below 100 °C (TRL 6-8). High-temperature LHS with integrated finned-tube heat exchangers has been constructed and operated with variable phase-change temperatures between 140 °C and 305 °C (TRL 7).
tech_0566_high-temperature-latent-heat-s.market_dynamics_summary_en: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will call for a flexible integration of power and heating systems, and thermal energy storage offer means to also decarobinize the heating demand, including higher-temperature heating demands.
tech_0566_high-temperature-latent-heat-s.description: Latent heat storage (LHS) takes advantage of the energy absorbed or released at constant temperature during a phase change of the material. In most cases, solid/liquid phase change is utilised, with melting used to store heat and solidification used to release heat. Applications in the power sector are solar thermal power plants, allowing the plant to provide electricity after sunset. Salt hydrate and paraffin wax systems are partly commercialised for temperatures below 100 °C (TRL 6-8). High-temperature LHS with integrated finned-tube heat exchangers has been constructed and operated with variable phase-change temperatures between 140 °C and 305 °C (TRL 7).
tech_0566_high-temperature-latent-heat-s.NZErationale: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will call for a flexible integration of power and heating systems, and thermal energy storage offer means to also decarobinize the heating demand, including higher-temperature heating demands.

initiatives.description: MGA Thermal's demonstrator for steam-integrated latent heat Electro-Thermal Energy Storage went live in 2025. The compact demonstration unit (12m long, 3m wide, 4m tall) stores 5 MWh of energy with a 500kW thermal dispatch power. In addition, a pre-feasibility study on a 180 MWh system to deliver stam to an industrial site in Western Australia was completed, with operations targeted for late 2028.

tech_0567_ice-storage-latent-heat.technology_status_summary_zh: 潛熱儲存（LHS）利用材料相變過程中在恆溫下吸收或釋放的能量，多數情況下利用固/液相變，熔化用於儲熱，凝固用於釋熱，對低溫儲存而言，水（冰儲存）與水鹽溶液（適用於攝氏0度以下）已商業化並大規模部署，例如利用水在攝氏0度的相變儲存冷能。
tech_0567_ice-storage-latent-heat.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 間歇性再生能源整合程度提升，將需要電力與供熱系統的靈活整合，熱能儲存提供了讓供暖需求（包括較高溫供暖需求）也能去碳化的方法。
tech_0567_ice-storage-latent-heat.technology_status_summary_en: Latent heat storage (LHS) takes advantage of the energy absorbed or released at constant temperature during a phase change of the material. In most cases, solid/liquid phase change is utilised, with melting used to store heat and solidification used to release heat. For low temperature storage, water (ice storages) and aqueous salt solutions (for temperatures below 0 °C) have been commercialised and deployed on a large scale, e.g. the phase change of water at 0 °C is used for storage of cold for air conditioning and supply of process cold. Many low-temperature products using latent heat technology in buildings, mini-storage for food, and cooling for medication have been commercialised.
tech_0567_ice-storage-latent-heat.market_dynamics_summary_en: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will call for a flexible integration of power and heating systems, and thermal energy storage offer means to also decarobinize the heating demand, including higher-temperature heating demands.
tech_0567_ice-storage-latent-heat.description: Latent heat storage (LHS) takes advantage of the energy absorbed or released at constant temperature during a phase change of the material. In most cases, solid/liquid phase change is utilised, with melting used to store heat and solidification used to release heat. For low temperature storage, water (ice storages) and aqueous salt solutions (for temperatures below 0 °C) have been commercialised and deployed on a large scale, e.g. the phase change of water at 0 °C is used for storage of cold for air conditioning and supply of process cold. Many low-temperature products using latent heat technology in buildings, mini-storage for food, and cooling for medication have been commercialised.
tech_0567_ice-storage-latent-heat.NZErationale: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will call for a flexible integration of power and heating systems, and thermal energy storage offer means to also decarobinize the heating demand, including higher-temperature heating demands.

initiatives.description: The headquarter of JCPenney in Texas is equipped with an ice storage system since 1991. It generates more than a thousand tons of ice each night to cool the building during the day.

tech_0568_low-temperature-latent-heat-st.technology_status_summary_zh: 潛熱以相變材料儲存，利用與相變（通常由固態變為液態，或反之）相關的（比）潛熱，儘管此方式在高溫下效率較低，相變材料因其高儲能密度而具吸引力。
tech_0568_low-temperature-latent-heat-st.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 間歇性再生能源整合程度提升，將增加對靈活性與儲能的需求。鋰離子電池已廣泛部署，但成本及鋰供應較有限等問題，促使人們尋求替代技術，此外有時可能有多餘熱能可供利用。
tech_0568_low-temperature-latent-heat-st.technology_status_summary_en: Latent heat is stored using phase-change materials that take advantage of the (specific) latent heat associated with a phase transition, generally from solid to liquid to the other, though this is not as efficient at high temperatures. Phase-change materials are appealing because of their high energy storage density.
tech_0568_low-temperature-latent-heat-st.market_dynamics_summary_en: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will increase the need of flexibility and energy storage. While Li-ion batteries have been largely deployed, issues around costs and a more limited lithium availability, call for alternative technologies. In addition, sometimes excess heat may be available.
tech_0568_low-temperature-latent-heat-st.description: Latent heat is stored using phase-change materials that take advantage of the (specific) latent heat associated with a phase transition, generally from solid to liquid to the other, though this is not as efficient at high temperatures. Phase-change materials are appealing because of their high energy storage density.
tech_0568_low-temperature-latent-heat-st.NZErationale: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will increase the need of flexibility and energy storage. While Li-ion batteries have been largely deployed, issues around costs and a more limited lithium availability, call for alternative technologies. In addition, sometimes excess heat may be available.

tech_0569_molten-salts-storage.technology_status_summary_zh: 能量用於加熱儲存介質（如熔鹽），而不改變其相態，以熱能形式儲存並於需要時使用，可利用熔鹽儲存的熱能產生蒸汽驅動渦輪機發電，系統提供全額定輸出的時段可達8至24小時甚至更長，熔鹽是無機化合物，通常為硝酸鹽/亞硝酸鹽的混合物（如硝酸鉀與硝酸鈉的混合物）。
tech_0569_molten-salts-storage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 間歇性再生能源整合程度提升，將增加對靈活性與儲能的需求。鋰離子電池已廣泛部署，但成本及鋰供應較有限等問題，促使人們尋求替代技術，此外有時可能有多餘熱能可供利用。
tech_0569_molten-salts-storage.technology_status_summary_en: Energy is used to heat the storage medium, such as molten salt, without changing its phase, where it is stored as heat and used when needed. Electricity can be generated by using the heat stored in the molten salt to produce steam to drive a turbine. The period during which the system provides full rated output can range from eight to 24 hours or more. Molten salts are inorganic chemical compounds, typically a mixture of nitrate/nitrite salts (e.g. a mixture of potassium and sodium nitrate), which have high boiling points, low viscosity, low vapour pressure and high volumetric heat capacities, i.e. they require a relatively small storage tank. When selecting the chemical mixture, it is advantageous to have the lowest possible melting point and the highest possible boiling point to maximise the available temperature range for the molten salt. Salts that would normally be solid at ambient temperatures are maintained at temperatures above their melting points so that they are always in liquid, i.e. molten, form and can be heated to around 560°C. The efficiency of the system is maximised at higher temperatures, but the maximum operating temperature is limited by various factors such as corrosion, salt decomposition and salt vapour pressure. Molten salt storage is often associated with concentrated solar power (CSP) plants. The first large-scale implementation of this technology was the Andasol 1 CSP plant in Spain, which became operational in 2008. This was soon followed by Andasol 2 and Andasol 3 in 2009 and 2011 respectively. The storage system uses a mixture of 60% sodium nitrate and 40% potassium nitrate as the storage medium, and the three plants have a storage capacity of 1 010 MWh and 120 MW. Molten salts can also be used as stand-alone bulk thermal storage, known as Carnot batteries, where electricity is used to generate heat via a heat pump, which is stored in the molten salt and then connected to a turbine, which may be an existing one in a fossil fuel power station. Further research is aimed at reducing overall costs, in particular improving efficiency by increasing the operating temperature range of the molten salt.
tech_0569_molten-salts-storage.market_dynamics_summary_en: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will increase the need of flexibility and energy storage. While Li-ion batteries have been largely deployed, issues around costs and a more limited lithium availability, call for alternative technologies. In addition, sometimes excess heat may be available.

Electricity can be generated by using the heat stored in the molten salt to produce steam to drive a turbine. The period during which the system provides full rated output can range from eight to 24 hours or more. Further research is aimed at reducing overall costs, in particular improving efficiency by increasing the operating temperature range of the molten salt.
