While Li-ion batteries have been largely deployed, issues around costs and a more limited lithium availability, call for alternative technologies. In addition, sometimes excess heat may be available.

initiatives.description: Hyme Energy inaugurated their MOSS project, a demonstrator for molten salts storage. It has a 1 MWh storage capacity. They have a plan to develop a 200 MWh storage system based on the same technology for Arla, a dairy producer.

tech_0570_solids-storage.technology_status_summary_zh: 能量用於加熱固態儲存介質（如岩石、卵石、金屬或其他耐火材料），而不改變其相態，以熱能形式儲存，並於需要時作為熱或電使用，儲存單元填充固態儲存介質，熱傳流體透過其中循環，可用於高達攝氏約600度的高溫，固態儲存介質主要基於成本考量，因等質量固態材料成本可能低得多。
tech_0570_solids-storage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 間歇性再生能源整合程度提升，將需要電力與供熱系統的靈活整合，熱能儲存提供了讓供暖需求（包括較高溫供暖需求）也能去碳化的方法。
tech_0570_solids-storage.technology_status_summary_en: Energy is used to heat a solid storage medium, such as rocks, pebbles, metals or other refractory materials, without changing its phase, where it is stored as heat and used as heat or electricity when needed. The storage unit is packed with the solid storage medium through which a heat transfer fluid is circulated and can be used up to high temperatures (around 600°C). Solid storage media are considered mainly for cost reasons, as the cost of an equivalent mass of solid materials can be one or even two orders of magnitude lower than that of molten salts. Some solid storage materials also have a wider operating temperature range, freezing is not an issue, evaporation or leakage is not a problem. However, heating the solid is usually more difficult than heating a liquid such as a molten salt. A wide range of materials can be used as solid media storage. Any suitable candidate materials must be chemically and thermally stable and should be applicable over a wide temperature range. The maximum application temperature depends on the specific material and can be over 1000°C for ceramics such as magnesia bricks.
tech_0570_solids-storage.market_dynamics_summary_en: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will call for a flexible integration of power and heating systems, and thermal energy storage offer means to also decarbonise the heating demand, including higher-temperature heating demands.
tech_0570_solids-storage.description: Energy is used to heat a solid storage medium, such as rocks, pebbles, metals or other refractory materials, without changing its phase, where it is stored as heat and used as heat or electricity when needed. The storage unit is packed with the solid storage medium through which a heat transfer fluid is circulated and can be used up to high temperatures (around 600°C). Solid storage media are considered mainly for cost reasons, as the cost of an equivalent mass of solid materials can be one or even two orders of magnitude lower than that of molten salts. Some solid storage materials also have a wider operating temperature range, freezing is not an issue, evaporation or leakage is not a problem. However, heating the solid is usually more difficult than heating a liquid such as a molten salt. A wide range of materials can be used as solid media storage. Any suitable candidate materials must be chemically and thermally stable and should be applicable over a wide temperature range. The maximum application temperature depends on the specific material and can be over 1000°C for ceramics such as magnesia bricks.
tech_0570_solids-storage.NZErationale: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will call for a flexible integration of power and heating systems, and thermal energy storage offer means to also decarbonise the heating demand, including higher-temperature heating demands.

initiatives.description: Rondo Energy started operation of a 100 MWh industrial heat storage device. It received power for a solar PV plant to warm bricks over 1000°C and provides steam to nearby factories. The roundtrip efficiency is around 97%. They also installed a smaller unit in Thailand at 33 MWh, though this produces electricity from waste heat.

Eneco is installing a thermal battery in a crisp factory owned by PepsiCo. This system blows 800°C warm air onto steel slag to store the heat. There are plans for three more units if the demonstrator is successful.

Westinghouse was selected to build a 1.2 GWh pumped thermal energy storage facility in Alaska. It will use heat pumps to store heat in concrete blocks. A heat engine will then turn this heat back into electricity.

Antora raised USD 150 million to develop their thermal batteries. Their technology consists in blocks of carbon superheated to 2400°C. At this temperature glowing hot temperature, emitted radiations are converted into electricity by thermophotovoltaic panels, allowing for electricity production on top of heat.
EPRI completed the testing of a pilot concrete thermal energy storage system. It has a capacity of 10 MWh.
Elstor deployed they thermal energy storage solution to multiple companies in Finland, such as a 10 MWh unit for the Herkkumaa canned food factory.
Rondo Energy have begun construction of their thermal battery to SCG's cement plant in Thailand.

Heineken's brewery near Lisbon will soon be powered by a mix of renewable electricity (including an on-site 7MW solar plant) and a 100 MWh thermal battery supplied by Rondo Energy. The system is expected to go live in 2027

tech_0571_molten-metal-storage.technology_status_summary_zh: 對於極高溫熱能儲存，熔融金屬可作為固態儲存的替代方案，使用石墨等耐高溫材料容納並泵送液態金屬，可達到遠高於攝氏1000度的溫度，這些高溫帶來一項優勢：在此溫度下發出的輻射，可利用熱光伏電池直接轉化為電力，避免其他系統所需的蒸汽產生與渦輪機。
tech_0571_molten-metal-storage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 間歇性再生能源整合程度提升，將需要電力與供熱系統的靈活整合，熱能儲存提供了讓供暖需求（包括較高溫供暖需求）也能去碳化的方法。
tech_0571_molten-metal-storage.technology_status_summary_en: For very high temperature thermal energy storage, molten metal can be an alternative to solid storage. Temperatures vell above 1000°C can be reached using high-temperature resilient materials like graphite to contain and pump the liquid metal. Those high temperatures offer an advantage, the radiation emitted at such temperature can be converted directly into electricity using thermophotovoltaic cells, avoiding the need for vapour generation and turbines used in other systems.
tech_0571_molten-metal-storage.market_dynamics_summary_en: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will call for a flexible integration of power and heating systems, and thermal energy storage offer means to also decarbonise the heating demand, including higher-temperature heating demands.
tech_0571_molten-metal-storage.description: For very high temperature thermal energy storage, molten metal can be an alternative to solid storage. Temperatures vell above 1000°C can be reached using high-temperature resilient materials like graphite to contain and pump the liquid metal. Those high temperatures offer an advantage, the radiation emitted at such temperature can be converted directly into electricity using thermophotovoltaic cells, avoiding the need for vapour generation and turbines used in other systems.
tech_0571_molten-metal-storage.NZErationale: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will call for a flexible integration of power and heating systems, and thermal energy storage offer means to also decarbonise the heating demand, including higher-temperature heating demands.

initiatives.description: Fourth Power received USD 19 million of founding to build a 1MWh prototype of their molten tin, high temperature thermal energy storage technology. Molten tin will reach 2400°C and with the use of high efficiency thermophotovoltaic cell, they expect to store electricity with roundtrip efficiency of 50%.

tech_0572_metal-as-energy-carrier.technology_status_summary_zh: 金屬氧化時會釋放大量熱能，鐵或鋁以粉末形式，可作為能量載體用於產生工業所需的高溫熱能，或依需求發電，反應後氧化的金屬可回收，並利用再生能源還原為純態，完成循環，此類能量載體的優勢在於其密度高、處理安全，且已有現成基礎設施。值得注意的是，某些反應可能需要額外的處理步驟。
tech_0572_metal-as-energy-carrier.technology_status_summary_en: When oxidised, metals release a vast quantity of thermal energy. In a powder form, iron or aluminium could be used as energy carriers to produce high temperature heat for industry or for power production on demand. After the reaction, the oxidised metals can be recovered and remade into their pure form using renewable energy, completing the cycle. The advantage of such energy carrier is their density, the safety of handling and already existing infrastructure. To note that certain reactions can produce more than heat, for instance aluminium and water react to create heat and hydrogen than can be harnessed for further use.
tech_0572_metal-as-energy-carrier.description: When oxidised, metals release a vast quantity of thermal energy. In a powder form, iron or aluminium could be used as energy carriers to produce high temperature heat for industry or for power production on demand. After the reaction, the oxidised metals can be recovered and remade into their pure form using renewable energy, completing the cycle. The advantage of such energy carrier is their density, the safety of handling and already existing infrastructure. To note that certain reactions can produce more than heat, for instance aluminium and water react to create heat and hydrogen than can be harnessed for further use.

initiatives.description: SPIE and Metalot are partnering to produce a feasibility study of the use of iron as an energy carrier. This pilot study is focussed on a 200 kW heat system.
A-STEAM is a research program focussed on the production of hydrogen and heat using aluminium. They received € 2.5 million of funding from the EU in 2024.

tech_0573_chemical-reaction-storage.technology_status_summary_zh: 熱化學儲熱依賴可逆放熱/吸熱反應，以化學方式將熱能儲存於材料中，熱能用於將化合物（「AB」）分解為兩種反應產物（「A」與「B」），反應物隨後重新結合時發生放熱逆反應，先前儲存的反應熱得以釋放，理論上可實現熱能的無損儲存，依所選反應物不同，可能達到高溫。
tech_0573_chemical-reaction-storage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 間歇性再生能源整合程度提升，將需要電力與供熱系統的靈活整合，熱能儲存提供了讓供暖需求（包括較高溫供暖需求）也能去碳化的方法。
tech_0573_chemical-reaction-storage.technology_status_summary_en: Thermo-chemical heat storage relies on reversive exo/endotherm reactions to chemically store heat in a material. Thermal energy is used to dissociate compounds (“AB”) into two reaction products (“A” and “B”). Upon subsequent recombination of the reactants, an exothermic reverse reaction occurs and the previously-stored heat of reaction is released. This allows for the theoretically lossless storage of thermal energy, potentially at high temperature depending on the selected reactants.
tech_0573_chemical-reaction-storage.market_dynamics_summary_en: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will call for a flexible integration of power and heating systems, and thermal energy storage offer means to also decarobinize the heating demand, including higher-temperature heating demands.
tech_0573_chemical-reaction-storage.description: Thermo-chemical heat storage relies on reversive exo/endotherm reactions to chemically store heat in a material. Thermal energy is used to dissociate compounds (“AB”) into two reaction products (“A” and “B”). Upon subsequent recombination of the reactants, an exothermic reverse reaction occurs and the previously-stored heat of reaction is released. This allows for the theoretically lossless storage of thermal energy, potentially at high temperature depending on the selected reactants.
tech_0573_chemical-reaction-storage.NZErationale: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will call for a flexible integration of power and heating systems, and thermal energy storage offer means to also decarobinize the heating demand, including higher-temperature heating demands.

initiatives.description: The American company RedoxBlox is testing this technology with the objective of producing 1000-1500°C heat for industrial applications with their proprietary reactant material reaching energy density of 2500 MJ/m³.
The TechUPGRADE project began in 2023, funded by Horizon Europe with 5 million EUR of funding, is investigating low temperature thermochemical storage in materials such as salt hydrates.
RedoxBlox received USD 25 million to demonstrate its thermochamical storage technology.

tech_0574_sorption-process-storage.technology_status_summary_zh: 吸附製程可透過吸附（物理鍵結）與吸收（材料的吸收/溶解）來吸收與釋放熱能，在吸附中，反應物（如沸石與水）於充能時分離，重新結合後釋放反應熱，吸附原理既可用於熱能儲存，也可用於化學熱泵，吸附式熱泵已商業化，而具放電能力的吸附式熱能儲存仍在發展中。
tech_0574_sorption-process-storage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 間歇性再生能源整合程度提升，將需要電力與供熱系統的靈活整合，熱能儲存提供了讓供暖需求（包括較高溫供暖需求）也能去碳化的方法。
tech_0574_sorption-process-storage.technology_status_summary_en: Sorption processes can be used to absorb and release heat through adsorption (physical bonding) and absorption (uptake/dissolution of a material). In adsorption, the reactants (e.g. zeolite and water) are separated during charging and the heat of reaction is released after recombination. The sorption principle can be applied for thermal energy storage as well as for chemical heat pumps. Whereas sorption heat pumps are commercially available, sorption-based thermal energy storage with discharging cycles of more than 1 hour are still in research and development.
tech_0574_sorption-process-storage.market_dynamics_summary_en: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will call for a flexible integration of power and heating systems, and thermal energy storage offer means to also decarobinize the heating demand, including higher-temperature heating demands.
tech_0574_sorption-process-storage.description: Sorption processes can be used to absorb and release heat through adsorption (physical bonding) and absorption (uptake/dissolution of a material). In adsorption, the reactants (e.g. zeolite and water) are separated during charging and the heat of reaction is released after recombination. The sorption principle can be applied for thermal energy storage as well as for chemical heat pumps. Whereas sorption heat pumps are commercially available, sorption-based thermal energy storage with discharging cycles of more than 1 hour are still in research and development.
tech_0574_sorption-process-storage.NZErationale: A higher integration of variable renewable energy will call for a flexible integration of power and heating systems, and thermal energy storage offer means to also decarobinize the heating demand, including higher-temperature heating demands.

initiatives.description: ZAE Bayern tested sorption storage demonstrator with Hoffmeier Industrieanlagen. 2 cylinders containing 14 t of zeolite were used for the test, storing 160°C heat with a 78% roundtrip efficiency.

tech_0575_cross-linked-polyethylene-xlpe.technology_status_summary_zh: 交聯聚乙烯（XLPE）絕緣電纜是一種導體周圍主要絕緣層採用「交聯」聚乙烯的電力電纜——聚合物鏈以化學方式鍵結成3D網絡，相較傳統熱塑性PE，此舉可提升熱穩定性、機械強度與介電強度，XLPE可在較高溫度下運作（通常持續90度，緊急狀況下更高），讓相同導體尺寸能承載更多電流，同時也具防水性。
tech_0575_cross-linked-polyethylene-xlpe.market_dynamics_summary_zh: XLPE能在受限走廊中實現電網快速強化與地下化，從偏遠再生能源進行長距離大量輸電，並支持±525千伏的高容量離岸風電外送與互聯線路——減少限電並大規模整合間歇性發電。相較每回路更高的額定值可減少落地點數量與海床擾動。
tech_0575_cross-linked-polyethylene-xlpe.technology_status_summary_en:
Cross-Linked Polyethylene (XLPE) insulated cables are power cables where the main insulation around the conductor is polyethylene that has been “cross-linked” - the polymer chains are chemically bonded into a 3-D network. 
This boosts thermal stability, mechanical robustness and dielectric strength compared with conventional thermoplastic PE. XLPE can operate at higher temperatures (typically 90 °C continuous, higher in emergency), enabling more current for a given conductor size. It is also water-resistant, chemically stable and relatively light, which is important for long underground and submarine links. Thanks to these properties, XLPE has become the dominant insulation for medium- and high-voltage AC cables, and is now widely used for modern extruded HVDC cables up to 525 kV.
tech_0575_cross-linked-polyethylene-xlpe.market_dynamics_summary_en: XLPE enables rapid grid reinforcement and undergrounding in constrained corridors, long-distance bulk transfer from remote renewables, and high-capacity offshore wind export and interconnectors at ±525 kV - cutting curtailment and integrating variable generation at scale. Higher ratings per circuit reduce landfall count and seabed disturbance versus lower-voltage alternatives.
tech_0575_cross-linked-polyethylene-xlpe.description:
Cross-Linked Polyethylene (XLPE) insulated cables are power cables where the main insulation around the conductor is polyethylene that has been “cross-linked” - the polymer chains are chemically bonded into a 3-D network. 
This boosts thermal stability, mechanical robustness and dielectric strength compared with conventional thermoplastic PE. XLPE can operate at higher temperatures (typically 90 °C continuous, higher in emergency), enabling more current for a given conductor size. It is also water-resistant, chemically stable and relatively light, which is important for long underground and submarine links. Thanks to these properties, XLPE has become the dominant insulation for medium- and high-voltage AC cables, and is now widely used for modern extruded HVDC cables up to 525 kV.
tech_0575_cross-linked-polyethylene-xlpe.NZErationale: XLPE enables rapid grid reinforcement and undergrounding in constrained corridors, long-distance bulk transfer from remote renewables, and high-capacity offshore wind export and interconnectors at ±525 kV - cutting curtailment and integrating variable generation at scale. Higher ratings per circuit reduce landfall count and seabed disturbance versus lower-voltage alternatives.

initiatives.description: Installation of the first 400 kV XLPE cable in Berlin
First intra-city 500 kV cable and the first 500 kV cross-linked polyethylene insulated (XLPE) cable with a cross-sectional area of 2500 square millimetres - 17km
640 kV extruded HVDC cable systems - 640 kV extruded DC (Direct Current) cable system has been successfully tested and qualified by NKT Cables
Nemo Link - 400 kV XLPE UK-Belgium interconnector - 141.5 km
Larger, longer and more efficient: 525 kV XLPE HVDC is becoming the preferred cable technology for long distance power transmission
First large commercial 525 kV XLPE high-voltage DC 2GW transmission line and SuedLink will be the world’s longest HVDC underground power link.

tech_0576_superconducting-high-voltage.technology_status_summary_zh: 超導高壓可在數百公尺到數公里的短距離內，以最小的線損傳輸大量電力（GW等級，電流5-10千安，電壓最高350千伏），相較傳統電阻式導體。目前的超導高壓電線可傳導相同尺寸銅或鋁電線超過150倍的電力，目前已知在常壓下能導電的材料，於某溫度下會轉為超導狀態。
tech_0576_superconducting-high-voltage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 超導高壓輸電支持以遠低於傳統線路的損耗，透過既有或極少量新建走廊輸送更多電力，這可延緩或避免新建架空線路，減少環境與公眾接受度問題，同時滿足日益增長的電氣化與再生能源需求，由於HTS電纜輸送容量高。
tech_0576_superconducting-high-voltage.technology_status_summary_en:
Superconducting high-voltage allows transfer of large amounts of power (GW level, at currents of 5-10 kA and voltages up to 350 kV) over short distances from a few hundred meters up to few kilometres with minimal line losses compared to traditional resistive counterparts. Superconducting high-voltage wires today can conduct more than 150 times the power of copper or aluminium wires of the same dimensions.
Materials currently known to conduct at ordinary pressures become superconducting at temperatures far below ambient, and therefore require cooling. Metallic superconductors usually work below −200 °C. So called high-temperature superconductors (HTS) usually work at temperatures above 77 Kelvin (-196.2°C), the boiling point of liquid nitrogen.
tech_0576_superconducting-high-voltage.market_dynamics_summary_en: Superconducting high-voltage transmission supports moving more power through existing or minimal new corridors with far lower losses than conventional lines. This can defer or avoid new overhead lines, reducing environmental and public-acceptance issues while meeting growing electrification and renewable needs. Because HTS cables deliver high capacity at lower voltage, they can also remove some inner-city substations, saving land, materials, and transformer losses. Superconducting cables are therefore very well suited for dense areas such as city centres.
tech_0576_superconducting-high-voltage.description:
Superconducting high-voltage allows transfer of large amounts of power (GW level, at currents of 5-10 kA and voltages up to 350 kV) over short distances from a few hundred meters up to few kilometres with minimal line losses compared to traditional resistive counterparts. Materials currently known to conduct at ordinary pressures become superconducting at temperatures far below ambient, and therefore require cooling. Metallic superconductors usually work below −200 °C. So called high-temperature superconductors (HTS) usually work at temperatures above 77 Kelvin (-196.2°C), the boiling point of liquid nitrogen.

This can defer or avoid new overhead lines, reducing environmental and public-acceptance issues while meeting growing electrification and renewable needs. Because HTS cables deliver high capacity at lower voltage, they can also remove some inner-city substations, saving land, materials, and transformer losses. Superconducting cables are therefore very well suited for dense areas such as city centres.

initiatives.description: The Best Paths first-of-a-kind demonstration project funded by the EU and led by Nexans successfully completed in 2018, proving a 320 kV and 10 kA (total 3.2 GW) superconducting cable made of magnesium diboride material with a cryogenic helium cooling system.
400m, 10 kV AC - China's first superconducting cable completed in Shenzhen

A 190 kA electrical current was successfully transmitted through a superconducting busbar for the first time. Funded by the German government, the Demo200 project matched Trimet’s aluminium smelter current using Theva’s ceramic high-temperature superconductors operating at −196 °C. The technology could enable high-current industrial applications like electric arc furnaces and aluminium smelters to draw power with lower transmission losses.
2x 60m, 5.3MW, 1.5kV - First HTS Cable to installed on a Railway Network

tech_0577_ultra-high-voltage.technology_status_summary_zh: 電力系統在800千伏以上被視為特高壓（UHV），在相同傳輸功率下，較高電壓可降低導體中的電流，這使能量損耗降低（因多數損耗與電流相關），同時也可因所需導體直徑較小而節省部分材料，此技術可用於交流與直流，目前已有商業運行的±1100千伏UHV直流與1100千伏UHV交流線路。
tech_0577_ultra-high-voltage.market_dynamics_summary_zh: UHV輸電是實現淨零電力系統的關鍵推手，因其能以低損耗大規模連接偏遠、高容量的再生能源基地與需求中心。交流（無需變流器成本）與直流（損耗較低）之間的選擇，將取決於輸電專案的具體條件。
tech_0577_ultra-high-voltage.technology_status_summary_en:
A power system is considered ultra-high voltage (UHV) at 800 kV and above. A higher voltage results in a lower current in the conductor at the same power transmitted. This leads to lower energy losses as most of the losses are current dependent, but also can save some material due to a lower diameter of conductor needed.
The technology is available in alternating current and direct current. Currently there are lines up to ±1100 kV UHV DC and 1100 kV UHV AC in commercial operation.
tech_0577_ultra-high-voltage.market_dynamics_summary_en: UHV transmission is a key enabler for net-zero power systems because it connects remote, high-capacity renewable energy bases to demand centres at scale and with low losses. The choice between alternating current (AC, no cost for converters) and direct current (DC, lower losses) will depend on the specific conditions of a transmission project.
tech_0577_ultra-high-voltage.description:
A power system is considered ultra-high voltage (UHV) at 800 kV and above. A higher voltage results in a lower current in the conductor at the same power transmitted. This leads to lower energy losses as most of the losses are current dependent, but also can save some material due to a lower diameter of conductor needed.
The technology is available in alternating current and direct current. Currently there are lines up to ±1100 kV UHV DC and 1100 kV UHV AC in commercial operation.
tech_0577_ultra-high-voltage.NZErationale: UHV transmission is a key enabler for net-zero power systems because it connects remote, high-capacity renewable energy bases to demand centres at scale and with low losses. The choice between alternating current (AC, no cost for converters) and direct current (DC, lower losses) will depend on the specific conditions of a transmission project.

initiatives.description: Changji-Guquan ±1,100 kV UHV DC Transmission Project which is currently is the largest in the world - 3000km - 12 GW

In 2019, the ±800 kV UHVDC link was completed, transporting 4000MW over a distance of 2518 km between the Belo Monte Dam and the load centres in south-eastern Brazil such as Rio De Janeiro and São Paulo.
Zhundong – Wannan UHVDC Line is an 1100 kV overhead line with a length of 3324 km

The construction of 400 kV UHV AC transmission line from Wardha to Aurangabad was completed in 2021 in collaboration with Alstom India and Power Grid Corporation of India Limited (PGCIL). The line is designed to be upgraded to 1200 kV.
Ningxia-Hunan ±800 kV Ultra-high Voltage Direct Current (UHVDC) - 1616 km

tech_0578_htls-conductors.technology_status_summary_zh: 高溫低垂（HTLS）導體是先進的架空線導體，設計為在通常高達攝氏150-210度的運作溫度下承載明顯更高的電流，同時因熱膨脹極低而維持可接受的機械間隙，透過特殊芯材（碳纖維複合材料、鋁基質或殷鋼）與耐熱鋁合金實現，即使在高溫下也能限制垂度。相較傳統ACSR/ACSS，對既有線路重新導線可提升容量。
tech_0578_htls-conductors.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 電網須快速連接大量再生能源與新負載，速度往往超過新增電力走廊的核准與建造速度。研究顯示以HTLS重新導線通常可提供既有線路兩倍以上的容量，成本不到新建的一半，時間也不到一半，同時避免額外的土地徵用。
tech_0578_htls-conductors.technology_status_summary_en:
High Temperature / Low Sag (HTLS) conductors are advanced overhead line conductors designed to carry significantly higher current at operating temperatures typically up to 150–210 °C while maintaining acceptable mechanical clearance due to very low thermal expansion. They achieve this through special cores (carbon-fiber composite, aluminum-matrix or invar steel) and heat-resistant aluminum alloys, which limit sag even at high temperature.
Compared with conventional ACSR/ACSS, reconductoring existing lines with HTLS can often double ampacity without changing towers or rights-of-way, reducing permitting time and overall cost relative to building new lines.
tech_0578_htls-conductors.market_dynamics_summary_en: Grids must connect large volumes of renewables and new loads quickly, often faster than new rights-of-way can be permitted and built. Studies show that reconductoring with HTLS can typically deliver more than twice the capacity of existing lines at less than half the cost and in less than half the time of new construction, while avoiding additional land use and community impacts
tech_0578_htls-conductors.description:

Compared with conventional ACSR/ACSS, reconductoring existing lines with HTLS can often double ampacity without changing towers or rights-of-way, reducing permitting time and overall cost relative to building new lines.

Studies show that reconductoring with HTLS can typically deliver more than twice the capacity of existing lines at less than half the cost and in less than half the time of new construction, while avoiding additional land use and community impacts

initiatives.description: Amprion 400 kV trial line: 8.6 km extra-high-voltage trial line using composite-core HTLS conductor
345kV line was reconductored successfully doubling the line’s capacity in a land- and timeconstrained area
Reconductoring six 132 kV and 220 kV lines to support rapid renewable energy expansion

tech_0579_sulfur-hexafluoride-free-high-.technology_name: Sulfur hexafluoride-free high-voltage switchgear and substations
tech_0579_sulfur-hexafluoride-free-high-.technology_name_zh: 無六氟化硫高壓開關設備與變電站
tech_0579_sulfur-hexafluoride-free-high-.technology_status_summary_zh: 此指不使用六氟化硫（SF6）氣體作為絕緣或滅弧介質的高壓斷路器、開關設備與變電站，六氟化硫是一種強效溫室氣體（全球暖化潛勢為二氧化碳的23500倍），傳統上因其優異的介電特性用於高壓設備，無SF6技術使用真空滅弧室搭配潔淨空氣或新型氣體（如g³氟腈混合物，或二氧化碳/氧氣混合物）等替代方案，實現相同功能。
tech_0579_sulfur-hexafluoride-free-high-.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 無SF6開關設備可大幅減少電網的溫室氣體排放，傳統高壓設備會隨時間洩漏SF6，且SF6具有極長的大氣壽命，許多國家與電力公司如今已要求新專案採用SF6替代方案。
tech_0579_sulfur-hexafluoride-free-high-.technology_status_summary_en: This refers to high-voltage circuit breakers, switchgear, and substations that do not use SF₆ gas as the insulating or arc-quenching medium. Sulfur hexafluoride (SF₆) is a potent greenhouse gas (with 23,500× the GWP of CO2) traditionally used in HV equipment for its excellent dielectric properties. SF₆-free technologies use alternative solutions such as vacuum interrupters combined with clean air or new gases (e.g. fluoronitrile mixtures like g³, or CO2/O2 blends) to perform the same functions. For example, new GIS (gas-insulated switchgear) designs employ vacuum circuit breakers for arc interruption and air or climate-friendly gas at moderate pressure for insulation.
tech_0579_sulfur-hexafluoride-free-high-.market_dynamics_summary_en:
SF₆-free switchgear significantly reduces greenhouse gas emissions from the power grid. Traditional HV equipment leaks SF₆ over time, and SF₆ has an extremely long atmospheric lifetime.
Many countries and utilities are now mandating SF₆ alternatives in new projects.
tech_0579_sulfur-hexafluoride-free-high-.description: This refers to high-voltage circuit breakers, switchgear, and substations that do not use SF₆ gas as the insulating or arc-quenching medium. Sulfur hexafluoride (SF₆) is a potent greenhouse gas (with 23,500× the GWP of CO2) traditionally used in HV equipment for its excellent dielectric properties. SF₆-free technologies use alternative solutions such as vacuum interrupters combined with clean air or new gases (e.g. fluoronitrile mixtures like g³, or CO2/O2 blends) to perform the same functions. For example, new GIS (gas-insulated switchgear) designs employ vacuum circuit breakers for arc interruption and air or climate-friendly gas at moderate pressure for insulation.
tech_0579_sulfur-hexafluoride-free-high-.NZErationale:
SF₆-free switchgear significantly reduces greenhouse gas emissions from the power grid. Traditional HV equipment leaks SF₆ over time, and SF₆ has an extremely long atmospheric lifetime.
Many countries and utilities are now mandating SF₆ alternatives in new projects.

initiatives.description: World's first SF6-free 420 kV gas-insulated switchgear
Four new substations will be the first in Scandinavia to use the SF6-free technology at a voltage level of 420 kV
World's first SF6-free 550 kV gas-insulated switchgear

tech_0580_solid-state-transformers-ssts.technology_status_summary_zh: 固態變壓器（SST）是一種先進電力變壓器，以高功率電力電子與高頻變壓器取代傳統50/60赫茲鐵芯設計，透過多個階段轉換交流或直流輸入——通常包括交流/直流整流器、搭配高頻變壓器（HFT）的直流/直流高頻轉換器，以及直流/交流變頻器——以產生所需輸出，運作於數十千赫茲，讓SST得以更小更輕，此架構可實現電壓調節與其他功能。
tech_0580_solid-state-transformers-ssts.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 隨著電力系統演進以容納大比例的再生能源、儲能、電動車充電與分散式發電，電網需要變得更靈活、更動態且具備雙向流動能力，SST可高效介接交流與直流系統，支持高滲透率的間歇性再生能源與電動交通。
tech_0580_solid-state-transformers-ssts.technology_status_summary_en: A solid-state transformer (SST) is an advanced power transformer that replaces the traditional 50/60 Hz iron-core design with high-power electronics and high-frequency transformers. It converts AC or DC input through multiple stages - typically an AC/DC rectifier, a DC/DC high-frequency converter with a high-frequency transformer (HFT), and a DC/AC inverter - to produce the desired output. Operating at tens of kHz allows SSTs to be smaller and lighter. This architecture enables voltage regulation, bidirectional power flow, power factor correction, and DC outputs, effectively combining a transformer and power conditioner. SSTs can supply both AC and DC (e.g., for EV charging) and respond quickly to disturbances such as voltage sags and harmonics.
tech_0580_solid-state-transformers-ssts.market_dynamics_summary_en: As electricity systems evolve to accommodate large proportions of renewables, storage, EV charging and decentralised generation, the grids need to become more flexible, dynamic and capable of bidirectional flows. SSTs deliver the ability to efficiently interface AC and DC systems, support high penetration of variable renewables and electric mobility, and enable power quality and stability services that conventional transformers cannot provide. By reducing losses (due to higher efficiency and fewer conversion stages), reducing material footprint (smaller magnetic cores/less copper), and enabling novel grid topologies (MVDC networks, hybrid AC/DC micro-grids), SSTs support lower carbon emissions both directly and indirectly.
tech_0580_solid-state-transformers-ssts.description: A solid-state transformer (SST) is an advanced power transformer that replaces the traditional 50/60 Hz iron-core design with high-power electronics and high-frequency transformers. It converts AC or DC input through multiple stages - typically an AC/DC rectifier, a DC/DC high-frequency converter with a high-frequency transformer (HFT), and a DC/AC inverter - to produce the desired output. Operating at tens of kHz allows SSTs to be smaller and lighter. This architecture enables voltage regulation, bidirectional power flow, power factor correction, and DC outputs, effectively combining a transformer and power conditioner. SSTs can supply both AC and DC (e.g., for EV charging) and respond quickly to disturbances such as voltage sags and harmonics.
tech_0580_solid-state-transformers-ssts.NZErationale: As electricity systems evolve to accommodate large proportions of renewables, storage, EV charging and decentralised generation, the grids need to become more flexible, dynamic and capable of bidirectional flows. SSTs deliver the ability to efficiently interface AC and DC systems, support high penetration of variable renewables and electric mobility, and enable power quality and stability services that conventional transformers cannot provide. By reducing losses (due to higher efficiency and fewer conversion stages), reducing material footprint (smaller magnetic cores/less copper), and enabling novel grid topologies (MVDC networks, hybrid AC/DC micro-grids), SSTs support lower carbon emissions both directly and indirectly.

initiatives.description: Prototype of multiphase modular-multilevel-converter with 2 MW power rating and 17-level-output-voltage
EU Funding for ASSTRA which is an interdisciplinary training and research project that targets the development of advanced solid state transformer
EU Funding: Innovative HV Solid-State TrAnsformer for maximizing Renewable energy penetration in energy distribution and transmission systems
Funding for a 1 MVA, 13.8 kV to 415 V solid-state transformer to demonstrate at a utility substation

tech_0581_hvdc-power-transmission.technology_status_summary_zh: 高壓直流（HVDC）電力輸送系統使用直流電（而非更常見的交流電）輸送電力，可實現長距離高效輸電，並支持離岸風場整合，尤其適用於水下交流電纜不可行的大型遠距離離岸風場，最新技術發展讓小型HVDC系統具經濟效益，並引入靈活性等優勢。
tech_0581_hvdc-power-transmission.market_dynamics_summary_zh: HVDC可實現再生能源的高效長距離輸送——連接偏遠太陽能場、風場（尤其是離岸）與水力發電場址至用電中心，可減少輸電損耗與瓶頸，意味著相同輸送能量下發電需求更少、排放更低，HVDC連接線也可強化電網可靠性。
tech_0581_hvdc-power-transmission.technology_status_summary_en:
A high-voltage direct current (HVDC) electric power transmission system uses direct current (DC) for the transmission of electrical power instead of the more common alternating current (AC).  It allows efficient electricity transmission across long distances and supports offshore wind farm integration, particularly for large, distant offshore farms where underwater AC cabling is not feasible. 
Latest technology developments made smaller HVDC systems economical and introduced advantages such as fully controllable four-quadrant operation for independent, flexible active and reactive power control, flexible AC voltage control, contribution to network fault currents to support weak AC networks and the ability to black-start shut-down networks. Most HVDC links today run on voltages between 320 kV and 800 kV, but there are also installations up to 1100kV with transmission capacity of up to 12GW.
tech_0581_hvdc-power-transmission.market_dynamics_summary_en: HVDC enables efficient long-distance transport of renewable energy – connecting remote solar farms, wind farms (especially offshore), and hydro sites to consumption centers. It reduces transmission losses and bottlenecks, meaning fewer generation needs and lower emissions for the same delivered energy. HVDC links also strengthen grid reliability, allowing countries to share renewable resources e.g., sending excess daytime solar from one region to another, or wind power across borders
tech_0581_hvdc-power-transmission.description:
A high-voltage direct current (HVDC) electric power transmission system uses direct current (DC) for the transmission of electrical power instead of the more common alternating current (AC). Latest technology developments made smaller HVDC systems economical and introduced advantages such as fully controllable four-quadrant operation for independent, flexible active and reactive power control, flexible AC voltage control, contribution to network fault currents to support weak AC networks and the ability to black-start shut-down networks. Most HVDC links today run on voltages between 320 kV and 800 kV, but there are also installations up to 1100kV with transmission capacity of up to 12GW.

initiatives.description: First multi-terminal - New England Phase II HVDC - 2000 MW - 450 kV - 1105 km
Xingu-Rio Link - 4000 MW - 800 kV - 2544 km
Changji-Guquan UHVDC link - 12000 MW - 1100 kV - 3326 km

tech_0582_dynamic-line-rating.technology_status_summary_zh: 線路額定值表示輸電線路的載流能力，進而決定其最大可能輸送容量，這些值由導體尺寸與電阻、導體與地面距離，以及溫度、日照與風速等環境天氣條件等因素綜合計算得出。輸電線路傳統上以靜態線路額定值運作，假設保守條件以將線路故障風險降至最低，然而靜態額定值往往低估實際可用容量。
tech_0582_dynamic-line-rating.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 提升電網容量的替代方案不少（新建線路、儲能、潮流控制器、分散式能源資源與需量反應），但少有像動態線路容量評估（DLR）這樣近期可行、低成本的選項。
tech_0582_dynamic-line-rating.technology_status_summary_en:
Line ratings indicate the current carrying capacity and thus the maximum possible transmission capacity of a transmission line. They are calculated from a combination of factors such as conductor size and resistance, conductor distance to the ground and ambient weather conditions as temperature, solar irradiation and wind speed. 
Transmission lines are traditionally operated using a static line rating, assuming conservative conditions to minimize the risk of dangerous line failures. However, static line ratings cause significant under-utilisation of transmission assets, as conservative conditions rarely come to fruition beyond a few hours a day. 
Dynamic line rating systems change the amount of current that can flow through a line in response to e.g. real-time weather conditions and allow transmission system operators efficient and effective operation. This helps transmission line operators to manage congestion and increases a grid's resilience and reliability.
tech_0582_dynamic-line-rating.market_dynamics_summary_en: Alternatives exist for increasing grid capacity (building new lines, energy storage, power-flow controllers, distributed energy resources, and demand response), but few are near-term, low-cost options like Dynamic Line Rating (DLR).
tech_0582_dynamic-line-rating.description:

initiatives.description: The US DOE's Smart Grid Demonstration Program (SGDP) successfully demonstrated DRL technology in 2014 in New York (New York Power Authority) and Texas (Oncur Electric Delivery Company).
TenneT continues to unlock up to 30% more capacity on the grid using Dynamic Line Rating
National Grid has installed dynamic line rating (DLR) technology on more than 275 km of its overhead transmission lines
National Grid installs grid-enhancing technology allowing more renewable power to flow through existing transmission lines

tech_0583_smart-electricity-and-district.technology_name: Smart electricity and district energy network double smart grid (building demand response)
tech_0583_smart-electricity-and-district.technology_name_zh: 智慧電力與區域能源網絡雙重智慧電網（建築需量反應）
tech_0583_smart-electricity-and-district.technology_status_summary_zh: 雙重智慧電網整合智慧電力與區域能源網絡，充分利用能源負載間的綜效（尤其是電力、供暖與冷卻需求），並整合多元的再生能源（如光伏、太陽能熱、電轉熱）或廢能資源。
tech_0583_smart-electricity-and-district.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 提升系統效率，易於擴展，適用於多種密集混合用途街區。
tech_0583_smart-electricity-and-district.technology_status_summary_en: A double smart grid integrates a smart electricity and district energy network to fully exploit synergies among energy loads (e.g. especially for electricity, heating and cooling needs) and integrate a wide variety of renewable (e.g. PV, solar thermal, Power-to-Heat) or waste energy resources.
tech_0583_smart-electricity-and-district.market_dynamics_summary_en: Enhanced system efficiency, easily scalable and applicable to many dense, mix-use districts.
tech_0583_smart-electricity-and-district.description: A double smart grid integrates a smart electricity and district energy network to fully exploit synergies among energy loads (e.g. especially for electricity, heating and cooling needs) and integrate a wide variety of renewable (e.g. PV, solar thermal, Power-to-Heat) or waste energy resources.
tech_0583_smart-electricity-and-district.NZErationale: Enhanced system efficiency, easily scalable and applicable to many dense, mix-use districts.

tech_0584_hybrid-flexible-demand-and-bat.technology_name: Hybrid flexible demand and battery network (industry demand response)
tech_0584_hybrid-flexible-demand-and-bat.technology_name_zh: 混合式彈性需求與電池網絡（工業需量反應）
tech_0584_hybrid-flexible-demand-and-bat.technology_status_summary_zh: 混合網絡是一組耗能設備與電池的組合，共同為電網提供需量反應服務，利用智慧電網原則，系統依耗能設備的彈性用電能力智慧輪替使用，並以網絡電池填補任何缺口，藉此系統能在耗能工業無需必然在現場安裝電池的情況下確保可靠性。
tech_0584_hybrid-flexible-demand-and-bat.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 促使工業參與需量反應的技術，可提供靈活性服務，有助於提升間歇性再生能源整合至電網的比例，此組合概念相較個別企業獨立運作，能實現更穩健的靈活性供應。
tech_0584_hybrid-flexible-demand-and-bat.technology_status_summary_en: A hybrid network is a portfolio of energy-consuming equipment and batteries that come together to provide demand response services to the electricity grid. Using smart grid principles, the system intelligently rotates energy-consuming equipment based on their ability for flexible energy consumption, and fills in any gaps with the network's batteries. In this way, the system ensures reliability to energy-consuming industries without them necessarily needing to install batteries on-site.
tech_0584_hybrid-flexible-demand-and-bat.market_dynamics_summary_en: Technologies that enable industry to partake in demand response can provide flexibility services, thus assisting with increasing integration of variable renewable energy sources into the electricity grid. The portfolio concept enables more robust flexibility provision than individual companies can achieve in isolation.
tech_0584_hybrid-flexible-demand-and-bat.description: A hybrid network is a portfolio of energy-consuming equipment and batteries that come together to provide demand response services to the electricity grid. Using smart grid principles, the system intelligently rotates energy-consuming equipment based on their ability for flexible energy consumption, and fills in any gaps with the network's batteries. In this way, the system ensures reliability to energy-consuming industries without them necessarily needing to install batteries on-site.
tech_0584_hybrid-flexible-demand-and-bat.NZErationale: Technologies that enable industry to partake in demand response can provide flexibility services, thus assisting with increasing integration of variable renewable energy sources into the electricity grid. The portfolio concept enables more robust flexibility provision than individual companies can achieve in isolation.

initiatives.description: The technology was developed by the UK-based company GridBeyond. It is now being applied commercially in the United Kingdom, Ireland, United States, Australia and Japan. Their technology manages a total of 4.8 GW of load being managed.

tech_0585_virtual-net-metering-community.technology_name: Virtual net metering - community scale solar (building demand response)
tech_0585_virtual-net-metering-community.technology_name_zh: 虛擬淨計量－社區規模太陽能（建築需量反應）
tech_0585_virtual-net-metering-community.technology_status_summary_zh: 虛擬淨計量（VNM）是一種帳單抵扣系統，太陽能並非現場使用，而是由外部安裝並在訂戶間共享，在此情況下，訂戶可就其多餘發電量在電費帳單上獲得抵扣，社區太陽能是屋頂太陽能的替代方案，屋主共同出資建置一套為多戶提供電力的太陽能系統。
tech_0585_virtual-net-metering-community.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 由於2070年40%的太陽能光伏裝置容量將位於屋頂，社區規模太陽能為不符資格（或不願意）在屋頂安裝太陽能板的屋主提供了解決方案。
tech_0585_virtual-net-metering-community.technology_status_summary_en: Virtual net metering (VNM) is a bill crediting system in which solar is not used on-site but is instead externally installed and shared among subscribers. In this case, subscribers receive credits on their electricity bill for excess energy produced. Community solar is an alternative to rooftop solar wherein homeowners collectively pay for a solar system that provides power to multiple households.
tech_0585_virtual-net-metering-community.market_dynamics_summary_en: As 40% of solar PV capacity will be on rooftops in 2070, community-scale solar offers a solution for homeowners that do not qualify (or are not willing) to have solar panels on their roofs.
tech_0585_virtual-net-metering-community.description: Virtual net metering (VNM) is a bill crediting system in which solar is not used on-site but is instead externally installed and shared among subscribers. In this case, subscribers receive credits on their electricity bill for excess energy produced. Community solar is an alternative to rooftop solar wherein homeowners collectively pay for a solar system that provides power to multiple households.
tech_0585_virtual-net-metering-community.NZErationale: As 40% of solar PV capacity will be on rooftops in 2070, community-scale solar offers a solution for homeowners that do not qualify (or are not willing) to have solar panels on their roofs.

initiatives.description: Virtual net metering will be used by Athen's first energy community, Hyperion, to allow community members to consumer electricity from collectively owned ground-mounted photovoltaic plants outside the city.

tech_0586_battery-storage-system-with-gr.technology_name: Battery storage system with grid-forming inverter
tech_0586_battery-storage-system-with-gr.technology_name_zh: 搭配電網構建型變流器的電池儲能系統
tech_0586_battery-storage-system-with-gr.technology_status_summary_zh: 搭配電網構建型變流器的電池儲能系統是一種公用事業規模電池（目前通常為鋰離子），其電力電子設備能設定電網的電壓與頻率，而非僅是跟隨電網，與需要強電網才能鎖定運作的傳統「電網跟隨型」變流器不同，電網構建型電池運作方式類似虛擬同步發電機：提供合成慣量、短路強度及快速頻率與電壓控制，讓它們能穩定弱電網或高度再生能源電網。
tech_0586_battery-storage-system-with-gr.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 為電網提供穩定性，以實現高比例風能與太陽能光伏的電力系統，因為傳統以旋轉機械為基礎的發電機（如水力與火力電廠）所提供的部分系統服務，當這些傳統發電機在電力結構中占比縮小時，將需要補償。
tech_0586_battery-storage-system-with-gr.technology_status_summary_en: A battery storage system with a grid-forming inverter is a utility-scale battery (typically lithium-ion today) whose power electronics can set the grid’s voltage and frequency rather than just follow them. Unlike conventional “grid-following” inverters that need a strong grid to latch onto, grid-forming batteries behave like a virtual synchronous generator: they provide synthetic inertia, short-circuit strength and fast frequency and voltage control. This lets them stabilise weak or highly renewable grids, form microgrids during outages, and black-start sections of the network. Grid-forming batteries can co-locate with solar or wind farms, at substations, or inside industrial or community microgrids. As coal and gas plants retire, these batteries increasingly provide the “invisible” system services—such as inertia and system strength—that used to be delivered by rotating machines, unlocking higher penetrations of inverter-based renewables at lower cost and with fewer new transmission upgrades.
tech_0586_battery-storage-system-with-gr.market_dynamics_summary_en: Provide stability to the network to enable a power system with high shares of wind and solar PV, as some of the system services provided by traditional generators based on rotating machines (hydropower and thermal power plants, for example) will need compensation when these traditional generators play smaller roles in the electricity mix.
tech_0586_battery-storage-system-with-gr.description: A battery storage system with a grid-forming inverter is a utility-scale battery (typically lithium-ion today) whose power electronics can set the grid’s voltage and frequency rather than just follow them. Unlike conventional “grid-following” inverters that need a strong grid to latch onto, grid-forming batteries behave like a virtual synchronous generator: they provide synthetic inertia, short-circuit strength and fast frequency and voltage control. This lets them stabilise weak or highly renewable grids, form microgrids during outages, and black-start sections of the network. Grid-forming batteries can co-locate with solar or wind farms, at substations, or inside industrial or community microgrids. As coal and gas plants retire, these batteries increasingly provide the “invisible” system services—such as inertia and system strength—that used to be delivered by rotating machines, unlocking higher penetrations of inverter-based renewables at lower cost and with fewer new transmission upgrades.
tech_0586_battery-storage-system-with-gr.NZErationale: Provide stability to the network to enable a power system with high shares of wind and solar PV, as some of the system services provided by traditional generators based on rotating machines (hydropower and thermal power plants, for example) will need compensation when these traditional generators play smaller roles in the electricity mix.

initiatives.description: 5 battery energy storage systems with grid-forming capabilities were procured under the Phase 2 of the Stability Pathfinder Programme.

Dalrymple/ESCRI is proof of concept of virtual inertia and represents the worlds largest, grid connected micro/mini grid mostly acting as part of the main grid in South Australia. It can provide to the network 30 MW for 20 minutes out of its battery.
NSW first grid-scale battery fully operational - 50MW/75MWh
World’s Largest Grid-Forming Energy Storage Project Successfully Connected to the Grid - 300MW/1200MWh
State government, project partners inaugurate Germany’s first utility-scale grid-forming BESS - 21MW/55MWh

tech_0587_transactive-energy.technology_status_summary_zh: 交易型能源（TE）是一套以市場為基礎的控制機制，利用（近）即時的價格或其他價值信號，通常在配電層級協調電力供需，與電力公司對用戶的單向電價不同，裝置與參與者（分散式能源資源、建築、電動車、微電網、聚合商）依其偏好與限制條件對用電或供電進行競標，自動化市場引擎在遵守電網限制的同時清算這些競標。隨著分散式能源資源增加，此機制更顯重要。
tech_0587_transactive-energy.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 交易型能源對淨零電力系統高度相關，因其能大規模動員分散式靈活性，減少對化石燃料尖峰機組及過度電網強化的需求，透過向用戶與分散式能源資源揭露細緻的價格或價值信號，TE鼓勵負載轉移、在地再生能源自用及協調。
tech_0587_transactive-energy.technology_status_summary_en:
Transactive energy (TE) is a set of market-based control mechanisms that coordinate electricity supply and demand using price or other value signals in (near) real time, often at the distribution level. Instead of a one-way tariff from utility to customer, devices and actors (DERs, buildings, EVs, microgrids, aggregators) bid for consumption or injection based on their preferences and constraints, and an automated market engine clears these bids while respecting grid limits. 
With increasing DER penetration, TE is being explored as a way to unlock flexible demand, congestion relief, and local balancing, often combined with digital platforms, advanced metering and, in some pilots, blockchain-based settlement.wo-way communication, advanced metering infrastructure, remote sensing and control technologies on the grid, and software trading platforms.
tech_0587_transactive-energy.market_dynamics_summary_en: Transactive energy is highly relevant for net-zero power systems because it can mobilize distributed flexibility at scale, reducing the need for fossil-fuel peakers and oversized network reinforcements. By exposing customers and DERs to granular price or value signals, TE encourages load shifting, self-consumption of local renewables, and coordinated operation of storage and EVs, which collectively reduce curtailment and integrate higher shares of variable wind and solar

tech_0587_transactive-energy.NZErationale: Transactive energy is highly relevant for net-zero power systems because it can mobilize distributed flexibility at scale, reducing the need for fossil-fuel peakers and oversized network reinforcements. By exposing customers and DERs to granular price or value signals, TE encourages load shifting, self-consumption of local renewables, and coordinated operation of storage and EVs, which collectively reduce curtailment and integrate higher shares of variable wind and solar

initiatives.description: Lumenaza’s “utility-in-a-box” energy platform enables P2P energy sharing and communities on a local, regional and national level. The software connects producers of electricity with consumers, controls demand and supply (e.g., by loading batteries) and includes balance group management, aggregation, billing and visualisation of energy flows. It allows energy communities to participate in electricity market design.

The Pacific Northwest Demonstration Project is a 5-year U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) funded research and development project created for the purpose of exploring transactive energy concepts at the regional scale that was completed in June 2015. The project involving more than 60,000 metered customers, included 11 utilities, two universities, and multiple technology companies to span five Pacific Northwest states: Washington, Oregon, Idaho, Montana, and Wyoming.

Residents of Park Slope and the adjacent Gowanus and Boerum Hill neighbourhoods created the Brooklyn microgrid LO3, which is one of the first implementations of transactive platforms based on distributed ledger technology. In April 2016, first transactions took place between neighbours without their own solar systems and those who produced excess solar power.

Transactive Energy Initiative, Medellin: The energy trading pilot in Medellín, as part of the Transactive Energy Colombia Initiative. It consists of a virtual microgrid with thirteen participants connected by smart meters through a virtual trading app which allows participants to track their consumption, generation, and how surplus energy is allocated to other participants in the virtual market.

tech_0588_virtual-inertia.technology_status_summary_zh: 傳統電力系統包含大量以系統頻率運轉的旋轉機械發電廠（同步發電機），在需求、供應或系統穩定性突然變化時提供強大的慣量，太陽能光伏與風場等非同步發電機占比提升，導致系統慣量下降、頻率不穩定性增加，虛擬慣量可作為因應此問題的解決方案。
tech_0588_virtual-inertia.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 虛擬慣量將需要持續發展，在風能與太陽能滲透率特別高、其他靈活性資源（如互聯或其他輸電限制）可用性較低，或需求側靈活性資源匹配度較差的地區，此技術將格外重要。
tech_0588_virtual-inertia.technology_status_summary_en:
Conventional power systems include a large numbers of power plants with rotating machines that operate at system frequency (synchronous generators), that provide strong inertia to the system in case of sudden changes in demand, supply or system stability in general. 
The increase of share of non-synchronous generators in the form of solar photovoltaics and wind farms results in a decrease of system inertia and more frequency instability. Virtual inertia can be a solution that addresses these concerns, when utilised with appropriate control structures and technologies such as battery energy storage or an enhanced STATCOM system with supercaps storage. Virtual inertia can also be provided by variable renewables by coupling short term energy storage together with a power inverter/converter and a proper grid forming mechanism. This is known as virtual synchronous generator, virtual synchronous machine or synchronverters.
tech_0588_virtual-inertia.market_dynamics_summary_en: Virtual inertia will need to continually develop. It will be important in regions that achieve a particularly high penetration of wind and solar, and that have less availability of other flexibility resources such as interconnection, or other constraints to transmission, or a poorer match of demand-side flexibility resources.

Dalrymple/ESCRI is proof of concept of virtual inertia and represents the worlds largest, grid connected micro/mini grid mostly acting as part of the main grid in South Australia. It can provide to the network 30 MW for 20 minutes out of its battery.

Grid Stability: Nidec Conversion and 50Hertz lead with Second-Generation STATCOM project near Berlin
The world's first E-STATCOM innovates grid stability, enabling a renewable-ready power grid that proves resilience and sustainability are possible

tech_0589_virtual-power-plants.technology_status_summary_zh: 虛擬電廠是分散式能源資源（如小型發電機、電池、需量反應負載、電動車等）的聚合，透過軟體協調，在電力系統中作為統一且靈活的資源運作，與單一電廠不同，虛擬電廠可地理上分散於多個場址，但從電網角度而言，其編排方式能如單一電廠般提供服務——例如按排程提供特定發電輸出，或調整輸出。
tech_0589_virtual-power-plants.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 虛擬電廠使分散式再生能源與彈性負載得以集體表現如可靠電廠，這對高再生能源電網至關重要，透過解決「眾多小單元」問題，讓分散式能源資源得以大規模整合——聚合可讓例如1萬套屋頂太陽能加電池系統取代一座燃氣尖峰機組。
tech_0589_virtual-power-plants.technology_status_summary_en: A Virtual Power Plant is an aggregation of distributed energy resources (DERs) (such as small generators, batteries, demand response loads, EVs, etc.) coordinated through software to operate as a unified and flexible resource in the power system. Unlike a single power plant, a VPP can be geographically dispersed across many sites, but from the grid’s perspective, it’s orchestrated to deliver services like a single plant would – e.g., providing a certain power output on schedule, or adjusting output up/down on command. VPPs usually involve an ICT platform that monitors the status of each asset and sends control signals based on market or grid needs. There are supply-side VPPs (bundling generation like rooftop PV, micro-turbines, etc.), demand-side VPPs (controllable loads), or mixed. They participate in energy markets and ancillary service markets.
tech_0589_virtual-power-plants.market_dynamics_summary_en: VPPs enable distributed renewables and flexible loads to collectively perform like reliable power plants, which is essential for a high-renewables grid. They help incorporate DER at scale by solving the “many small pieces” problem - aggregation provides a way for, say, 10,000 rooftop solar-plus-battery systems to replace a gas peaker because the VPP can guarantee a certain output or reduction when needed.

tech_0590_flexible-alternating-current-t.technology_status_summary_zh: 彈性交流輸電系統（FACTS）是一系列技術的統稱，這些技術能提供無功功率支援、增強可控性、改善穩定性並提升交流輸電系統的輸電能力：這是因應間歇性再生能源、分散式發電及新電氣化需求來源演進的關鍵服務，串聯補償系統可提升輸電能力，當閘流體控制的元件被使用時。
tech_0590_flexible-alternating-current-t.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 協助操作者透過強化弱電網區域並提升既有走廊的輸送上限，更快連接更多再生能源，往往可避免或延緩面臨核准與社會接受度障礙的新建架空線路，靜態同步補償器（STATCOM）、靜態無功補償器（SVC）與串聯補償提供的動態電壓與穩定性支援，有助於維持可靠性。
tech_0590_flexible-alternating-current-t.technology_status_summary_en:
Flexible Alternating Current Transmission Systems (FACTS) is an umbrella term for a suite of technologies that have the ability to provide reactive power support, enhance controllability, improve stability and increase power transfer capability of AC transmission systems: Key services to accommodate the evolution towards variable renewables, distributed generation and newly electrified sources of demand.
Series compensation systems allow for the increase of power transfer capabilities, when thyristor control as well as load flow and grid control is added. Synchronous condensers provide inertia and both static and dynamic support to the overall system. Static Synchronous compensators use voltage source converters to provide reactive power support at many different voltage levels. Static VAr compensators provide a combination of power transfer capacities. Mechanically switched capacitor damping networks are highly economical for providing reactive power compensation under steady state conditions.
tech_0590_flexible-alternating-current-t.market_dynamics_summary_en:
Supprts operators to connect more renewables faster by strengthening weak grid areas and increasing transfer limits on existing corridors, often avoiding or deferring new overhead lines that face permitting and social-acceptance barriers. 
Dynamic voltage and stability support from STATCOMs, SVCs and series compensation helps maintain reliability as synchronous generators are retired and replaced with inverter-based renewables, thereby addressing challenges such as low short-circuit strength, voltage instability and oscillations.

tech_0591_hvdc-breaker.technology_status_summary_zh: 高壓直流斷路器可透過將點對點HVDC連接轉化為網絡，實現高壓直流線路的擴展，這將提升可靠性、實現負載平衡、降低輸電損耗，並促進跨境能源交易，高壓直流斷路器至關重要，因為當某條線路發生故障時，即使需要處理極高功率，斷路器也能切斷能源將其隔離，而其餘輸電系統仍能維持運轉。
tech_0591_hvdc-breaker.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 高壓直流斷路器可透過將點對點HVDC連接轉化為網絡，實現高壓直流線路的擴展，這將提升可靠性、實現負載平衡、降低輸電損耗，並促進跨境能源交易。
tech_0591_hvdc-breaker.technology_status_summary_en: HVDC circuit breakers can enable the expansion of high-voltage direct current lines by tuning HVDC point-to-point connections into a network. This would improve reliability, enable load balancing, reduce transmission losses and facilitate cross-border energy trading. HVDC circuit breakers are crucial because, in the event of a fault on one of the lines, they can isolate it by cutting off the energy, even when extremely high power is required, while the rest of the transmission system can keep the energy flowing.
tech_0591_hvdc-breaker.market_dynamics_summary_en: HVDC circuit breakers can enable the expansion of high-voltage direct current lines by turning HVDC point-to-point connections into a network. This would improve reliability, enable load balancing, reduce transmission losses and facilitate cross-border energy trading.
tech_0591_hvdc-breaker.description: HVDC circuit breakers can enable the expansion of high-voltage direct current lines by tuning HVDC point-to-point connections into a network. This would improve reliability, enable load balancing, reduce transmission losses and facilitate cross-border energy trading. HVDC circuit breakers are crucial because, in the event of a fault on one of the lines, they can isolate it by cutting off the energy, even when extremely high power is required, while the rest of the transmission system can keep the energy flowing.
tech_0591_hvdc-breaker.NZErationale: HVDC circuit breakers can enable the expansion of high-voltage direct current lines by turning HVDC point-to-point connections into a network. initiatives.description: PROMOTioN: Aiming to unlock the full potential of Europe's offshore resources, PROMOTioN addresses technical, legal, regulatory, economic and financial barriers to the implementation of a meshed offshore HVDC transmission grid.
Full-scale, third party tests on Hitachi Energy's Hybrid high-voltage direct current (HVDC) breaker, carried out in the KEMA Laboratories

Zhangbei flexible DC power grid test demonstration project: Applies HVDC transmission technology to connect 4 converter stations in Zhangbei, Kangbao, Fengning and Beijing with a rated voltage of ±500kV and a total converter power of 9 GW to a DC power grid including DC circuit breakers.

tech_0592_smart-inverter.technology_status_summary_zh: 智慧變流器是一種電力電子轉換器，不僅將太陽能光伏、電池或電動車充電器的直流電轉為交流電，還能提供現代併網標準（如IEEE 1547-2018）所定義的電網支援功能，這些功能包括自主電壓與頻率支援（Volt-VAR、Volt-Watt、頻率-瓦特）、故障穿越、軟啟動、爬升速率控制，以及與電力公司或聚合商通訊以進行遠端配置與調度的能力。與舊型變流器不同，智慧變流器具備雙向通訊能力。
tech_0592_smart-inverter.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 智慧變流器是實現分散式與公用事業規模再生能源高滲透率的關鍵推手，透過提供在地電壓與頻率支援，提升既有配電饋線的承載容量，減少或延緩成本高昂的電網強化，並讓更多太陽能光伏與儲能能快速併網。
tech_0592_smart-inverter.technology_status_summary_en:
Smart inverters are power electronic converters that not only convert DC from solar PV, batteries or EV chargers into AC, but also provide grid-support functions defined in modern interconnection standards such as IEEE 1547-2018. These functions include autonomous voltage and frequency support (Volt-VAR, Volt-Watt, frequency-Watt), fault ride-through, soft start, ramp-rate control, and the ability to communicate with utilities or aggregators for remote configuration and dispatch. 
Unlike legacy “grid-following” inverters that simply shut down when the grid deviates from nominal conditions, smart inverters can actively stabilize local voltage and frequency, increase distribution-level hosting capacity for renewables, and provide synthetic inertia when coupled with advanced control schemes and storage. Large numbers of smart inverters can be operated autonomously, either statically or dynamically reacting to changes on the grid, or in the future remotely controlled through active and reactive power management to provide additional services to the distribution (or transmission) operator.
tech_0592_smart-inverter.market_dynamics_summary_en: Smart inverters are critical enablers for achieving high penetration of distributed and utility-scale renewables. By providing local voltage and frequency support, they increase the hosting capacity of existing distribution feeders, reducing or deferring costly grid reinforcements and enabling more PV and storage to connect quickly.

initiatives.description: BESS co-located Wind Farm in South Australia. 100 MW/129 MWh provided energy and FCAS Installed in 2017. In 2020 further expanded to 150 MW/194 MWh.

Europe: In Europe, most of the requirements currently applicable to inverter-based resources were drawn up nationally and in response to local needs. This white paper provides an introduction, commentary, and selected verbatim excerpts of the Network Code on Requirements for Generators (NC-RfG), a new regulation of the European Union (EU) that intends to address these differences by setting harmonized interconnection rules, including unified requirements for smart inverter functions. The code, which took effect in May 2016, will be applicable to all newly connected energy resources in 40+ European countries, including non-EU members, starting May 2019. It will supersede any existing or new national legislation and prevail over any standard. Advanced Grid Support Functions for Smart Inverters: Toward a Unified Regulatory Framework in Europe

The new inverter standard AS/NZS 4777.2:2020, released on December 18, 2020, has new inclusions to address grid stability issues. First, inverters are required to have Volt-Watt and Volt-Var functions available and enabled by default. The default setpoint reference values for the power quality response curves are configured into four regional settings: Australia A, Australia B, Australia C and New Zealand.

In the past few years, key solar markets including California (Rule 21)  have required all new inverters to come equipped with key advanced capabilities enabled by the latest standards requiring that inverters turn on some smart functions, starting with relatively simple, autonomous grid-stabilizing features.

tech_0593_power-grid-equipment-monitorin.technology_status_summary_zh: 電網設備監測系統利用感測器、智慧電子裝置（IED）、通訊與分析平台，即時追蹤電網資產的健康狀況與負載，涵蓋輸電至配電層級的變壓器、開關設備、架空線、電纜、電容器及其他變電站設備，典型量測項目包括溫度、振動、局部放電、油氣品質、機械位置、電流與電壓波形，以及環境條件。
tech_0593_power-grid-equipment-monitorin.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 電網設備監測系統是高再生能源、電氣化能源系統的關鍵推手，透過提升資產健康狀況與即時容量的可見性，支持既有線路與變壓器的更高利用率，減少新建及相關材料與土地使用需求，及早故障偵測與狀態監測也有助於降低維護成本。
tech_0593_power-grid-equipment-monitorin.technology_status_summary_en: Power grid equipment monitoring systems use sensors, intelligent electronic devices (IEDs), communications and analytics platforms to track the health and loading of grid assets in real time. They cover transformers, switchgear, overhead lines, cables, capacitors and other substation equipment from transmission level down to distribution. Typical measurements include temperature, vibration, partial discharge, oil and gas quality, mechanical position, current and voltage waveforms, plus environmental data such as wind and ambient temperature. These data streams are collected via SCADA, digital substations and IoT gateways and processed by on-premise or cloud-based asset performance management (APM) platforms that estimate asset health, remaining life and risk of failure. The result is a shift from time-based to condition-based maintenance, fewer truck rolls, earlier fault detection and more dynamic operation of existing infrastructure, including grid-enhancing technologies like dynamic line rating for overhead lines.
tech_0593_power-grid-equipment-monitorin.market_dynamics_summary_en: Power grid equipment monitoring systems are critical enablers of a high-renewables, electrified energy system. By improving visibility of asset health and real-time capacity, they support higher utilization of existing lines and transformers, reducing the need for new build and associated materials and land use. Early fault detection and condition-based maintenance lower outage rates and extend asset lifetimes, reducing embodied emissions from manufacturing replacements and minimizing the risk of blackouts that could disrupt electrified heating, transport and industry.
tech_0593_power-grid-equipment-monitorin.description: Power grid equipment monitoring systems use sensors, intelligent electronic devices (IEDs), communications and analytics platforms to track the health and loading of grid assets in real time. They cover transformers, switchgear, overhead lines, cables, capacitors and other substation equipment from transmission level down to distribution. Typical measurements include temperature, vibration, partial discharge, oil and gas quality, mechanical position, current and voltage waveforms, plus environmental data such as wind and ambient temperature. These data streams are collected via SCADA, digital substations and IoT gateways and processed by on-premise or cloud-based asset performance management (APM) platforms that estimate asset health, remaining life and risk of failure. The result is a shift from time-based to condition-based maintenance, fewer truck rolls, earlier fault detection and more dynamic operation of existing infrastructure, including grid-enhancing technologies like dynamic line rating for overhead lines.
