tech_0618_electrification-of-mining-oper.technology_status_summary_en: Technologies enabling the electrification of mining operations, including transport (in-site haul trucks), drilling and monitoring, among others.
tech_0618_electrification-of-mining-oper.market_dynamics_summary_en: Electrification of new mines could decrease their local environmental impact, increase mine competitiveness thanks to the greater efficiency of electrified processes, and decreased fuel and maintenance costs. Also, electric mining equipment are beneficial for workers’ health and safety thanks to reduced air and noise pollution, especially in underground mines, and to reduce the need for underground ventilation and cooling systems.
tech_0618_electrification-of-mining-oper.description: Technologies enabling the electrification of mining operations, including transport (in-site haul trucks), drilling and monitoring, among others.
tech_0618_electrification-of-mining-oper.NZErationale: Electrification of new mines could decrease their local environmental impact, increase mine competitiveness thanks to the greater efficiency of electrified processes, and decreased fuel and maintenance costs. Also, electric mining equipment are beneficial for workers’ health and safety thanks to reduced air and noise pollution, especially in underground mines, and to reduce the need for underground ventilation and cooling systems.

initiatives.description: The Australian company Fortescue plans to spend $2.8 billion to electrify mining fleet.
A trolley Line for Komatsu electric Dump trucks was commissioned in the Namibian Uranium Mine at Husab
Sandvik begins trials of its largest BEV underground mining truck with a battery self-swapping feature.
China Huaneng Group commissioned the world's first fleet of 100 autonomous, all-electric mining trucks at the Yimin open-pit mine in Inner Mongolia

tech_0619_phytomining.technology_status_summary_zh: 部分稱為超積累植物的植物，具備在組織中濃縮金屬離子的能力，植物採礦是收割這些植物以萃取其中蘊含的金屬，此方式可讓大型、低品位礦床（傳統採礦效率低下之處）得以開採，環境影響較低、排放較少，但每噸金屬的耗水量可能高於傳統採礦，由於富含金屬的土壤通常具生態毒性，植物採礦不會對生態系統造成額外破壞。
tech_0619_phytomining.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 全球可能存在廣大地區可透過植物採礦萃取關鍵礦物，但此潛力的規模仍在評估中，此技術也可用於土壤整治。
tech_0619_phytomining.technology_status_summary_en: Some plants, called hyperaccumulators, have the capacity to concentrate metal ions in their tissues. Phytomining consists of harvesting those plants to extract the embedded metals. This allows for the exploitation of large, low-grade deposits where traditional mining is inefficient, with a lower environmental impact and fewer emissions. But water consumption per tonne of metal may be greater than in traditional mining. Because metal-rich soils are usually ecotoxic, phytomining would not be in competition with agriculture, nor require extensive deforestation. After years or decades of operation, soils could be returned as arable land.
tech_0619_phytomining.market_dynamics_summary_en: There could be vast areas in the world where critical minerals could be extracted through phytomining, but the scale of this potential is still under examination. This technology could also be employed for soil remediation.
tech_0619_phytomining.description: Some plants, called hyperaccumulators, have the capacity to concentrate metal ions in their tissues. Phytomining consists of harvesting those plants to extract the embedded metals. This allows for the exploitation of large, low-grade deposits where traditional mining is inefficient, with a lower environmental impact and fewer emissions. But water consumption per tonne of metal may be greater than in traditional mining. Because metal-rich soils are usually ecotoxic, phytomining would not be in competition with agriculture, nor require extensive deforestation. After years or decades of operation, soils could be returned as arable land.
tech_0619_phytomining.NZErationale: There could be vast areas in the world where critical minerals could be extracted through phytomining, but the scale of this potential is still under examination. This technology could also be employed for soil remediation.

initiatives.description: Genomines is developing phytomining technologies and achieved production of a few kilogrammes of battery-grade nickel from plant fields. The company is also working on genetically-enhanced plants (already demonstrated in lab conditions) to increase the amount of mineral they can accumulate.
A two years field experiments studied the efficiency and potential of co-cropping nickel-hyperaccumulator (Odontarrhena chalcidica) and a legume (Vicia sativa)
Scientific review of phytomining.

A 2 millions euros European project, LIFE - AGROMINE, carried out between 2016 and 2021 aimed to demonstrate a non-destructive phytomining approach for the recovery of high-value metals (e.g. Ni) from sub-economic metal ores.

Metalplant, an US-based phytomining startup, conducted large-scale field trials in Albania to produce nickel by cultivating the hyperaccumulator Odontarrhena chalcidica, harvesting and processing the biomass into nickel sulfate

tech_0620_automatic-battery-recycling.technology_status_summary_zh: 讓機器分離電池可降低人工成本，並減少工人面臨的風險，這需要複雜的機器與AI，因為電池設計的異質性及缺乏可拆解性設計，增加了此過程的複雜度，也是一項障礙。
tech_0620_automatic-battery-recycling.technology_status_summary_en: Having machines separating batteries reduces labour costs as well as the risks encountered by workers. This requires complex machines and AI as the heterogeneity of battery design and lack of design for disassembly increases the complexity and is a barrier to this process.
tech_0620_automatic-battery-recycling.description: Having machines separating batteries reduces labour costs as well as the risks encountered by workers. This requires complex machines and AI as the heterogeneity of battery design and lack of design for disassembly increases the complexity and is a barrier to this process.

initiatives.description: Researchers at the Department of Energy’s Oak Ridge National Laboratory have developed a robotic disassembly system for spent electric vehicle battery packs to safely and efficiently recycle and reuse critical materials while reducing toxic waste.
A comprehensive review on electric vehicle battery robotised disassembly is published.
A prototype X-ray–based sensor system has been developed in Germany to sort damaged batteries that may pose safety risks during recycling.

tech_0621_ev-battery-reuse-in-bess.technology_name_zh: 電動車電池於電池儲能系統中重複利用
tech_0621_ev-battery-reuse-in-bess.technology_status_summary_zh: 到達第一次使用壽命終點的電動車電池，可重新用於家用充電器或固定式電池儲能系統，此方法讓電池在最終回收前能發揮全部潛力，然而仍存在多項挑戰，包括電動車電池設計缺乏標準化，使拆解與再利用複雜化；需要可靠的診斷工具評估劣化程度與剩餘壽命；以及隔離或更換不合格電芯的技術。
tech_0621_ev-battery-reuse-in-bess.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 電動車電池重複用於電池儲能設施，可能延長電動車電池的使用壽命，將部分需求由原生電池轉移。
tech_0621_ev-battery-reuse-in-bess.technology_status_summary_en: EV batteries reaching the end of their first life can be repurposed for use in home chargers or stationary battery energy storage systems. This approach allows batteries to deliver their full potential before final recycling. However, several challenges remain. These include the lack of standardisation in EV battery design, which complicates disassembly and repurposing; the need for reliable diagnostic tools to assess degradation and remaining lifetime; and technologies to isolate or replace underperforming cells. Additional barriers include the absence of clear insurance and legal frameworks defining responsibilities during second-life use, and the high cost of repackaging EV battery cells, modules or packs for stationary applications. Advances in these areas are essential to make battery reuse as seamless, competitive and dependable as purchasing new batteries, whose costs continue to decline. Competition from new batteries specifically optimised for stationary storage - often cheaper than repurposed EV batteries - could further limit second-life applications. Moreover, the growing second-hand EV market, which can tolerate lower performance, may extend EV battery use in vehicles rather than in stationary systems.
tech_0621_ev-battery-reuse-in-bess.market_dynamics_summary_en: EV battery being repurposed for battery storage installations might extend the life of EV batteries, shifting part of the demand for primary batteries.
tech_0621_ev-battery-reuse-in-bess.description: EV batteries reaching the end of their first life can be repurposed for use in home chargers or stationary battery energy storage systems. This approach allows batteries to deliver their full potential before final recycling. However, several challenges remain. These include the lack of standardisation in EV battery design, which complicates disassembly and repurposing; the need for reliable diagnostic tools to assess degradation and remaining lifetime; and technologies to isolate or replace underperforming cells. Additional barriers include the absence of clear insurance and legal frameworks defining responsibilities during second-life use, and the high cost of repackaging EV battery cells, modules or packs for stationary applications. Advances in these areas are essential to make battery reuse as seamless, competitive and dependable as purchasing new batteries, whose costs continue to decline. Competition from new batteries specifically optimised for stationary storage - often cheaper than repurposed EV batteries - could further limit second-life applications. Moreover, the growing second-hand EV market, which can tolerate lower performance, may extend EV battery use in vehicles rather than in stationary systems.
tech_0621_ev-battery-reuse-in-bess.NZErationale: EV battery being repurposed for battery storage installations might extend the life of EV batteries, shifting part of the demand for primary batteries.

initiatives.description: In February 2023, B2U Storage Solutions announced a facility with 25 MWh of storage capacity linked to a solar plant in California, consisting of 1300 reused battery packs from Honda and Nissan electric vehicles.
Element Energy has secured 2.5 GWh of electric vehicles battery storage modules to be reused in utility-scale stationary storage applications.
ABO Wind and Tricera are planning to build three energy storage systems with a 25 MWh capacity, expected to be operational in 2023 and using battery packs from the automotive sector.
The Irish company Range Therapy has as a goal to transform EV batteries in home storage.
The American company Smartville has as a goal to transform EV batteries in home storage.

Renault has announced it will offer remanufactured electric motors and 
second-life batteries to its customers.
In 2024, China established a state-owned enterprise for resources recycling and reuse, with a registered capital equivalent to USD 1.4 billion.

Moment Energy, a Canadian company, announced that its Luna battery energy storage system is the first in the world to be built with repurposed lithium-ion batteries and successfully tested through all key UL safety standards.
Redwood, an US battery recycling company, launched a new buisness unit to repurpose second-life EV batteries for energy storage, targetting microgrids for AI data centers.

tech_0622_battery-passport.technology_status_summary_zh: 電池護照可追蹤電池從生產到報廢的整個歷程，電池及其組件上的條碼可讓人取得電池成分、使用情況與位置等資訊，這有助於建立電池碳足跡、改善電池追蹤並最大化回收效益。
tech_0622_battery-passport.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 追蹤並溯源電池整個生命週期——從環境影響到使用及報廢——對政策制定者與大眾提供資訊至關重要，電池護照可大力支持此目標，這些工具有助於降低負面影響並最大化電池效益，同時促進其回收再利用。
tech_0622_battery-passport.technology_status_summary_en: The battery passport allows for tracking of a battery from production to end of life. Barcodes on the battery and its components allow for access to information about the battery composition, use and location. This can be useful for establishing the battery carbon footprint,  improving battery tracking and maximising recycling.
tech_0622_battery-passport.market_dynamics_summary_en: Tracking and tracing batteries throughout their lifecycle - from environmental impacts to use and end-of-life - are essential to inform policymakers and the public, and the battery passport can largely support this goal. These tools help reduce negative impacts and maximise benefits of batteries while facilitating their recovery for recycling.
tech_0622_battery-passport.description: The battery passport allows for tracking of a battery from production to end of life. Barcodes on the battery and its components allow for access to information about the battery composition, use and location. This can be useful for establishing the battery carbon footprint,  improving battery tracking and maximising recycling.
tech_0622_battery-passport.NZErationale: Tracking and tracing batteries throughout their lifecycle - from environmental impacts to use and end-of-life - are essential to inform policymakers and the public, and the battery passport can largely support this goal. These tools help reduce negative impacts and maximise benefits of batteries while facilitating their recovery for recycling.

initiatives.description: In December 2030, the European Commission publishes the proposal for a new Batteries Regulation, which included the Digital Product Passport idea for batteries.
The EU adopts the new Batteries Regulation (Regulation (EU) 2023/1542). The final text defines the Digital Battery Passport (Article 77 and related Annexes)

From 2027, batteries in the European Union should have a QR code connected to their digital product passport (DPP) to provide access to the labelling information, and to additional information (e.g. declaration of conformity, due diligence report).
The Global Battery Alliance proposed a practical content model, governance principles and a timeline aiming for broad industry adoption by 2030.

The first pilot of the global battery passport was released in 2024, including ten case studies performed in collaboration with battery producers accounting for over 80% of today’s battery market. The pilot considers seven different ESG standards and provides a score for each of them, when data is available, and gives a global ESG score. These pilots have been useful in identifying data gaps related to certain ESG metrics or certain steps of the supply chain that need to be addressed to improve the global battery passport programme.

tech_0623_battery-direct-recycling.technology_status_summary_zh: 直接回收（又稱直接再生、直接回收或基於再鋰化的回收）旨在回收電極材料（正極/負極）並使其重新活化，例如透過正極再鋰化，使其能在新電池中重複使用，正極是電池電芯中單一價值最高的組件，約占其生產成本的30-40%（2024年全球電池化學體系平均），主要問題之一是此製程須針對不同正極化學體系客製化。
tech_0623_battery-direct-recycling.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 直接回收可降低鋰離子電池回收所需的能源，並提升回收效率。
tech_0623_battery-direct-recycling.technology_status_summary_en: Direct recycling (also called direct regeneration, direct recovery or relithiation-based recycling) aims to recover electrode materials (cathode/anode) and reactivating it, for example by re-lithiation for the cathode, so that it becomes reusable in a new battery. The cathode is the single most valuable components in battery cells, accounting for approximately 30-40% of its production cost (2024 world battery chemistry average). One of the main issues is that this process needs to be tailored for each battery type and requires access to the single electrodes, which is relatively simple for manufacturing scraps but difficult for end of life batteries.
tech_0623_battery-direct-recycling.market_dynamics_summary_en: Direct recycling can lower the energy requirement and increase the efficiency of lithium-ion battery recycling.
tech_0623_battery-direct-recycling.description: Direct recycling (also called direct regeneration, direct recovery or relithiation-based recycling) aims to recover electrode materials (cathode/anode) and reactivating it, for example by re-lithiation for the cathode, so that it becomes reusable in a new battery. The cathode is the single most valuable components in battery cells, accounting for approximately 30-40% of its production cost (2024 world battery chemistry average). One of the main issues is that this process needs to be tailored for each battery type and requires access to the single electrodes, which is relatively simple for manufacturing scraps but difficult for end of life batteries.
tech_0623_battery-direct-recycling.NZErationale: Direct recycling can lower the energy requirement and increase the efficiency of lithium-ion battery recycling.

initiatives.description: Re-lithiation for direct recycling process demonstrated in laboratories.

Defect-targeted healing and other low-energy regeneration methods that repaired structural/chemical degradation in cathode particles rather than breaking them into elements are introduced in the scientific literature.
Direct recycling of lithium iron phosphate batteries is demonstrated at the laboratory scale.
Review on direct recycling methods.
Argonne and Toyota start co-developing direct recycling
Several start-ups developing and scaling direct recycling

tech_0624_hydrometallurgical-battery-rec.technology_status_summary_zh: 濕法冶金涉及化學溶浸與純化製程，以沉澱出個別金屬產品，濕法冶金可用於生產電池級材料，例如電池級碳酸鋰或硫酸鎳，也可依所用試劑與加工程度不同，生產中間產物，業界正在開發能回收石墨的先進濕法冶金路線；然而這些製程仍處於發展早期。
tech_0624_hydrometallurgical-battery-rec.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 濕法冶金，無論單獨使用或與火法冶金方法結合，是鋰離子電池回收的領先技術，這對長期降低關鍵礦物的原生需求至關重要，尤其自2035年起，屆時報廢電池原料預計將快速增加。
tech_0624_hydrometallurgical-battery-rec.technology_status_summary_en:
Hydrometallurgy involves chemical leaching and purification processes to precipitate out individual metal products. Hydrometallurgy can be used to produce battery-grade materials, for instance battery-grade lithium carbonate or nickel  sulphates, or it can be used to produce intermediate products depending on the reagents used and the level of processing implemented. Advanced hydrometallurgical routes are being developed in industry which can recover the graphite; however, these processes are in their infancy compared with recovering lithium, nickel and cobalt. The primary inputs for hydrometallurgy are black mass Recycling of Critical Minerals Outlook for critical minerals recycling or the intermediate products formed from pyrometallurgy; battery cells or modules 
cannot be used directly. The black mass feedstock typically has restrictions on the impurity level to be used as an input, for instance copper and aluminium.
tech_0624_hydrometallurgical-battery-rec.market_dynamics_summary_en: Hydrometallurgy, alone or combined with pyrometallurgical methods, is the leading technology for recycling lithium-ion batteries. This will be key to reducing primary demand for critical minerals over the long term, particularly from 2035 onwards, when end-of-life battery feedstock is expected to grow rapidly.
tech_0624_hydrometallurgical-battery-rec.description:
Hydrometallurgy involves chemical leaching and purification processes to precipitate out individual metal products. Hydrometallurgy can be used to produce battery-grade materials, for instance battery-grade lithium carbonate or nickel  sulphates, or it can be used to produce intermediate products depending on the reagents used and the level of processing implemented. Advanced hydrometallurgical routes are being developed in industry which can recover the graphite; however, these processes are in their infancy compared with recovering lithium, nickel and cobalt. The primary inputs for hydrometallurgy are black mass Recycling of Critical Minerals Outlook for critical minerals recycling or the intermediate products formed from pyrometallurgy; battery cells or modules 
cannot be used directly. The black mass feedstock typically has restrictions on the impurity level to be used as an input, for instance copper and aluminium.
tech_0624_hydrometallurgical-battery-rec.NZErationale: Hydrometallurgy, alone or combined with pyrometallurgical methods, is the leading technology for recycling lithium-ion batteries. This will be key to reducing primary demand for critical minerals over the long term, particularly from 2035 onwards, when end-of-life battery feedstock is expected to grow rapidly.

initiatives.description: This technology is already in use by companies like Li-cycle (US) or GEM (China).

tech_0625_use-of-a-pyro-hydro-metallurgy.technology_name: Use of a pyro/hydro-metallurgy combo for battery recycling
tech_0625_use-of-a-pyro-hydro-metallurgy.technology_name_zh: 火法/濕法冶金組合用於電池回收
tech_0625_use-of-a-pyro-hydro-metallurgy.technology_status_summary_zh: 混合火濕法回收製程結合高溫處理以安全分解廢電池，並搭配化學精煉以回收並純化關鍵金屬供重複使用，此方法具備優異的安全性能、可處理混合電池類型的靈活性，以及高品質的回收材料，然而也涉及高能耗、潛在的鋰損失及更高的運營複雜度與成本。
tech_0625_use-of-a-pyro-hydro-metallurgy.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 濕法冶金，無論單獨使用或與火法冶金方法結合，是鋰離子電池回收的領先技術，這對長期降低關鍵礦物的原生需求至關重要，尤其自2035年起，屆時報廢電池原料預計將快速增加。
tech_0625_use-of-a-pyro-hydro-metallurgy.technology_status_summary_en: The hybrid pyro-hydro recycling process combines high-temperature treatment to safely break down used batteries with chemical refining to recover and purify key metals for reuse. It offers strong safety performance, flexibility for mixed battery types, and high-quality recovered materials. However, it also involves high energy consumption, potential lithium losses, and greater operational complexity and cost.
tech_0625_use-of-a-pyro-hydro-metallurgy.market_dynamics_summary_en: Hydrometallurgy, alone or combined with pyrometallurgical methods, is the leading technology for recycling lithium-ion batteries. This will be key to reducing primary demand for critical minerals over the long term, particularly from 2035 onwards, when end-of-life battery feedstock is expected to grow rapidly.
tech_0625_use-of-a-pyro-hydro-metallurgy.description: The hybrid pyro-hydro recycling process combines high-temperature treatment to safely break down used batteries with chemical refining to recover and purify key metals for reuse. It offers strong safety performance, flexibility for mixed battery types, and high-quality recovered materials. However, it also involves high energy consumption, potential lithium losses, and greater operational complexity and cost.
tech_0625_use-of-a-pyro-hydro-metallurgy.NZErationale: Hydrometallurgy, alone or combined with pyrometallurgical methods, is the leading technology for recycling lithium-ion batteries. This will be key to reducing primary demand for critical minerals over the long term, particularly from 2035 onwards, when end-of-life battery feedstock is expected to grow rapidly.

initiatives.description: This technology is already in use by companies like Umicore (Belgium) or Glencore (Switzerland).

tech_0626_pyrometallurgical-smelting-for.technology_name_zh: 火法冶金熔煉電池回收
tech_0626_pyrometallurgical-smelting-for.technology_status_summary_zh: 火法冶金是一項成熟的金屬萃取與純化技術，涉及在高溫爐中熔煉電池或材料，回收部分金屬作為合金，其餘金屬則作為氧化物（爐渣）回收，主要可回收金屬以合金形式存在（如含鈷、鎳與銅的鎳鈷錳氧化鋰NMC化學體系），其他則含於爐渣中（如鋁、鋰與矽）。
tech_0626_pyrometallurgical-smelting-for.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 火法冶金雖不如濕法冶金普及，但仍用於回收鋰離子電池，這對長期降低關鍵礦物的原生需求至關重要，尤其自2035年起，屆時報廢電池原料預計將快速增加。
tech_0626_pyrometallurgical-smelting-for.technology_status_summary_en: Pyrometallurgy is an established technique for metal extraction and purification, which involves smelting the battery or material in a high-temperature oven, recovering a fraction of the metals as a metal alloy and the remainder of the metals as oxides (slag). The primary recoverable metals are in the form of an alloy (for a lithium nickel manganese cobalt oxide [NMC] chemistry including cobalt, nickel and copper) while others are contained in a slag (such as aluminium, lithium and silicon). Therefore, further hydrometallurgy processing is required to recover the individual metals or battery-grade salts. The removal of several key impurities during the pyrometallurgical smelting process, however, can enable simpler and shorter hydrometallurgy processing. Recovering lithium from the slag is possible using hydrometallurgical processes; however, the yield is typically lower than the nickel and cobalt from the alloy. In pyrometallurgy all the carbon from the graphite is burnt and thus cannot be recovered. Pyrometallurgy requires minimal pretreatment, so battery cells, modules and black mass may be used directly as inputs.
tech_0626_pyrometallurgical-smelting-for.market_dynamics_summary_en: Pyrometallurigal, albeit less widely employed than hydrometallurgical methods, is used to recycle lithium-ion batteries, which will be key to reducing primary demand for critical minerals over the long term, particularly from 2035 onwards, when end-of-life battery feedstock is expected to grow rapidly.
tech_0626_pyrometallurgical-smelting-for.description: Pyrometallurgy is an established technique for metal extraction and purification, which involves smelting the battery or material in a high-temperature oven, recovering a fraction of the metals as a metal alloy and the remainder of the metals as oxides (slag). The primary recoverable metals are in the form of an alloy (for a lithium nickel manganese cobalt oxide [NMC] chemistry including cobalt, nickel and copper) while others are contained in a slag (such as aluminium, lithium and silicon). Therefore, further hydrometallurgy processing is required to recover the individual metals or battery-grade salts. The removal of several key impurities during the pyrometallurgical smelting process, however, can enable simpler and shorter hydrometallurgy processing. Recovering lithium from the slag is possible using hydrometallurgical processes; however, the yield is typically lower than the nickel and cobalt from the alloy. In pyrometallurgy all the carbon from the graphite is burnt and thus cannot be recovered. Pyrometallurgy requires minimal pretreatment, so battery cells, modules and black mass may be used directly as inputs.
tech_0626_pyrometallurgical-smelting-for.NZErationale: Pyrometallurigal, albeit less widely employed than hydrometallurgical methods, is used to recycle lithium-ion batteries, which will be key to reducing primary demand for critical minerals over the long term, particularly from 2035 onwards, when end-of-life battery feedstock is expected to grow rapidly.

initiatives.description: This technology is already in use by companies like Valdi (France) or Redux (Germany).

tech_0627_chemical-recycling-of-cables.technology_status_summary_zh: 溶浸溶液溶解電纜周圍的塑膠，以釋放其中的銅，此方法適用於尺寸不均勻的電纜，但會產生廢棄物。
tech_0627_chemical-recycling-of-cables.technology_status_summary_en: A leaching solution dissolves the plastic surrounding cables to liberate the copper therein. It is useful for non-uniformly sized cables but produces waste.
tech_0627_chemical-recycling-of-cables.description: A leaching solution dissolves the plastic surrounding cables to liberate the copper therein. It is useful for non-uniformly sized cables but produces waste.

initiatives.description: Industrial-scale solvent-dissolution plant (targeted at PVC composites and cable sheathing) in Ferrara, Italy.

tech_0628_cables-plastic-layer-removal-w.technology_name: Cables' plastic layer removal with high-pressure water
tech_0628_cables-plastic-layer-removal-w.technology_name_zh: 高壓水去除電纜塑膠層
tech_0628_cables-plastic-layer-removal-w.technology_status_summary_zh: 高壓水射流去除銅電纜周圍的塑膠層，此方法的優勢在於不產生廢棄物。
tech_0628_cables-plastic-layer-removal-w.technology_status_summary_en: High-pressure water jets remove the plastic layer surrounding copper cables. This method has the advantage of not generating waste.
tech_0628_cables-plastic-layer-removal-w.description: High-pressure water jets remove the plastic layer surrounding copper cables. This method has the advantage of not generating waste.

tech_0629_cables-copper-incineration.technology_status_summary_zh: 透過焚燒電纜回收銅，回收銅的品質較低，且會排放有毒氣體，此方法過去曾廣泛使用，但如今已在許多國家遭禁止。
tech_0629_cables-copper-incineration.technology_status_summary_en: Copper is recovered by burning the cables. The quality of recovered copper is low, and toxic gasses are emitted. Formerly used a lot but it is now forbidden in many countries.
tech_0629_cables-copper-incineration.description: Copper is recovered by burning the cables. The quality of recovered copper is low, and toxic gasses are emitted. Formerly used a lot but it is now forbidden in many countries.

tech_0630_mechanical-stripping-or-crushi.technology_name: Mechanical stripping or crushing of cables
tech_0630_mechanical-stripping-or-crushi.technology_status_summary_zh: 此方法以刀片或纜線剝除電纜上的塑膠，這些部分隨後被破碎為顆粒，再分離塑膠與銅，此方法易於實施且成本低廉，因此廣為採用，尤其在限制或不允許使用電纜焚燒的受規範市場中。
tech_0630_mechanical-stripping-or-crushi.technology_status_summary_en: This method strips the plastics off the cables by blades or cables, these parts are then crushed into particles then separated between plastic and copper. It is easy to implement and low cost, and so it is largely adopted, especially in regulated markets limiting or not authorizing the use of cable incineration.
tech_0630_mechanical-stripping-or-crushi.description: This method strips the plastics off the cables by blades or cables, these parts are then crushed into particles then separated between plastic and copper. It is easy to implement and low cost, and so it is largely adopted, especially in regulated markets limiting or not authorizing the use of cable incineration.

tech_0631_thermal-decomposition-of-cable.technology_status_summary_zh: 此方法將電纜置於無氧的溫熱環境中，塑膠降解為可回收的有機燃料，此方法效率極高，且不產生廢棄物。
tech_0631_thermal-decomposition-of-cable.technology_status_summary_en: This method consists in placing cables in a warm environment with no oxygen. The plastic degrades into organic fuel which can be recovered. The method is highly efficient and no waste is generated.
tech_0631_thermal-decomposition-of-cable.description: This method consists in placing cables in a warm environment with no oxygen. The plastic degrades into organic fuel which can be recovered. The method is highly efficient and no waste is generated.

tech_0632_cryogenic-grinding.technology_status_summary_zh: 冷凍有助於將元件研磨成細粉，液態氮常用於維持攝氏零下100度以下的溫度，如此產生的細研磨粉主要由單相顆粒組成，更易於回收。
tech_0632_cryogenic-grinding.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 此方法可提升回收製程的產率，讓電子產品內含材料的循環利用更佳。
tech_0632_cryogenic-grinding.technology_status_summary_en: Freezing helps in grinding elements in a fine dust. Liquid nitrogen is often used to maintain a temperature below -100 degrees Celsius. The so created fine milling is mostly composed of single phase particles, which are easier to recycle.
tech_0632_cryogenic-grinding.market_dynamics_summary_en: This method can improve the yield of recycling processes, leading to a better circularity of materials embedded in electronics.
tech_0632_cryogenic-grinding.description: Freezing helps in grinding elements in a fine dust. Liquid nitrogen is often used to maintain a temperature below -100 degrees Celsius. The so created fine milling is mostly composed of single phase particles, which are easier to recycle.
tech_0632_cryogenic-grinding.NZErationale: This method can improve the yield of recycling processes, leading to a better circularity of materials embedded in electronics.

initiatives.description: Technology tested at laboratory scale globally.

tech_0633_supercritical-carbon-dioxide-u.technology_name: Supercritical carbon dioxide uses for metal recovery
tech_0633_supercritical-carbon-dioxide-u.technology_name_zh: 超臨界二氧化碳用於金屬回收
tech_0633_supercritical-carbon-dioxide-u.technology_status_summary_zh: 不依賴酸類從印刷電路板中溶浸金屬，而是使用超臨界二氧化碳與共溶劑，從複雜結構中回收金屬，相較酸浸法，此方法速度更快且產生較少廢棄物。
tech_0633_supercritical-carbon-dioxide-u.technology_status_summary_en: Instead on relying on acids to leach metals from printed circuits, supercritical CO2 and co-solvents are used to recover metals from complex structures. This method is more rapid and generates less waste compared to acid leaching.
tech_0633_supercritical-carbon-dioxide-u.description: Instead on relying on acids to leach metals from printed circuits, supercritical CO2 and co-solvents are used to recover metals from complex structures. This method is more rapid and generates less waste compared to acid leaching.

initiatives.description: Technology applied to palladium recovery from catalysts.
Supercritical CO2 was tested to remove heavy metals from waste fluids in the drilling industry.
SUPERMET is a collaboration between OCGM and Fraunhofer to test supercritical CO2 and polymer solvent to recover platinum and palladium from catalysts.
The technology was tested to recover cathode material from Li-ion batteries. 96.7% of the cathode material was successfully detached from the current collector.

tech_0634_advanced-hydrometallurgy-in-re.technology_name_zh: 回收製程用先進濕法冶金
tech_0634_advanced-hydrometallurgy-in-re.technology_status_summary_zh: 此次世代溶浸與溶劑萃取技術針對關鍵礦物最佳化，依賴選擇性溶浸與先進分離膜，相較一般濕法冶金可提升回收率並降低化學品消耗。
tech_0634_advanced-hydrometallurgy-in-re.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 濕法冶金，無論單獨使用或與火法冶金方法結合，是鋰離子電池回收的領先技術，這對長期降低關鍵礦物的原生需求至關重要，尤其自2035年起，屆時報廢電池原料預計將快速增加。
tech_0634_advanced-hydrometallurgy-in-re.technology_status_summary_en: This next-generation leaching and solvent extraction technique is optimised for critical minerals. It relies on selective leaching and advanced separation membranes for improved recovery rate and lowered chemical consumption compared to regular hydrometallurgy.
tech_0634_advanced-hydrometallurgy-in-re.market_dynamics_summary_en: Hydrometallurgy, alone or combined with pyrometallurgical methods, is the leading technology for recycling lithium-ion batteries. This will be key to reducing primary demand for critical minerals over the long term, particularly from 2035 onwards, when end-of-life battery feedstock is expected to grow rapidly.
tech_0634_advanced-hydrometallurgy-in-re.description: This next-generation leaching and solvent extraction technique is optimised for critical minerals. It relies on selective leaching and advanced separation membranes for improved recovery rate and lowered chemical consumption compared to regular hydrometallurgy.
tech_0634_advanced-hydrometallurgy-in-re.NZErationale: Hydrometallurgy, alone or combined with pyrometallurgical methods, is the leading technology for recycling lithium-ion batteries. This will be key to reducing primary demand for critical minerals over the long term, particularly from 2035 onwards, when end-of-life battery feedstock is expected to grow rapidly.

initiatives.description: In 2023, Aqua Metals started operating their pilot advanced hydrometallurgy plant.

In 2024, US-based start-up Ascend Elements and Mexican chemicals company Orbia’s subsidiary Koura showed proofs of a new hydrometallurgical process enabling a recovery rate of up to 99.9% for graphite anodes, which is typically not recoverable. They were awarded a USD 125 million grant from the US government to build a facility in the United States to commercialise this process.

tech_0635_biological-metals-reclamation.technology_status_summary_zh: 此技術利用微生物協助回收金屬（鋰、鈷、銅、鎳、錳、鋁），其效率甚至可能高於其他方法，但所需時間比濕法冶金方法長得多，採礦業已在使用此技術。
tech_0635_biological-metals-reclamation.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 生物回收可開啟關鍵礦物的新來源。
tech_0635_biological-metals-reclamation.technology_status_summary_en: This technology makes use of microorganisms to help in the recovery of metals (Li, CO, Cu, Ni, Mn, Al). The efficiency can even be higher than other methods, but the time required is much longer than hydrometallurgical methods. Already in used by the mining industry.
tech_0635_biological-metals-reclamation.market_dynamics_summary_en: Biological reclamation can enables new sources of critical minerals.
tech_0635_biological-metals-reclamation.description: This technology makes use of microorganisms to help in the recovery of metals (Li, CO, Cu, Ni, Mn, Al). The efficiency can even be higher than other methods, but the time required is much longer than hydrometallurgical methods. Already in used by the mining industry.
tech_0635_biological-metals-reclamation.NZErationale: Biological reclamation can enables new sources of critical minerals.

initiatives.description: The company Mint will open the first bioleaching factory to recycle e-waste in Sydney. This demonstration project will treat 3,000 t of waste per year.

Mint will open a second recycling facility in Texas, with a special focus on Li-ion battery recycling, on top of general e-waste. Completion expected in late 2025, with a capacity around 8,000 t per year.

tech_0636_virtual-model-of-the-entire-re.technology_name: Virtual model of the entire recycling process
tech_0636_virtual-model-of-the-entire-re.technology_name_zh: 整個回收流程的虛擬模型
tech_0636_virtual-model-of-the-entire-re.technology_status_summary_zh: 開發整個回收流程的虛擬模型，可實現即時最佳化與預測性維護。
tech_0636_virtual-model-of-the-entire-re.technology_status_summary_en: The development of a virtual model of the entire recycling process allows for real-time optimisation and predictive maintenance.
tech_0636_virtual-model-of-the-entire-re.description: The development of a virtual model of the entire recycling process allows for real-time optimisation and predictive maintenance.

initiatives.description: Umicore invested in data analysis tools to better identify the source of metal to air emissions leading to significant emissions reduction. The implementation of diverse tools and good practices supported by this digital twin allowed to reduce emissions by 45%.

tech_0637_electrochemical-recovery-syste.technology_status_summary_zh: 專為從複雜、低濃度溶液中回收高純度金屬而設計的先進電積與電解精煉製程，此技術適用於二次與原生金屬生產。
tech_0637_electrochemical-recovery-syste.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 電化學回收可提升多種金屬與材料（包括鋰離子電池中的金屬）的回收效率。
tech_0637_electrochemical-recovery-syste.technology_status_summary_en: Advanced electrowinning and electrorefining processes designed specifically for recovering high-purity metals from complex, low-concentration solutions. This technology applies to secondary and primary metal production.
tech_0637_electrochemical-recovery-syste.market_dynamics_summary_en: Electrochemical recovery can increase the recycling efficiency for several metals and materials, including those in lithium-ion batteries.
tech_0637_electrochemical-recovery-syste.description: Advanced electrowinning and electrorefining processes designed specifically for recovering high-purity metals from complex, low-concentration solutions. This technology applies to secondary and primary metal production.
tech_0637_electrochemical-recovery-syste.NZErationale: Electrochemical recovery can increase the recycling efficiency for several metals and materials, including those in lithium-ion batteries.

initiatives.description: Nth Cycle installed their first electro-extraction system able to process 3100 t of scrap per year, and output 900 t of nickel cobalt MHP.
Electra rised over USD 180 millions to scale up its iron electrowinning process.
EMEW clean technologies reported the development of an electrowinning technology for copper recovery.
A research group in the United States used electrowinning to recover rare earth elements from permanent magnets.
Electrochemical battery material recycling is studies in the international accademic community.
Acqua Metal completes its recycling pilot combining electrochemical recovery and hydrometallurgy for lithium-ion battery recycling.

tech_0638_plasma-arc-recycling.technology_status_summary_zh: 電漿電弧用於將廢棄物加熱至高溫，以選擇性回收目標元素，即使對電子廢棄物等複雜原料，此方法也能實現高回收率。
tech_0638_plasma-arc-recycling.technology_status_summary_en: A plasma arc is used to heat waste at a high temperature to selectively recover targeted elements. This allows for high recovery rate, even for complex feedstock such as electronic waste.
tech_0638_plasma-arc-recycling.description: A plasma arc is used to heat waste at a high temperature to selectively recover targeted elements. This allows for high recovery rate, even for complex feedstock such as electronic waste.

initiatives.description: Tetronics manufactures plasma torches for metal recovery. They installed their technology in PGM recovery facilities in Japan and Korea, and an e-waste recycling company in the United States.
